name: Democratic Membership Alert
subject: What your DNC Membership really does:
body:
---
Derek, If you’ve ever gotten a fundraising email from a campaign or organization like the DNC and asked yourself “ _What would my $7 donation to the DNC actually do?_ ” we’d understand. During such a consequential election year, it’s important that our supporters are informed about what the DNC is doing to support Democratic candidates and state parties in the fight to win back the House and the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **So, Derek, here’s what the DNC does with your $7 to elect Democrats all across the country:**
* We’re working in key battleground states to register hundreds of thousands of new Democratic voters.
* We launched our DNC Playbook — a resource complete with case studies, research, and community insights that will equip campaigns and state parties across the country with the information and skills they need to implement winning organizing strategies.
* We’re suing the Trump administration to defend the American people from Republican attacks on vote-by-mail.

[**We know it might not seem like $7 can do that much, but when we combine your $7 with donations from thousands of other Democrats across the country, it adds up quickly. Can you pitch in today and help support our work across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
---
****
**When you pitch in $7 today, you’ll also reserve your Official 2026 DNC Member Card →**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)
These member cards are meant to serve as a reminder that we’re all part of a mission to elect Democrats up and down the ballot — _this year and beyond_ — who will stop Trump’s agenda and serve the American people. **You’re an invaluable member of our team, so we hope you’ll officially join us by reserving your member card today.**
**[CLAIM YOURS NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**
Every member card donation will go directly towards electing Democrats up and down the ballot, in every corner of the country.
[**Derek, we’re grateful to have you on our team, and we hope you’ll consider donating $7 to the DNC today to help us continue building power and elect Democrats all across the country this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**

| **[Donate $32](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-membercard?express_lane=true&amount=32&refcode=em_20260424_6845_fr&refcode2=6845_22930333_m7gbda&akid=6845%2E22930333%2Em7gbda)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23855%2E878179%2Ep-UpVP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23855%2E878179%2Ep-UpVP).**

subject: A recent poll came out, then Trump attacked me.

body:
President Trump took to Truth Social to endorse my opponent and attack me – just minutes after a brand-new poll came out showing this race statistically tied.
#
Peter, this changes everything.
**Last month, President Trump took to Truth Social to endorse my opponent and attack me – just minutes after a brand-new poll came out showing this race statistically tied.**
Here’s why that matters so much: When Trump tells right-wing Republicans to jump, they jump. And right now, he’s telling them that there’s nothing more important for the GOP’s control of the Senate than winning in North Carolina.
**With this new poll out, even more right-wing money is about to flood our state. I can’t fight back without your help.**

name: Burt Jones
subject: It’s almost time to vote, Georgia!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA INC
body:
|
---
Friend,

Burt Jones here.

President Donald J. Trump has given me his Complete and Total Endorsement for Governor of Georgia – and now I’m asking you personally to back us up by getting out there to vote!

Early voting runs from April 27 – May 15, and this is when our America First grassroots movement can build an unbeatable lead before Election Day on May 19.

[](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4fxx4Qab1VDYXF-mHUi4Pn498mdOKgomHykEIYe8vTw1o8M2YQs7OACcJLBRX1wZz1wbOw8v2DnD90ph-rcX0bEpj2DDNS6Bvge_MX7LEPs_4LI-RGjiVU2e9Dn0u676RSc5CjXU99b4VR7kgysmtjSORewe497GffcV7VFZ6kmapOstlTO5gVdiKeh9NN5_e-VNtiTWPcJltaP7g7wMGlIF3Y4BkAUNAyRQwT4NEuUuGDfOTNqkXL_lDdrtvU4nzrb-4aoAcJH4iLTiHXL2vVrqRTrX-XYuGNH84oaoEkiP)

President Trump has said I’ve been “tested at the most difficult levels and times,” that I’m a “WARRIOR,” and that I will “never let Georgia down.” I was proud to stand with him when it wasn’t easy—and I’m honored he’s standing with me now as we fight to keep red.

But his endorsement is just the beginning. To win this race and deliver on our America First agenda—lower taxes, safer communities, secure elections, and strong Georgia values—I need you to get out and vote.

Here’s how you can help me right now:

* Make your plan to vote early between April 27 – May 15 or on Election Day on May 19th.
* Forward this email to 3 friends who support President Trump.
* Bring a family member, neighbor, or church friend with you when you go to vote.
* Help us fill up the gas tanks, put yard signs all over Georgia, and spread our message on TV by [**DONATING HERE**](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4fKchRMoOIT2GA85KsWO1rbUnvmSKMKfHldR4ws91ARRzcAmqOyaILuGOPA6DEpttq_krk0LNCzLTbywxumRQ2mfhjuoGfuRpKZqxVxQ1-1Iu7MB0UCaMIKbnP99QG9q_vtpOC23jznEOuhqUi_OVLlkyqe4N1-y7fSQKXBaEQty9ecfndZyZINdVFkv6EGNERfoZY8yEGoohe95hzWb6ugovvTteiOu_i-6HyFRElN9xrfOMME_7K35G3hqx1yzyS9vNswLdosk9t49ku9NC-GiHHHQXb1eLbq61Un3gqv3IFiENgAANOliBChNSk1dMNiN0SWE3eiC4KZ1Qf0HBHRIDp7ctsjfiD5Oin1dGslQyk8wsBCRwIY58JpTgqL7P5mWpR3k4jTv6S6tV6O0FIk%3D)

Every early vote we bank sends a message: Georgia conservatives are organized, motivated, and ready to finish the job. When Trump Country turns out early, we win.

Please take a moment today to lock in your plan to vote for me:

[ **👉 Find your early voting location and times HERE** ](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=qjJmGenH-pyLv369BUDq4dkjsvrrRbDS-Ggr-wO-RLSo60gxEQknl3ctPgRhhz4EVlt5tmoCIlyFUlyVLTSibAj0ernQX4JEWxz9itzIs6vTI5YpHPTI5rwHTfAcyyA4Gi_-_CtBjUJT_yALGK2djMkBONYOheOpi61ZJFWhj3yezuO5womlsJfGkQPN9Vz-shzTXsUzplJ0HBktM_Sknjxo2wEBqfB7Dig8De92NxjDPCePcHigaN6vzrIFFMfS4XNo8ym3oMlU1VcYZC9BsGF649ns1d6my4DchdrH0Cz7Bm-Y1X6KX4_L6VpW7idKA4rzHo7VnYN5XmdMfI43rw%3D%3D)

[ **👉 GO TO BurtJonesForGA.com TO LEARN MORE** ](http://links.burtjonesforga.com/u/click?_t=858b83d5086141569cc77db3b7b1b605&_m=e5dc2b712ae34809b252b7c5780d3a8d&_e=57NUi8GFgP7HO3YttjWDrNFb7DZdMaCPjiaWtt18ElSPSL6AVbK144SuykmEU7xEpyae7-hl_KxYgRwI-o1O_IJn98EiMKon6QEJ3AFO_9pMcIdARrb5UdBl59oebMpm13JR6ZB5-ON0XkwS2Pul2bLDkJiD0eEabxfbzPNF_iu15XIGyx84eSdHBIPJUJj9PGXr3VWGPH0oUWviVM9sgPfIAMEupFmzQUxHqWcibEfywRb1hW9VYKzj8RACzqLd2cjgNlPoQWLTGHUcVS1M--wmQUWHTqaxp4dHq5HVjh7GSzycsOjRNE0XFnQOkDiJ)

Thank you for standing with President Trump and with me. Together, we’re going to keep Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family—and we’re going to win this race.

-Burt Jones
Candidate For Governor

| | Paid for by
BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA INC.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A quick check-in (and two recipes)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
Peter, it’s been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail, and I won’t sugarcoat it—some of it difficult to hear.
But last night, I got a small, much-needed reset.
After nearly a week of my kids figuring out dinner for themselves (yes, that means plenty of Del Taco, grilled cheese, and leftovers), _I finally got back in the kitchen._
Cooking has always been one of the ways I take care of my family—and honestly, myself too.
So I made a couple of our go-to favorites: **my sister’s French Onion soup, and my daughter Betsy’s snickerdoodles.**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
Nothing fancy. Just good, simple food that brings everyone to the table. And if you add a green salad or whatever you’ve got on hand, you’ve got yourself a great meal.
I wanted to share these recipes with you, because this campaign isn’t just about speeches and headlines. Sometimes, it’s about the everyday moments that remind us what we’re fighting for.
**You can chip in here to get these recipes:**
* **[French Onion Soup](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**
* **[Betsy’s Snickerdoodle Cookies](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**

Thank you,
Katie
P.S. If you’re able to **[chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you to my campaign, I’d be so honored.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)** This campaign is powered by people like you, and as governor, I’ll fight every day to make California more affordable for working families. I’m grateful to have you with me in this.
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260424_2_ak.yMwMHM&refcode=em20260424-41207&t=7&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260424-41207&amounts=&t=8&refcode2=41207_3422442_hfd_BZ&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41207&t=9&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41207)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41207&t=10&akid=41207%2E3422442%2Ehfd_BZ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Darin Harbick
subject: Darin Harbick - Church Votes Matter Movement - 4/24/26
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
With the 2026 session over, it's time to encourage churches and Christians to vote in the May primary

| | | | | [|
---](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=12497fd494&e=3362c31595)
| | Peter,

Hello from Darin!
The 2026 Oregon legislative session is now over, and thank you so much for everyone that prayed for us. Over 22 churches even came to my office in person!
Now our work shifts to encouraging churches and Christians to vote in the very important May election. I am proud to announce our new election focus for this May primary:
It’s called the “**Church Votes Matter** ” movement!
****
---
[|
---](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=f4051b30cd&e=3362c31595)
| |

It’s been said that over 30% of church attenders in Oregon are not registered to vote, and we want to encourage churches to register Christian to vote for this May primary. Imagine if all the churches in Lane County would pray, stand up for their convictions, and then vote!
We are visiting churches and asking for people and pastors to volunteer with us to help register people to vote, and to ask a couple of other church attenders to wave signs at their church on the three Sundays before the election by smiling, waving, being friendly, and letting them know “Church Votes Matters!”
**If you’re interested,** can you respond to this email, with your church name, and we will help you get started. We are especially looking for people to help in Lane County at Ekklesia, First Baptist, Joy Church, Northwood, and Twin Rivers Baptist, who all have multiple services.

Also, we are excited to support several conservative candidates in our area!
Please go to their website, sign up as a volunteer to pray, post a sign, or even wave signs as we get closer to the election.
Jake Pelroy - East Lane Commissioner [https://www.pelroy.com/ ](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=b54a85bc95&e=3362c31595)
Dave Lovell - Springfield Commissioner [https://www.loveallforspringfield.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=660c29a550&e=3362c31595)
Jack Tibbetts - Oregon Senate District 6 [https://www.tibbettsfororegon.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=d6161fc07a&e=3362c31595)
Adam Wilson - Oregon Representative District 7 [https://www.wilsonforspringfield.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=5a4498601d&e=3362c31595)
Ryan Ceniga - West Lane Commissioner - [https://www.ryanceniga.com/](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=17ab1dac3c&e=3362c31595)
Thank you again for helping - we can’t do it without your prayers and support. Please reach out to me if I can be of any service!

---
| | | | | |
Darin Harbick

clean_body: With the 2026 session over, it's time to encourage churches and Christians to vote in the May primary | | | | | | | Peter, Hello from Darin! The 2026 Oregon legislative session is now over, and thank you so much for everyone that prayed for us. Over 22 churches even came to my office in person! Now our work shifts to encouraging churches and Christians to vote in the very important May election. I am proud to announce our new election focus for this May primary: It’s called the “Church Votes Matter ” movement! ** | | It’s been said that over 30% of church attenders in Oregon are not registered to vote, and we want to encourage churches to register Christian to vote for this May primary. Imagine if all the churches in Lane County would pray, stand up for their convictions, and then vote! We are visiting churches and asking for people and pastors to volunteer with us to help register people to vote, and to ask a couple of other church attenders to wave signs at their church on the three Sundays before the election by smiling, waving, being friendly, and letting them know “Church Votes Matters!” If you’re interested,** can you respond to this email, with your church name, and we will help you get started. We are especially looking for people to help in Lane County at Ekklesia, First Baptist, Joy Church, Northwood, and Twin Rivers Baptist, who all have multiple services. Also, we are excited to support several conservative candidates in our area! Please go to their website, sign up as a volunteer to pray, post a sign, or even wave signs as we get closer to the election. Jake Pelroy - East Lane Commissioner Dave Lovell - Springfield Commissioner Jack Tibbetts - Oregon Senate District 6 Adam Wilson - Oregon Representative District 7 Ryan Ceniga - West Lane Commissioner - Thank you again for helping - we can’t do it without your prayers and support. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting for Election Integrity
body:
Fraud Crackdown Faces Opposition

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH PURSUES FAIR ELECTIONS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37654&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9SQzcyMUV2cWY4OD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=115fda81cb042d8115e5a640628250d30ad808d69770eba3d1787c9dcd11bea4]

In January, the Supreme Court of the United States agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c]
with us that Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors had
standing to challenge an Illinois law that allowed the counting of
ballots up to two weeks after election day.

Now with midterm elections looming and controversy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37656&F=T&&hash=93215e78ece137f0b60b059207936e086ddf7c3f2fba8a7f5099be90c0f2ee86]
over the conduct of the redistricting election in Virginia, we are
anticipating victory in our latest case for _one_ election day. Our
chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, recounts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGlzdG9yaWMtZGF5LWF0LXRoZS1zdXByZW1lLWNvdXJ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5a554b8227a190207b2dbc5502cb508888486a1ef5653b9571a91e024026b849] in
_Investigative Bulletin _our significant accomplishments in court.

> Judicial Watch was at the Supreme Court on Monday, March 23,
> fighting
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1hcmd1bWVudC1vbi1tYXJjaC0yMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=87e58d9275fd7bdd0ab7429e8654c731a5006840db6b8ee01017b047d0316aee]
> for a critical legal determination: Election Day is a day—not five
> days, not a week, not a month.
>
> After filing the brief in February Judicial Watch President Tom
> Fitton said
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37102&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1icmllZi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b228433e5e2d34983ed4d9c6cd22e8f3c97279497fbf2b0e1a350c7988cdbdc8],
> “This is the most important Supreme Court election integrity case
> in a generation. The pandemic spread of states counting late ballots
> received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of long-standing
> federal law that not only encourages voter fraud but also severely
> undermines public confidence in our elections. The Supreme Court now
> has a critical opportunity to restore a fundamental guardrail to the
> election process.”
>
> More than fifteen states allow late-arriving ballots
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmNzbC5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb25zLWFuZC1jYW1wYWlnbnMvdGFibGUtMTEtcmVjZWlwdC1hbmQtcG9zdG1hcmstZGVhZGxpbmVzLWZvci1hYnNlbnRlZS1tYWlsLWJhbGxvdHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3028b3d9b255fd9aa49df13b46f4d835bbc7276c24517e3a132a86d7ac85ab72]
> to be counted. Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court to uphold a
> ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which
> struck down as unconstitutional a Mississippi law allowing election
> officials up to five days to count mail-in ballots received after
> Election Day. Mississippi appealed, arguing that late-arriving,
> postmarked ballots were permissible.
>

> of Mississippi, was later consolidated

> with a similar challenge by the Republican National Committee and

> Clement made the historic opening statement on behalf of Judicial

> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37425&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS90b21maXR0b24vc3RhdHVzLzIwMzYyNDUyOTAxNTY0NDIwMjA/cz00MyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eac61d75406e810f1ab56377684b7e7f2ef0b025d00a94940a39d44f15f1a370].

>
> JW’s brief to the Supreme Court
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=37089&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3dhdHNvbi12LXJlcHVibGljYW4tbmF0aW9uYWwtY29tbWl0dGVlLXNjb3R1cy1icmllZi0wMDAzNy0xMjYwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d6b1274ced4c1855dd698ab8a09a33d45d941248c6e83f6c76cbffdc2c0e8b40]
> makes the case for a single Election Day. There is no historic
> foundation for counting ballots arriving after Election Day, JW
> notes. The opportunities for fraud are endless, and public
> confidence in elections is eroded.
>
> “The whole point of the federal Election-Day statutes is to set a
> single uniform day for the election,” the brief notes. “Allowing
> ballots to trickle in days or weeks after Election Day is
> antithetical to that basic goal.”
>
> Congress set an Election Day, not an Election Week or an Election
> Month. “Through the federal Election-Day statutes, Congress
> exercised its constitutional authority to set a uniform time for
> federal elections to occur. Text, historical practice, precedent,
> and common sense all demonstrate that those statutes set the
> deadline by which ballots must be submitted and received. Simply
> put, the ballot box closes on Election Day, and ballots that are not
> received until days or weeks after the date specified by Congress
> arrive after Election Day and should not be counted.”
>
> It’s been a busy year for Judicial Watch at the Supreme Court. In
> January, the court granted standing
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c]
> in a historic case JW filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and

> with convictions for murder, sexual assault, domestic violence and

> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81081&L=33711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXN0LXRocmVhdC10by11cy1za3lyb2NrZXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=828002323ae63fc7b3db509f5bc0dd39ec6c22908b2c7a62cc34bec64e867624]

clean_body: Fraud Crackdown Faces Opposition [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH PURSUES FAIR ELECTIONS [] In January, the Supreme Court of the United States agreed [] with us that Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors had standing to challenge an Illinois law that allowed the counting of ballots up to two weeks after election day. Now with midterm elections looming and controversy [] over the conduct of the redistricting election in Virginia, we are anticipating victory in our latest case for one election day. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, recounts [] in Investigative Bulletin our significant accomplishments in court. Judicial Watch was at the Supreme Court on Monday, March 23, fighting [] for a critical legal determination: Election Day is a day—not five days, not a week, not a month. After filing the brief in February Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said [], “This is the most important Supreme Court election integrity case in a generation. The pandemic spread of states counting late ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of long-standing federal law that not only encourages voter fraud but also severely undermines public confidence in our elections. The Supreme Court now has a critical opportunity to restore a fundamental guardrail to the election process.” More than fifteen states allow late-arriving ballots [] to be counted. Judicial Watch asked the Supreme Court to uphold a ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, which struck down as unconstitutional a Mississippi law allowing election officials up to five days to count mail-in ballots received after Election Day. Mississippi appealed, arguing that late-arriving, postmarked ballots were permissible. The original JW lawsuit, brought on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, was later consolidated [] with a similar challenge by the Republican National Committee and others. At the court on Monday, former U.S. Solicitor General Paul Clement made the historic opening statement on behalf of Judicial Watch’s Libertarian Party client. “All agree that elections for federal office have to end on the day of the election specified by Congress,” Clement said []. [] “Nonetheless, Mississippi insists ballots can trickle in days or even weeks after Election Day.” JW’s brief to the Supreme Court [] makes the case for a single Election Day. There is no historic foundation for counting ballots arriving after Election Day, JW notes. The opportunities for fraud are endless, and public confidence in elections is eroded. “The whole point of the federal Election-Day statutes is to set a single uniform day for the election,” the brief notes. “Allowing ballots to trickle in days or weeks after Election Day is antithetical to that basic goal.” Congress set an Election Day, not an Election Week or an Election Month. “Through the federal Election-Day statutes, Congress exercised its constitutional authority to set a uniform time for federal elections to occur. Text, historical practice, precedent, and common sense all demonstrate that those statutes set the deadline by which ballots must be submitted and received. Simply put, the ballot box closes on Election Day, and ballots that are not received until days or weeks after the date specified by Congress arrive after Election Day and should not be counted.” It’s been a busy year for Judicial Watch at the Supreme Court. In January, the court granted standing [] in a historic case JW filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors. The case challenges an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to fourteen days after the election. The Judicial Watch election integrity team is led by Senior Attorney Robert Popper, who previously served in the Voting Section of the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division. JW attorneys T. Russell Nobile and Eric Lee provide critical support for JW’s many landmark legal efforts. [] Tom Fitton reported from outside the Supreme Court [] after the March 23 hearing. The Judicial Watch team had made “historic legal arguments to preserve the idea of Election Day,” he said. Court observers were largely in agreement that a majority of the justices appeared poised to curb late-arriving ballots [ predicting what the Supreme Court will do is a fool’s errand. Some election officials are not waiting. On Thursday, the New York Times reported [] that election administrators in some states had already begun “planning for a world where all ballots must arrive by Election Day.” A decision is expected in June. It is well worth noting that six million inactive names have been removed from voter rolls nationwide due to our efforts. Recently, in Colorado alone, 372,000 ineligible voter names have been removed [] from its voter registration lists following a settlement addressing the state’s compliance with federal voter list maintenance requirements. This is a major victory for election integrity. STATES SUE TO GET BILLIONS OF TAXPAYER DOLLARS As President Trump launches a sweeping crackdown on fraud, waste, and abuse in federal benefit programs, those who benefited from years of lax rules and easy taxpayer dollars are fighting back hard. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on the new Task Force to Eliminate Fraud — led by Vice President JD Vance — and the fierce resistance from the Left. Twenty Democrat-run states and the District of Columbia are suing the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) over a new policy that prohibits all grant recipients from using taxpayer funds to promote gender ideology, benefit illegal immigrants or on programs that deprive women and girls of fair athletic opportunities or permit male competitive participation in women’s sports. In late December the federal agency that annually disburses tens of billions of dollars in food assistance announced the antidiscrimination rule [] [ states to certify compliance with the new regulations before receiving money for costly welfare programs such food stamps, free school lunch and a special program for low-income women known as Women, Infants and Children (WIC) and their kids under the age of five. The states suing over the new requirements receive over $74 billion annually from the USDA and they want their federal funds while still supporting the biased leftist policies of the previous administration. The new Trump administration policy is unconstitutional, according to their lawsuit [], which alleges that the conditions are vague, arbitrary, coercive and unrelated to the federal interest. The complaint also accuses the USDA of exceeding its legal authority and imposing the measure without following required legal procedure. The agency has “thrown unconstitutional and unlawful roadblocks between the programs created by Congress and the States that rely on them, threatening critical nutrition support, vital agricultural research, and the safety of our national food chain and communities,” according to the complaint, which also accuses the USDA of imposing extraneous and unreasoned conditions on all programs, grants and cooperative agreements. The lawsuit further alleges that the spending clause of the U.S. Constitution requires that “funding condition be communicated with sufficient clarity that it can be accepted knowingly and voluntarily, and it prohibits coercive conditions that place a gun to the head of recipients that cannot forgo critical funding.” The “ambiguous, coercive conditions” advanced by the USDA “undermine the status of the States as independent sovereigns in our federal system,” the complaint states. Among the officials suing the USDA is New York Attorney General Letitia James, who was federally indicted [] [ year with bank fraud and making false statements to a financial institution. She says millions of New Yorkers depend on government assistance to put food on the table and their benefits could be threatened or delayed. “The federal government cannot hold critical funding hostage to force states to comply with vague, ideological directives,” James said in a statement [] [ the lawsuit. The other states suing are California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, New Mexico, Oregon, Rhode Island, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin. New Jersey Attorney General Jennifer Davenport [], who has previously filed five lawsuits “challenging unlawful grant conditions imposed by the Trump Administration” confidently asserts that the president cannot make “cruel funding restrictions” that, she says in this case will result in people going hungry. Connecticut Attorney General William Tong [] says the administration’s immigration, diversity, equity, inclusion, and gender identity policies are unrelated to the purpose of USDA funding. “Trump’s message to Connecticut—fall in line with extreme MAGA ideology, or your families go hungry,” Tong said. “Trump wants states to sign hateful pledges that have absolutely nothing to do with food assistance.” The updated USDA funding policy is part of broader initiatives launched by President Trump early last year to defend women from gender ideology extremism and restore biological truth to the federal government and end the taxpayer subsidization of open borders []. Under the first measure the federal government will “defend women’s rights and protect freedom of conscience by using clear and accurate language and policies that recognize women are biologically female, and men are biologically male,” according to a presidential order []. The second aims to prevent taxpayer resources from acting as a magnet and fueling illegal immigration to the United States by ensuring that no taxpayer-funded benefits go to unqualified aliens. States only need to comply with the new rules to receive their billions in USDA funds. TRUMP IS RIDDING OUR STREETS OF ILLEGAL ALIEN CHILD SEX OFFENDERS Criminal illegal aliens make headlines almost daily for their crimes against Americans. Thankfully, the Trump administration has ended the previous policy of accommodating sanctuary jurisdictions that shield these offenders from federal immigration enforcement. As a result, our children are safer now. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] the details. In yet another noteworthy immigration enforcement accomplishment ignored by establishment media, the Trump administration nearly doubled the number of illegal alien child sex offenders arrested during Biden’s last year in a U.S. city known to be a cesspool of undocumented criminals. In Trump’s first year back in the White House, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) apprehended 414 criminal alien child predators in Houston, Texas compared to just 211 under the last administration’s final year in office. The recently arrested criminal aliens accounted for 761 child sex offenses and 525 other serious crimes ranging from homicide to robbery, according to an announcement [] issued this week by ICE, the 20,000-employee Department of Homeland Security (DHS) agency created after 9/11 to enforce immigration laws and preserve national security. The latest roundup of child predators comes on the heels of two separate operations in Houston less than a year ago in which more than 1,000 dangerous criminal aliens were apprehended in the area, which is estimated to be home to more than half a million illegal immigrants. In the first effort ICE arrested over 350 gang members with 1,700 criminal convictions [] who entered the U.S. illegally more than 1,400 times. Most belonged to violent gangs, including the renowned Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), Tren de Aragua, Latin Kings,15th Street Gang, Sureños, Paisas and Tango Blast and were convicted of serious crimes including homicide, sexual assault of a child, drug and sex trafficking and unlawful possession of a firearm. A few weeks later, in a separate Houston crackdown, federal authorities nabbed another 822 illegal immigrant offenders [] with convictions for murder, sexual assault, domestic violence and driving while intoxicated among other crimes. The figures spoke loudly about the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and more than 1.7 million [] from countries that DHS determined pose a national security threat to the U.S. There has been incredible progress in a little over a year under this administration despite serious resistance from local sanctuary governments that protect illegal immigrants, an increasingly powerful leftist movement, and its allies in the mainstream media. “While elected officials and media pundits across the country were zealously trying to manipulate the American public with fake news stories about ICE’s public safety mission, the brave men and women of ICE were quietly going about their business to arrest and remove more than 400 dangerous child predators from our local communities,” said the director of ICE’s Houston field office, Gabriel Martinez, this week. “Thanks to their tireless efforts, parents across Southeast Texas can sleep a little better tonight knowing that these pedophiles and child rapists are no longer a threat to their children.” The ICE Houston field office is responsible for immigration enforcement operations in 58 southeastern Texas counties situated in the state’s gulf coast from Beaumont to Corpus Christi and the Houston/Galveston area out to Waco. The busy ICE office reveals that this operation was a team effort assisted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), U.S. Marshals Service and Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA). Among the child sex offenders rounded up in Houston in the last year are Alex Samuel Lara Diaz, a 35-year-old previously deported Honduran wanted in his native country for homicide and convicted in the U.S. of aggravated sexual assault of a minor. Gabriel Julio Lopez-Velazquez, a 25-year-old Mexican who entered the U.S. illegally four times has been convicted of aggravated sexual assault of a minor, aggravated assault, and illegal entry and twice for felony illegal reentry. Another Mexican, 48-year-old Juan Leonardo Garcia Ibarra, illegally entered the U.S. a dozen times and has been convicted of sexual indecency with a child, aggravated assault, cruelty toward a child and driving under the influence. Milton Alexander Magana Fuentes, a 32-year-old from El Salvador, entered the U.S. illegally four times and has been convicted of sexual indecency with a minor and failure to register as a sex offender. Luis Mario Monsalve Chaux, a 52-year-old Colombian, has convictions for possession of child sexual abuse material, four burglaries, and twice for larceny. The list is extensive and includes mug shots of the perpetrators. body:
| Let me pull back the curtain.

**FIRST:** Trump’s handpicked lackey, Bruce Blakeman, announced his campaign for Governor to turn New York red.

**THEN:** Special interest billionaires met with Trump at the White House to scheme to take me down.

**NOW:** Blakeman launched $900,000 worth of attack ads against me — and I need your help fighting back.

[I’ll get right to it: We can’t let Blakeman’s attacks go unanswered. So, could you pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — between my campaign and Voter Protection Project before my critical End of Month Deadline to help me fight back, counter the special interest cash, and put an end to Republicans’ schemes? I’m counting on you more than you know.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107818?t=6&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_)

Here’s the deal:

**Bruce Blakeman, Donald Trump, and their MAGA donors are plotting to flip New York red and unravel all the progress we’ve made.**

I won’t let that happen — but I can’t fight back alone.

So I need you to make a critical choice:

We can either sit back, watch Bruce Blakeman and his MAGA donors flood this race with special interest cash, and put everything we’ve fought so hard for at risk...

...Or we can fight back with a surge of grassroots support, hand Trump and Blakeman an embarrassing loss, and keep Republican extremism out of New York once and for all. [So I’m humbly asking: Can I count on you to step up and rush in $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project before my End of Month Deadline? I need all hands on deck.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107818?t=7&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107819?t=8&akid=23861%2E878179%2EpHm3i_)

[**Can you donate $25, $100, or $500 now?**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=30ef4e7b3e&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=63842b928a&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | [VOLUNTEER](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=c066a9efc0&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [RSVP for May Volunteer Day on Saturday May 2nd!](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=2597a43d0e&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |

[**Volunteer in your area! Tables in Seattle, Renton, Kent, Federal Way and more!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=72d8aff2bc&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Our Kshama for Congress April Volunteer Day had more than double the turnout of our successful March one! Over 30 people came from all over the district! Some even came from further, including Olympia and Sammamish.
We had tables set up all across the Seattle area in Washington’s 9th Congressional District. This included the light rail stations at Judkins Park, Othello, and Columbia City, as well as a number of other locations. Some volunteers also went out to put up posters for our [May 9th Central District Town Hall at Casa Latina](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=e96092d583&e=bbdb764b3a), featuring the call to Fund Healthcare, Not War!
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=615d6c3444&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
We raised over $800 in small donations from working people, as well as getting over 150 signatures to get Kshama Sawant on the ballot. We’re getting close to the deadline for filing and making a final push to collect as many signatures as we can. Every signature gathered right now shows the overwhelming support there is for Kshama Sawant in this district. The vast majority of candidates don’t even think of collecting signatures to get on the ballot and instead pay the fee, but this campaign is different. Not only are we confident that working people support us, the opportunity to talk with thousands of them and get them engaged with this campaign is one we wouldn’t want to pass up!

We’ll be holding a rally and turning in the signatures at the Secretary of State’s Office in Olympia on May 4th at 8am. If you’re able to come, please [RSVP to attend](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=c3322709ea&e=bbdb764b3a) and join us!

As always, we found enormous support on Volunteer Day for Kshama’s record of winning historic victories for working people and our campaign’s demands for:
* Free Healthcare for All — Tax the Rich!
* End All Military Aid to Israel — End the Occupation of Palestine! No Weapons
or Tech for Genocide or Imperialist War!
* Stop the Deportations — Shut Down ICE and The Detention Centers!
* National Rent Control & Build Millions of Affordable Homes

---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=1d5bdb03a9&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
At Judkins Park we held a rally and canvassing training while snacks, water, and canvassing locations were distributed. In the over 10 months we’ve been campaigning, our volunteers have found that working people strongly support our demands and the historic track record of Kshama Sawant’s city council office. Working people are also horrified by Adam Smith’s horrendous votes for funding the genocide in Gaza, for the Iraq War, for creating ICE, and for massive cuts to Medicare and Medicaid. For many volunteers this was their first time canvassing for our campaign, or any campaign in general, but after a short training they soon found success!
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=5224f139d8&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
Towards the end of the day it felt like everyone in Columbia City and Judkins Park had already gotten a flyer in their hand. Working people in the neighborhoods were impressed at our ability to be at so many different locations at the same time. Even people driving by seeing our placards with demands like “Free Healthcare for All! Tax the Rich!” or “No War With Iran! Fund Healthcare Not War!” sometimes rolled down their windows to ask for a flyer or brochure.
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=317b93057f&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |
There were folks from all walks of life who came out to volunteer. Our current volunteers have become strong canvassers, and we’re gaining more fresh faces as the campaign heats up, but it’s going to take thousands of us canvassing to win this. In addition to canvassing face-to-face, we have people from all over the country phonebanking. There have even been a number of neighborhood tables outside of Washington state in places like Peoria, IL, New York City, and the Bay Area. No matter where you are, there are ways you can volunteer for this campaign. We have volunteers who are disabled, who have children at home, or who are just plain nervous to talk to people. Our experienced campaign organizers are able to help you out at whatever activity you sign up for. We have volunteer opportunities virtually every day, and you can [sign up here at any time!](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=05eb736fca&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
[|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=41db2b0d31&e=bbdb764b3a)
| | A huge thanks to everyone who made it out with us on April 18th! We have a historic opportunity to elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to Congress, let’s continue to fight to win this election!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=0e7aba9c08&e=bbdb764b3a)
| [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=4ff2cac9a4&e=bbdb764b3a)
| [|
---](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=322665533d&e=bbdb764b3a)
| |

[**We’ll be having our next volunteer day on Saturday May 2nd, starting at 11:00 am. Join us!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=32a9407049&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| |

**HELP ELECT KSHAMA SAWANT AS THE FIRST-EVER REVOLUTIONARY SOCIALIST TO THE U.S. CONGRESS!**
---
| |

[**Can you donate $25, $100, or $500 now?**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=37251d9348&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **Donate to elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to the U.S. Congress!**
Help build our independent movement to shut down ICE and stop the deportations, for a $25/hour minimum wage, to end U.S. military aid to Israel, for free healthcare for all by taxing the rich, for national rent control, and for a new party for the working class!
[**Donate $25, $100, or $500 now!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=b03db93bbb&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=1b7cba4f7b&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | **Volunteer to build our fighting grassroots campaign!**
We have a real shot to win this campaign, but the Democratic Party will fight tooth and nail to keep Kshama out of Congress because they know she is a real fighter for working people. We need everyone to get involved to get the word out in order to defeat them!
[**Sign up to volunteer with our campaign today!**](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=31f6aff0ed&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://kshamasawant.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ef0e21448b54140a81773aff&id=17d7c727a1&e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | In solidarity,Kshama for Congress
---

body:
This is my FINAL PLEA before the House GOP Member Roster goes live tomorrow.

| Dear Friend,
This is Mark with the House GOP Membership Office.
[I need you to know exactly what is about to happen:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2485qo2lo7is5vs4k0mb10517ljh3c3fmfcp6r0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7chi6co32cth2bs)
We are going live with our membership roster at [9:00 AM sharp tomorrow morning](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1om9v6rj1vhj21rab6t4k5m79t6rj5p9j9uvd98_rp22sh2s8i6epr7chi6co32cth2bs).
That means the window to make sure your name is included is almost closed.And I have to tell you -- [I want](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zheorau3r7lproi99qb45b0c09nnr7rr6dstgico_rp22sh2s8i6epr7chi6co32cth2bs) your name on that list.
With everything House GOP is up against this year, I do not want to see you miss recognition because your membership information wasn't updated in time.
This roster matters.
It will reflect who stood up.
Who stayed loyal.
Who was willing to take action while the Radical Left pushed impeachment, open borders, and a full-scale socialist agenda.
I'm asking you one more time:
Please make sure your name is on the list.
---
| [PLEASE RESPOND NOW
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zst0fc451rb60drosr7ehic8bgn8hmrr4acflmh8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7chi6co32cth2bs)
---
Thank you,
MarkNational House GOP Membership Office

# **[A Boy's Comic Reimagines Mom as Villain in Tender Tale](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Quick Smiles: Stacy Goulding was surprised to learn she was the antagonist in her 9-year-old son’s comic book, The Emerald Warrior. Her son created a character called “No Mom” after she couldn’t take him to a restaurant right after his birthday. Goulding said the playful story made her laugh and showed off her son’s creativity [...]

Republicans from across the state will meet to strategize, build, and unify behind our statewide candidates.Together, we can win in November. Get involved TODAY! Go to [wisgop.org/volunteer](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-y/).-Team WisGOP **" Deal With It": 3 Tax Cuts, All Vetoed** [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-j/) **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). Campaigns take money, and we need YOUR help to fund campaigns at every level. While Democrats rely on out-of-state billionaires, Republicans are dedicated to the grassroots and the State of Wisconsin. Help us show Democrats that Republicans are the party Wisconsin voters trust by donating TODAY! [DONATE TODAY!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ahtmky-didthutlhu-d/)

name: Jamie Davis
subject: This isn’t the first time they denied a Black man his elected seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jamie Davis for U
body:
And it won’t be the last time either
| | | | | [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qvDZyqg2mR4XzSEbhLDvGFbp6_hmHVefpsU7auKIHAKXbZgwH5Y_qiiTu2YDYlezsOhvrAPrH76C1YpXtmSUvQ78JSonBiKcbajc8YS7_66fZvhujNYnGvbsrrzeRmNw4Ru3JXdcjb7pCKKlI5d4cL84UUuws0LwvnV_Bl5_e6LgtbQ2xV5DLsOH_zdtwapaPk4czZ_wjmH4x5jpOo36i-E8fXE586sR&c=3mGihSGEJpsz1C5swHnKaVOlQWbEwzwVyXwOV1jAOP16zrv4ACVDRg==&ch=00WU1JDTBimfEqEUGfO37ZaE4rgzK8FZxfutigWMIM4r-mo4Kw_rTQ==)
---
Peter, Something historic happened in New Orleans last fall: a wrongfully incarcerated man won the Criminal Clerk seat in New Orleans with 68% of the vote.
That man is Calvin Duncan. He was charged as a teenager for a crime he did not commit and escaped death row at Louisiana's notorious Angola prison by being his own jailhouse lawyer. He fought for his exoneration, became a lawyer, and ran for Criminal Clerk of Court in New Orleans, winning with 38,000 people standing behind him.
After this landmark victory, history started to repeat itself in Louisiana. Republicans began plotting to ensure Calvin Duncan would never get sworn in.
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qvDZyqg2mR4XzSEbhLDvGFbp6_hmHVefpsU7auKIHAKXbZgwH5Y_qiiTu2YDYlezsOhvrAPrH76C1YpXtmSUvQ78JSonBiKcbajc8YS7_66fZvhujNYnGvbsrrzeRmNw4Ru3JXdcjb7pCKKlI5d4cL84UUuws0LwvnV_Bl5_e6LgtbQ2xV5DLsOH_zdtwapaPk4czZ_wjmG2jSAacpSUJ4k5LIqxwYpj&c=3mGihSGEJpsz1C5swHnKaVOlQWbEwzwVyXwOV1jAOP16zrv4ACVDRg==&ch=00WU1JDTBimfEqEUGfO37ZaE4rgzK8FZxfutigWMIM4r-mo4Kw_rTQ==)
---
Sadly, this is the norm in Louisiana history -- duly elected black men being denied their rightfully won seats by racist lawmakers.
Look no further than the story of P.B.S. Pinchback, an emancipated black man who, during Reconstruction, helped draft the Louisiana Constitution, served as the Louisiana Senate Pro Tempore, and, when the Lieutenant Governor died, he took his seat; when the Governor was impeached, he became the first black Governor in United States history.
But, like Calvin Duncan, P.B.S. Pinchback was a threat to the status quo, and when he was sent to serve in the United States Senate, they refused to swear him in and seat him.
My name is Jamie Davis, I'm the Democrat running for US Senate in Louisiana. I'm a black farmer, and today I farm the same Louisiana delta soil that my ancestors worked as slaves and sharecroppers, but now I own the land and am farming over 3000 acres.
The same things they did to P.B.S and Calvin are about to happen to me.
MAGA just announced they will purge 500,000+ voters from the rolls in Louisiana and are about to sign into law a bill that would refuse poor voters without IDs the ability to sign affidavits at the polls, allowing them to vote. They know the blue wave is coming to Louisiana and they are doing everything to ensure I don't flip our US Senate Seat in November.
History has the answer to what is happening here, because there are forces in Louisiana that want to see history repeat itself, and there are people in Louisiana working to make history: people like Calvin, people like me.
And there are people like you who know that justice will triumph as long as we continue to stand with each other. [If you want to stand with us in making history as Louisiana works to elect the first black man to a statewide position since Pinchback, please rush a donation of $25, $10, or even just $5.](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qvDZyqg2mR4XzSEbhLDvGFbp6_hmHVefpsU7auKIHAKXbZgwH5Y_qiiTu2YDYlezzdoU3PtOZiqy6X4TiuWGaLDB0_J4Sof5BegfD0kGRBgj2bbFRBq4Ql5t1_J7cK2Jl9umKfWEexwZHt6pSpj8tCI6L66h8FBtRNbBQu6r9Nsk6P0bdyd1kGhipbjJFXMKe3o3_3C-Ws5rdM4PNu1aIr1o8PHiMkGBlR2ni6jLL0k=&c=3mGihSGEJpsz1C5swHnKaVOlQWbEwzwVyXwOV1jAOP16zrv4ACVDRg==&ch=00WU1JDTBimfEqEUGfO37ZaE4rgzK8FZxfutigWMIM4r-mo4Kw_rTQ==)
---

clean_body: And it won’t be the last time either | | | | | == Peter, Something historic happened in New Orleans last fall: a wrongfully incarcerated man won the Criminal Clerk seat in New Orleans with 68% of the vote. That man is Calvin Duncan. He was charged as a teenager for a crime he did not commit and escaped death row at Louisiana's notorious Angola prison by being his own jailhouse lawyer. He fought for his exoneration, became a lawyer, and ran for Criminal Clerk of Court in New Orleans, winning with 38,000 people standing behind him. After this landmark victory, history started to repeat itself in Louisiana. Republicans began plotting to ensure Calvin Duncan would never get sworn in. | == Sadly, this is the norm in Louisiana history -- duly elected black men being denied their rightfully won seats by racist lawmakers. Look no further than the story of P.B.S. Pinchback, an emancipated black man who, during Reconstruction, helped draft the Louisiana Constitution, served as the Louisiana Senate Pro Tempore, and, when the Lieutenant Governor died, he took his seat; when the Governor was impeached, he became the first black Governor in United States history. But, like Calvin Duncan, P.B.S. Pinchback was a threat to the status quo, and when he was sent to serve in the United States Senate, they refused to swear him in and seat him. My name is Jamie Davis, I'm the Democrat running for US Senate in Louisiana. I'm a black farmer, and today I farm the same Louisiana delta soil that my ancestors worked as slaves and sharecroppers, but now I own the land and am farming over 3000 acres. The same things they did to P.B.S and Calvin are about to happen to me. MAGA just announced they will purge 500,000+ voters from the rolls in Louisiana and are about to sign into law a bill that would refuse poor voters without IDs the ability to sign affidavits at the polls, allowing them to vote. They know the blue wave is coming to Louisiana and they are doing everything to ensure I don't flip our US Senate Seat in November. History has the answer to what is happening here, because there are forces in Louisiana that want to see history repeat itself, and there are people in Louisiana working to make history: people like Calvin, people like me. And there are people like you who know that justice will triumph as long as we continue to stand with each other. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Let's break the vicious cycle. Winning this seat and electing Louisiana's first black statewide elected official is the first step. Thanks for standing with us. Jamie Davis Democrat for Senate Louisiana | | == | | | == | | == | == == == == Mail checks to: Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate PO Box 55 Ferriday, LA 71334 | Paid for by Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate | | | | Jamie for Louisiana | PO Box 55 | Ferriday, LA 71334 US |

body:
I hate these emails, but I had to reach out...

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-xYcBw)☀️ Good morning! ☀️
I'm Jen Kiggans, the Navy veteran running to stop DC liberals from destroying our country.
I'm not just a former Navy helicopter pilot, though. I'm married to a Retired Navy pilot, and now, I'm a Navy Mom, too. Service to America has defined my life.
Here's why I'm emailing you, though:
**One of my Democrat opponents just broke a record for his MASSIVE fundraising haul, and frankly, this will put my campaign in a tailspin if we don 't recover!**
I'm not being dramatic when I say that we're at a fork in the road, and you can help decide which way we go:
**1\. You can ignore this email because you think I 'm being alarmist. ****2. You can be the conservative I need right now:**[SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)If you're waiting until later this year to jump into this fight, it may be too late, Peter! Democrats aren't waiting, so I can't afford to sit on the sidelines.
**I hate political emails. Trust me, I do. Ask anyone on my team. **
But I can't afford NOT to email you. The consequences for the country are just too great.
Your donation today will put my ads on the air and keep us competitive with my well-funded liberal opponents.[SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)If you can't afford to donate today, please just keep me and our country in your prayers...!
Thank you,
Jen Kiggans[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-XOIY5mksWqoNruCQ)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._202CfDpQ)| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress

## Virginia Redistricting Update
---
| |
---
The American people want a representative who works hard, shares their values, works across the aisle, and gets things done for their constituents. By the grace of God, we've been able to help a lot of people. As a Navy SEAL veteran, serving in Congress is how I continue service to our great nation. When I was in the General Assembly, my team and I were able to pass bills every year where every Democrat and every Republican voted yes. At the same time, I received the highest award for conservatism. One of my favorite bills my team and I passed in the General Assembly continues to save lives by allowing school nurses in elementary, middle, and high schools to store and administer naloxone to prevent death by overdose.
Fast forward to my time in Congress, today, I received the highest award for conservatism in Congress. My team and I have been serving together for 16 months, solving problems, helping people get home from dangerous countries overseas, and getting things accomplished in the district for the people we represent. Most recently, we passed two bills in the span of three weeks. One of those bills was the Wintergreen Emergency Egress Act. This was a 25-year problem the last six congressmen tried to solve, but were unable to get across the finish line. My incredible team and I found out about this issue and by working across the aisle got this bill passed in the House in just six months.
I was elected to represent everyone in Virginia's Fifth Congressional District, and Tuesday's election does not change that.
Thank you to all the volunteers and everyone else who put in countless hours putting up signs, making phone calls, and more to help us get out the NO vote.
We expect the Virginia Supreme Court to do its constitutional duty and uphold the lower court ruling on the redistricting referendum as unconstitutional and illegal. Until then, I will continue to campaign and represent the amazing people of the current Fifth District where my incredible team and I so far have helped return over eight million dollars back in to their pockets owed to them by the IRS, Social Security, Veterans Administration, and more. It is an honor to serve you and your family. God bless America, and God bless our great Commonwealth.
---

| The Bait And Switch Governor
---
| |
---
| Why do you think Governor Spanberger has the worst approval rating of any Virginia governor?
She said she was a moderate. She lied about redistricting. She lied about making Virginia more affordable. She lied about eliminating the car tax. She lied about standing up to unions. She lied about not coming after gun owners.
Democrats in Richmond proposed over 50 new taxes and voted to give themselves a 300 % pay raise. I guess she ran on affordability for them not you.
Policies like boys in girls bathrooms, divisive and marxist DEI, expensive green energy, and more make life more difficult and less affordable. Do you think our governor is trying to out California California?

Affordability

During the four years of the Democrat Biden Open Border Policies, we estimate 15 to 20 million illegal criminal aliens crossed our border illegally. The cartels have been having their way with innocent American Citizens. In addition to robbing, raping, and murdering our fellow Americans like Laken Riley, the sheer number of illegals has also overwhelmed our resources and increased the cost of living for all of us. Thank God President Trump, Tom Homan, and others are putting Americans first and doing something about it.
Why have home prices gone up? Illegals. Why has my car insurance gone up? Illegals. Why has my home insurance gone up? Illegals. Why have my food prices gone up? Illegals. Why hasn't my salary gone up? Illegals. Get it yet?

| Vote Ramona Christian Next VA-05 Committee Chair
---
| |
---
| Ramona Christian holds a degree in political science and has been a steadfast leader in the conservative movement. She served on Donald Trump's platform team, was one of just three Fifth District delegates selected to represent President Trump at the Republican National Convention, and she played a key role on the Trump Virginia campaign team, helping organize Trump rallies across the Commonwealth last year. She also serves as Political Director for Congressman John McGuire and she currently serves as the Buckingham County GOP Chair.
Ramona is a no-nonsense leader, a trusted friend, and someone who absolutely will bring people together and get things done. She has my complete and total endorsement for Virginia's 5th Congressional District Committee Chair. To learn more including how to vote for her and to join her team, email Ramona at ramonachristian862@gmail.com

clean_body: | | | | == == | Virginia Redistricting Update | | The American people want a representative who works hard, shares their values, works across the aisle, and gets things done for their constituents. By the grace of God, we've been able to help a lot of people. As a Navy SEAL veteran, serving in Congress is how I continue service to our great nation. When I was in the General Assembly, my team and I were able to pass bills every year where every Democrat and every Republican voted yes. At the same time, I received the highest award for conservatism. One of my favorite bills my team and I passed in the General Assembly continues to save lives by allowing school nurses in elementary, middle, and high schools to store and administer naloxone to prevent death by overdose. Fast forward to my time in Congress, today, I received the highest award for conservatism in Congress. My team and I have been serving together for 16 months, solving problems, helping people get home from dangerous countries overseas, and getting things accomplished in the district for the people we represent. Most recently, we passed two bills in the span of three weeks. One of those bills was the Wintergreen Emergency Egress Act. This was a 25-year problem the last six congressmen tried to solve, but were unable to get across the finish line. My incredible team and I found out about this issue and by working across the aisle got this bill passed in the House in just six months. I was elected to represent everyone in Virginia's Fifth Congressional District, and Tuesday's election does not change that. Thank you to all the volunteers and everyone else who put in countless hours putting up signs, making phone calls, and more to help us get out the NO vote. We expect the Virginia Supreme Court to do its constitutional duty and uphold the lower court ruling on the redistricting referendum as unconstitutional and illegal. Until then, I will continue to campaign and represent the amazing people of the current Fifth District where my incredible team and I so far have helped return over eight million dollars back in to their pockets owed to them by the IRS, Social Security, Veterans Administration, and more. It is an honor to serve you and your family. God bless America, and God bless our great Commonwealth. | Endorsements: | Navy SEAL Brother Jason Redman Endorsement | | | It is an honor to be endorsed by warrior and Navy SEAL brother Jason Redman. Jason is all grit and never backs down, even when he was shot serving our nation. My Brother and Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney | I'm deeply honored to have the endorsement of sheriffs and prosecutors who work every day to keep our communities safe. It means even more when that support comes from family. Thank you to my brother, Louisa County Commonwealth's Attorney and Brigadier General Rusty McGuire, for the endorsement and unwavering support of my office. Hanover County Commonwealth Attorney | Mackenzie is doing a great job ensuring justice is served in Hanover County. Thank you for the endorsement! Appomattox County Commonwealth Attorney | | | Thank you, Leslie, for all you are doing for the great folks in Appomattox County. | Nelson County Commonwealth Attorney | | | I appreciate the endorsement, Daniel! Thanks for all you do for the good people of Nelson County. Pittsylvania County Sheriff Endorsement | | Thank you for your support, Sheriff Taylor. You're doing a great job protecting the people of Pittsylvania County. | Goochland County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Creasey, for how hard you work to keep Goochland County safe. Your efforts do not go unnoticed. Mecklenburg County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you for the endorsement Sheriff Hawkins! You are doing an incredible job protecting the good people of Mecklenburg County. Buckingham County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Kidd, for keeping Buckingham County safe and for the endorsement! Chesterfield County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Leonard for protecting the great people of Chesterfield County, and for the endorsement. Charlotte County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Grissom, for your support. Fluvanna County Sheriff Endorsement | While I work for you in the Fifth District and in D.C., our incredible Sheriffs are keeping our communities safe. It is an honor to have their endorsement. Thank you, Sheriff Hess for your support. Lynchburg City Commonwealth Attorney | It is an honor to receive an endorsement from someone so respected in the Lynchburg community. Thank you, Bethany! Lynchburg City Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Sloan, for keeping Lynchburg safe and helping us spread the word to vote NO. I appreciate the endorsement and your help in defeating the referendum. Appomattox County Sheriff Endorsement | Thank you, Sheriff Richardson, for the endorsement and everything you do to protect your community. I promise to keep working for you and the people of the Fifth District when re-elected. Louisa County Sheriff Endorsement | | Thank you, Sheriff Lowe, for keeping everyone in Louisa County safe. | Campbell County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Thank you, Campbell County Sheriff Clark, for your unwavering support and friendship. | Amherst County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Sheriff Ayers is doing an incredible job protecting the people of Amherst County. Thank you for your hard work and the endorsement. | Amelia County Sheriff Endorsement | | | Thank you, Sheriff Walker, for everything you are doing to protect people in Amelia County. | The Bait And Switch Governor | | | Why do you think Governor Spanberger has the worst approval rating of any Virginia governor? She said she was a moderate. She lied about redistricting. She lied about making Virginia more affordable. She lied about eliminating the car tax. She lied about standing up to unions. She lied about not coming after gun owners. Democrats in Richmond proposed over 50 new taxes and voted to give themselves a 300 % pay raise. I guess she ran on affordability for them not you. Policies like boys in girls bathrooms, divisive and marxist DEI, expensive green energy, and more make life more difficult and less affordable. Do you think our governor is trying to out California California? Affordability | During the four years of the Democrat Biden Open Border Policies, we estimate 15 to 20 million illegal criminal aliens crossed our border illegally. The cartels have been having their way with innocent American Citizens. In addition to robbing, raping, and murdering our fellow Americans like Laken Riley, the sheer number of illegals has also overwhelmed our resources and increased the cost of living for all of us. Thank God President Trump, Tom Homan, and others are putting Americans first and doing something about it. Why have home prices gone up? Illegals. Why has my car insurance gone up? Illegals. Why has my home insurance gone up? Illegals. Why have my food prices gone up? Illegals. Why hasn't my salary gone up? Illegals. Get it yet? | Vote Ramona Christian Next VA-05 Committee Chair | | | Ramona Christian holds a degree in political science and has been a steadfast leader in the conservative movement. She served on Donald Trump's platform team, was one of just three Fifth District delegates selected to represent President Trump at the Republican National Convention, and she played a key role on the Trump Virginia campaign team, helping organize Trump rallies across the Commonwealth last year. She also serves as Political Director for Congressman John McGuire and she currently serves as the Buckingham County GOP Chair. Ramona is a no-nonsense leader, a trusted friend, and someone who absolutely will bring people together and get things done. She has my complete and total endorsement for Virginia's 5th Congressional District Committee Chair. To learn more including how to vote for her and to join her team, email Ramona at ramonachristian862@gmail.com | I Love CVille Podcast | I Love CVille with Jerry Miller. Thank you for having me on your show. We've received a lot of great feedback! == | If you want to join Team McGuire and help us help Trump Save America, please contact Ramona Christian at ramona@mcguireva.com or call her at 434 391 4546. Take care, please tell a friend to vote NO to unfair maps, and we look forward to seeing you around the district. == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. body:

# Saturday, April 25, 2026
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1901, New York passed a state law requiring the initials of a car's owner to be posted on the back of the vehicle. These were America's first license plates, largely homemade. ([See Photo](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb_G7sYCjLFfQZHG3Uub0uLBsCaLmQ3MruW_jzZKviDd1dXV1dH58bl9upRTuX13B1qOtBU8W0ZmrFtjqkfjmu7YGlHB2uKzXne_KaEMCA1q2oJL-dp0H2xEVDj2aOU8z1JKM5l-t4uKIX4tUiupvB61jHI2zsx-QbOMYeyTfb8JrSYpxDxOw0cw0Ws3fShh1LT4TgsMiakOPykV3jHmi15YB09Hn-3O_OjGb51aO7We5zlQDuVietb2XnRqpQK8pwbBXZAKUA5Q8ISL6r1T678IjR0jfKGnAxvEVBv_7Zig4q9nqgg5eSwN4ZEdYwMq4F1tfbXhcaacUzNzp8XtcCn_4eP_kvqy6ncAAAD__-jQj4g))

If you grew up digging through a box of cereal for a hidden prize, you'll want to check out today's _Et Cetera_ section. [Kellogg's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ8Gb0Rw-UsGhnbwli4dOloYrh1qbCIgSf32lfsKXc-Rjs73fV2Hq4spbvOHW9G2KQ8bvmrC1rAMteWy1lbigrXmvGGp06Psix-AgaZMUlBDcDHtg-yCnRABRYeWG2M451rp7mZHp0bH4TxyJbiXwQkW1MXws5YG3ai7aI81JkFxxoxQp0vQk5dOXYBpUGdPJMMQWy6n7xy3dsMp7fmJ5eTz2iV7a-1eiXgj0BPo3egPgqMj0L8_atywVgL9Kxb8bLnsBPoFU8rzTO-P1uI205b3SkfnF-qxoEt0zD9Yj5geDnbKBQiQBkRXbLi_YkqxakMkm1cX09-R9i97Twu_AQAA___3M4WD) is bringing back its in-box toy promotion for the first time in years. What was your favorite cereal box prize growing up? Reply to this email and let us know. Would you believe the firing squad is making a comeback in 2026? The Justice Department just made a major move to reshape the death penalty while also reversing the Biden administration's freeze on federal executions. When was the last time a firing squad was actually used in the U.S.? How soon could this new policy be put into place? And who could it apply to? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Amy Hess answers all your questions and breaks down the latest on this developing story. [Tune in here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uKyEUQOHVQOfR5fJnFxSvcefXpkQELjYxM1hA7Mzuo2QLWcA50vd28ZdQatmu_8NKbubmN3qNSnNS92O2vo7Zy53GaG2jPvJn3-_RI6A5gDqg9imUunvFk8tESJKTE9ZaIYTRht8cBgUyWJMtKElZ0JFyOgYAaSRFHXlxPzdQqAWAlXo5JZOjCvqEYFAfI1NAqczWl49WtnmjXPf2pL7EtvLqbnM-BpP_GJ4Znju997Clpe4Mz4-W6Gv2IHh36fEqtZZhLFNwXUOpv_38E_rp8DsAAP__wXFr6A)!

Today's sponsor, [Mode Mobile](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO2zAQBk9DdRb4EmUVLAII7v60KQlKXNob8yGQlA3l9IESOBdIOzsYLL4fX-bLYsB0_24j6OazSfCuAVqDYmrLJdZW8Am15pygVL-X47kaTrm6UHnhg3EWw2Fk57QH4CA60GwcR8aYGlT30J4KPzC2TPa6wNXJdRSTlJNwnjKrpqVDfdao5AOjdBRDPznlV2mHiVPFh-tKJAWHLZf-Z8bUHuDDkV9Q-jXHLuhHa1sl4hvhN8JvmF5QWx-zg5gXDHBaRNz2Fk3Ne1mBiNlnyhQjXJ10tXGzeE9EzAkopR8eweEeiZi3gtGW46Pn1CA1ImaLxhdIv85LSzZC_Ze-_C11RbvtjSFgVSOR9B4thj9vt__a-qX57wAAAP__SOiT0w), is turning everyday smartphone usage into a new income stream while giving users a stake in the rapidly growing data economy behind today's AI boom.

## Tornado Tears through Oklahoma
A [confirmed EF-4 tornado](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCB7sU0oXPwNXf72SrTB6-CLYSPbCcrbn7hXuG6kkWb0fV_X-Yoxxf3-HzdyNfC801ES1Up5LpXzVmqODyqFeadcwit_HssMEmwrdQtm9hjTZ9aNd4EIqG_IqWEYlFLW2GZ1ftQyGKSb7EcNN8JeXrRCBSagxME20Z1rUoNRUg696UZvw6LRjCAtmMsitCQfK-fum-NeVwrpw2_K3cJbk9xa67OI_p-AScB0HEe33MpJcfYCpjMKmCrnHT23mTGXtq6ZX_e1fWKupeXQ8iPhyhsKmJrs_POIKcViB6HlfcOYfs_qnwy9HfwEAAD__yzYfFk) tore through Enid, Oklahoma, on Thursday night, destroying homes and forcing Vance Air Force Base to close. The twister hit the city of about 50,000 just before 9 p.m. local time, leveling homes in the Gray Ridge neighborhood and trapping residents under debris. At least 40 homes were damaged, and first responders conducted door-to-door searches through the night. [See photos and videos of the storm here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp_G3rAAY5MMDF28pWtHi-BLTANcC27i-O2r_rxB10-fjo7Ox2W-2BBDvr3bBIY8zhn2GoEIylwJS6pUwh1qRcxQqn-U4-5myeXIuGJymBcb4jGrdjEeQELfghFaayHEOIztahQHpbT2SggtBtVf3Yk7569Kgz73174N5pvGlRwE57ofuvMyeqfscJZ8lMPJNYrDEghL94kh0wo-HviE0jlMbTQr0Vab_q2RUyOnfd87j68dLK2_l0ZO8KICCdjf2siJsGS7ICthq4zWgo_byvAe7YrJMocpPXKgg_lQKrECdcO8QKnMOgqY22KWbQ8xhjrqRvFbsiH--NC_Ij6N_AoAAP__t02K1g). Enid's mayor said 10 to 15 people suffered injuries, but remarkably, no fatalities have been reported.
