## Soldier Bet on Secret Raid, Won $400K
A U.S. Special Forces [master sergeant was arrested](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCnwR0WPuYnLihu4y633dIicIhJwERAYnmffuV9he1GGukbab6uy9WEGLb7f5NQN5-XDfcasTUsS225pNpKeGKtOW9Yqn-X42kXYCAp4xTE4kyIx8I7pz0i4NihHpRSwzBIIbtVO2tRoh_BM88dOgtOSD6Zi5JyuinWBX1qjIMYGFOj6CcnveVGTMAkiIslnKELLZf-kcPWVvTxyB8svc2pi3pt7VXJ-I_ATGDe9723282eJYH5pAnMjJ95JDC7_KA1Rxew0FeORzLliY3esFX6wQ2_3xgNTca9S-7XlmJXtHvtIcZQpSKc3ZMJ8Xe6_emvj4afAAAA__9_D4AX) Thursday for allegedly using classified intelligence about the capture mission of Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro to win more than $400,000 on prediction market Polymarket. Gannon Ken Van Dyke, 38, helped plan [Operation Absolute Resolve](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSgyAUAL8GOxxA0VhQXGOXa690EB76EhQHnnHy9zeXX7h2i52d_blPd4sR9-XbbmAopGmHq0QggjwVSnkrlPEJpaS0Qy7hzO-nm5RQHRctV3ryFuN7aitvAoCCpgIj-76XUna6q1Yzz3JQdtZyFm6-Wd9rrTV0vXcCVDPICs2fTbRKSyH6RteD74JrrR6U6JS-OdYK8Egp14-EO60Q4ju9INcubVU0K9FRWPPF1MjUeF1X_TgLoYN6SS-mxnRYpsYjMzWehZcUPULmbrV5Ac_PgvvCXbSlYEDwHPeQ8mYJ086PnAISPzJ4dB-y2fwE4jNQqbLxx4UxYul61oplsxg_TfSvkS-jfgMAAP__3ImL0g) and signed nondisclosure agreements before creating a Polymarket account and placing 13 bets totaling $33,000 in the days before the January raid on Caracas. Van Dyke then tried to cover his tracks, [moving his winnings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdLMygw2PwsUqEd2L0qVExh5gssZ-ss2i_ftok09Ic5srXd1zfn3On5YDx-2HPcjUNc2RrhKoVspzqSkfpWZ-UCkpRcplPfPr4WaU2INUgHr2lsNrVo03KxFS15Bph2Fo27bXfbObwWr1YfXg1bKMfeedl9YqtyhaOmxH3bB5r0mFupVy6PRt9P3qlNUjyh71hxNKkuea8u134lh3WsMrPSnfXDqaYPZav4ro7gIngdN1XbejxHcncKIIZxE4vaEETue_gJKCZ8rgdps38nBx3eEsHDdwwZbCK5MHjpUC1AQXR1BSPiBFOKw_c4Js2QMX8CcBR3DpzFXgZDPc79h-__bTN9n4r4tD4NIPQsntsBz-Xq7_5flp8E8AAAD__-R6k94) to a foreign cryptocurrency vault and asking Polymarket to delete his account. He faces up to 20 years in prison on the top charge of wire fraud.

The twister hit the city of about 50,000 just before 9 p.m. local time, leveling homes in the Gray Ridge neighborhood and trapping residents under debris. At least 40 homes were damaged, and first responders conducted door-to-door searches through the night. . Enid's mayor said 10 to 15 people suffered injuries, but remarkably, no fatalities have been reported. Vance, the Air Force's , remained without power and water Friday morning. Gannon Ken Van Dyke, 38, helped plan and signed nondisclosure agreements before creating a Polymarket account and placing 13 bets totaling $33,000 in the days before the January raid on Caracas. Van Dyke then tried to cover his tracks, to a foreign cryptocurrency vault and asking Polymarket to delete his account. He faces up to 20 years in prison on the top charge of wire fraud. We helped retain three justices in Pennsylvania. We just secured Wisconsin's Supreme Court through 2030. These wins matter because when MAGA's schemes land in court, these are the judges who stand between them and the ballot box. We will stand with Michigan. But right now, Georgia needs us. And the stakes couldn't be higher: | == Georgia has been ground zero for MAGA election rigging since 2020. Fake electors. Pressure campaigns. Threats against election workers. It's preparation for the next election rigging fight. The Georgia Supreme Court will decide who wins that fight. Right now, the court is controlled by MAGA. We have one chance to change that on May 19th. Win, and Democrats can flip the court just months before the 2028 presidential election. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

There’s literally thousands of houses investors earn monthly income from... | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Tax Lien List | Have you checked out the from your state? subject: Camp Mystic May Lose License, 277 ICE Arrests, and a Coffee-Loving Kangaroo
body:
Texas health officials formally notified Camp Mystic on Friday that the Hill Country girls camp may not receive a license to operate this summer, nine months after Guadalupe River flooding killed 27.

# Saturday, April 25, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1838, the United States and the Republic of Texas signed the [Convention of Limits](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQxvGnwU4DI4IUFLex29ue0owyriQoG5ms69ufuK9wqn_1_Yrv5zE-MKa4P__jRp4_Sx53OksiZjrGGbfXdhWO84ZXyoVSnGkvBCNIMLXUNXRjwJiuUVfBTzI4VZFX1lqltHOyWr01hF1v9LQ4HZSZLRm03WxQaegxTFX0NyY1dErJVvaNlW3fW2rBObnQ4oSWFCLno-GVmD5YlnTlNx3NnLcq-ZX5VUT7T8AgYDjPs-GyYt5T3KnJx1PA8F3VAa96uu4IGGjn464xsjp8eJ0xpViMFVo-N4zpi_PfLnl7-A0AAP__eX51SQ), establishing the western bank of the Sabine River as the eastern boundary of Texas and recognizing the Republic's claims to disputed territory in Red River County. Would you believe the firing squad is making a comeback in 2026? The Justice Department just made a major move to reshape the death penalty while also reversing the Biden administration's freeze on federal executions. When was the last time a firing squad was actually used in the U.S.? How soon could this new policy be put into place? And who could it apply to? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Amy Hess answers all your questions and breaks down the latest on this developing story. [Tune in here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzuO6yAYQOHVQBeLN6GguE263HZKxON3jATGApTYux_NbGEWcI70fT3d0-eS99d_X8HOc21uh88oMCd0F3096jVmjtVfpQ0oOcI-gDlGmLoRcWPSJZ_L5QRONpBkKAZLtdaUCmMI3qyhQcZgUlJCAQ9SSR4T8yqFKKQUCmf7MyOCSUoJJ_dFE36_a-DMGLLCapAgkPJsfZkbTDj9WMvV3tCX2CoudpvzGIj_Q-yB2KND6H5PS7kQexwtwTm7p7jbdHxyKXkojQR5VZ_Lbz__pn5b9h0AAP__34drgg)! Today's sponsor is [American Veterans Center](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O3CAQh58Gd7vCYBsoKCKtXOXSRqnQHIxtFP5sAPvObx_5cmW6a-c3842-mZ8v5gV88Gn9ARF1e1-ySfhWA7aGxViIz3jW5m2EM-SKwVtMFZlhlE03OtzYaBz4cJqhc_qVOtV3qHshRN8PStFu0-MkHJNSjcKKYVqofeUomByVlYoqOXZeXzA6sLHvKafyLiiXUiBnStEFF0UGis63XO5tw4bvUJdw5gPL3ebYBb219qyEfyNsJmyuaPeCd0jocrs6CJshYvEW0u3AhgVSvVlMDcsVHfZDxqxQThMx5uIhED7XvBeLxmaHhD_m77-U4ooRNu0tmojO75HwB0bw4bP4b4LwxwbFQf1twP75jK5Dgl8T4Y__L-yKds83H4KvkyADXS_uh1_72lcOzf4GAAD__ztYozg). They're reminding us that Memorial Day is a time to pause and reflect on the sacrifices made by those who served our country. This year carries even more significance as America approaches its 250th birthday. [The American Veterans Center](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O3CAQh58Gd7vCYBsoKCKtXOXSRqnQHIxtFP5sAPvObx_5cmW6a-c3842-mZ8v5gV88Gn9ARF1e1-ySfhWA7aGxViIz3jW5m2EM-SKwVtMFZlhlE03OtzYaBz4cJqhc_qVOtV3qHshRN8PStFu0-MkHJNSjcKKYVqofeUomByVlYoqOXZeXzA6sLHvKafyLiiXUiBnStEFF0UGis63XO5tw4bvUJdw5gPL3ebYBb219qyEfyNsJmyuaPeCd0jocrs6CJshYvEW0u3AhgVSvVlMDcsVHfZDxqxQThMx5uIhED7XvBeLxmaHhD_m77-U4ooRNu0tmojO75HwB0bw4bP4b4LwxwbFQf1twP75jK5Dgl8T4Y__L-yKds83H4KvkyADXS_uh1_72lcOzf4GAAD__ztYozg) is leading one of the most meaningful ways to honor that legacy.

## Camp Mystic May Lose License to Reopen
Texas health officials formally notified Camp Mystic on Friday that the Hill Country girls camp may not receive a license to operate this summer, nine months after Guadalupe River flooding killed 27. The Department of State Health Services sent [an 11-page letter](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ_GdEb2YjAULr6G7r42JTKw3K3iP8h2juPtIy7KE6TaYmdG85uP23Sz5Cjc_1uPpry2OAU8ssNSME2L9bs_c6HF29PFjI4WDBlhAgEdF4pDO62W3DmpajWzWAdZoZFaaynVMIjqYfrZdrJB3fU9WDX3MwhspbZKDaqzrajIXGFCQSulaERfa9H0vcYGhkFsuA1MCVypxFSXBxZ82by5Mz4x1Uv0lTOPUvbMmn8MRgbjcRz158uG68lgvGgYjG_b7-UhFtoIM78A-Q8hj0fAlHncuP9yhXaHfMWNFsKwXFoKnErme4p7zLhy9JjuGJaT784GBmOVzLof5BzlTjMl7t6Se3csf1v2aeA7AAD__-OmkDI) citing multiple deficiencies in the camp's proposed emergency plan and finding it out of compliance with state safety requirements. The agency has reviewed hundreds of complaints about the camp's response on July 4, and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has [pressed the agency](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngQ60Xi8xLlxcQ5drr0QGr4MlG3K2L4S3PyWv8PffzEjz5z7fbYhhf_y2iU19-2Pe-SyRa-U8rzY901VqWJO94lE4hpX3wjgj4K0D6nCYnQ3xmql1ZgGnRctGKKWEIK2h3QzLReLAIAfPN2KyBAMsnlggK82uDeZTBoSDECBh7BXIcVQsUWvw7HVDwC7UI_d148pvW3y8jhfnfj1SG81W67M08leDU4PTeZ4ft_JeOZe__2zmj2tw-kYbnGyuYY08K0QiZ7FDz76jAdZuUQK7ERCBUGpJut9qim027nmGGEO5qYbgkWyI3_H6s8teBv8HAAD__42UfaE) to withhold the permit until legislative and criminal investigations conclude. Texas Rangers are probing neglect allegations, and a court injunction prevents the camp from demolishing flood-damaged cabins while the family of 8-year-old Cecilia "Cile" Steward, whose body has not been found, continues [fighting in court](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO6yAQRb8Gd1gw4GAKite4y2u3tDAMCVqwI8Pa8d-vnOQPtrwzoyOduV_X8WpjivPtv81o6jMs44x7SVgrrqOz-ZGPUqPL9khLwRQdzgVhBAYXyiSFbvQ2pmOUjTcT85o3aLhSinOpNWvuRgjkQUyT4EFxJZzqXIdCu15OTsuJN9GcMCah45wJ1reKib5XKEBrFjBoIhn6WJe1rXes-LQlpGPZcG3dkptk7rU-ChH_CAwEhn3f2-_tB88lgcGuNbqEBIbTi8BQqq1nfIHoZ_gOIS2LJzCc2vTtTbfoasyFBptjiljobudK3_ce5-Mk0M9bCAxw0VSIHl2nPPXKMSqd5bQHLmkIyjqUYepgalbjH3tMKZaLIpLdso3p5VP_1sJm4DcAAP__Uy6b2w).
## ICE Arrests 277 with Criminal Background
ICE's Enforcement and Removal Operations division in Houston arrested [277 illegal immigrants](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u5SAQhZ_G7rjCAzF2QbGNu2y7pYVhiEfCYMEkvt6nX91o3yD1OTo_35_39d1Rovzx2x1o-RnLmvFqCZmxrt4d53E3Jn-4O5WGiTzmhrCChFFILeBtDY7Sveo-2E2GeejRDsaYYdDzLPvdTpPZzOi0gimOADFq5bZtVgqlDsENPdlXmNTwNgxSyelhpJomgwrmWUaMc6clBuJSH7wj49O1mO7yhfXhy9EnuzOfrVO_Olg6WK7resTyhHEvn41Lfpk6WF6vOljIo_gvCFcrNm4CjBG5ZE9MfzE34SsdlF0SFX2poYlWPnlH11h8t4tyYnVMJffVhvOilKiNptPy43CUvlfxz1h-WfgXAAD__-qGjCo) with criminal records during a two-week targeted operation across 58 Southeast Texas counties between April 6 and April 17. Those detained had a combined [751 criminal convictions](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp8Gd0SASTAFxTbusu2WFgsX-2ouYBny47cfZV5h6k_6dM75d1_uHgnL-tdncP2d6lLg1Qh6h2MJPu_5bB1D9ifVBoQBSgO1KKFuXGiurkv0SOeih-j-i2jlAE4aY6TU1ophc1ZrMClJpbWZpEnWyFHrW7JKjzpc_YDucya0ukopRjFdjBinycCorBUJkmVaQMRej0vfoMPbt0RnfcJxCTUP5Lbe98bGP0zNTM1fKebPwNT8MWFqpho8MTVjAO5LqY8SoHF_HNB64zVxZQwPB2YsnjgSweqJe0IojWMJ9IhYVt4ebYfQORYeX8gj-L4Nh4v7C4mw3QzTYs0e6Qer_y7m06nvAAAA__-VjYoX), including homicide and drug trafficking. Also among those arrested was Minh Duy Tong Nguyen, a 54-year-old Vietnamese national [convicted of murder](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFzhCAUhH8NdjjwRJGCIg3dpU3pcPg4mUNxgJznv8-YyT9I94q3--3u12262RDD9vi0K-r69mna8CgRa8U8Obvu61lqcKs9YyoYg8OtIEzAYKBMUOin2YZ4TqKZ9Z3NijeouZSSc6EUaxZ95731fuiEHzo1Ci4QeTcKtKq3d9HLJujLjAnoOWcdG1vJunGU2IFSzKNXRDCcQ025rQtWfNvi45lemFuX1ibqpda9kO6DgCFgjuNoXQzuCUv6LjVt1xcBc9UiYGJyNhIwF5OAYeK6gYAJDumfgmbcU66FgpTU5oylFnoBaT0SPRCfFDefssMVt0p3zCHNBEyT9bwfIcZQBkkEe6w2xN-Q9X_TvjT8BAAA__-j441U) in Houston in 1991 who had carried a longstanding removal order. ERO Houston Acting Field Office Director Paul McBride warned that any local measures restricting ICE cooperation would have "immediate impacts to public safety," adding those impacts are often felt most acutely within immigrant communities where criminal offenders may reside.
## Houston's World Cup Countdown Starts Now
Houston's East Downtown neighborhood begins its most dramatic physical transformation in decades on May 1, when [eight blocks south of Shell Energy Stadium](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQhZ9GdGKkRRhTqLgNnW-bklmkBZQIxLCyMW-fIZM3SLfFnu_8fDz6B4YY1uk_LmTze0z9SgdHypn23uGyLSfn4BY8Y2KKwdHKBD0ouEllJNS9xxDP3hTeDsq3uiCrm6bR2rStKmbrxgGHWte-glFVw4AtaG-8M6OvsSFTBHvBlIFaa1Wpe9mo6n5vqIK2VSONrTCKfMhpL_NMmd7IYzzTi_bSpaWIds55Y1H9E9AJ6I7jKF0M7gvm9OSc1utLQHfVEtDF5DAK6C5PAZ0y1w2XLu3RS_fcZGCJcUmc5Uw7SVy9_EWxHMI0EWfpZlwnYok7yc8nZ-nxZIkHngK6Yrd-O0KMgW-NMGpaMMSfsPlvE78sfAcAAP__fOuRZA) convert into a massive FIFA Fan Festival zone ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The festival runs June 11 through July 19, covering all seven [Houston matches](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOiP_cDEULrahy7ZbIscegiWbQZ5JCG-_Sl7hdqc4Ojrf9--23HzKaX_89QUcv1dcdjgpAzPUJfhylIs4heKvjAQ5BdgJ9KKlHoTshf5Zok_5Wvo2uruMk2rBKWutUv00yXZzZpisNcGDhtEMA1gFYTCDGe9KSi1jm9xnTPb6Rylp5NhZacbRgtHTJFdYp6aXEBNj7XgDhrenNV_4gtoFLG12G_NBjfnT6LnR83me3YpvOrAyfRqNnomxJqBPwhCgNnr-ApxYcxTheYjiOWxAYsMnMe6C2FcWnAqQiJ6BRMbgOeFObXXxOFPOiQbb9PJRfMrfK_w7gS-n_wcAAP__-3-GtA) at NRG Stadium. A $14 million Main Street revamp wraps by May 30, and downtown hotel bookings have surged 66% in June and 83% in July. Over in Dallas, [AT&T Stadium hosts nine total matches](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy2yAQRb8GdXhghQ0UFGnUvbQpNQgWiwkSDOAn6-8zcj7hVXuKnbN775-v-cvGFPfnb7uh6e-Q5x2PlrB3rLOzW9nO1qPb7JlywxQd7g1hBgYPygSF--xtTOcsBm8W5jUf0HApJedCazasRnppBZejCjIsoO5aLMAXftcjW5QKaojmkjEBd87ZyNRNslEpiSNozQIGTQRDH3uut75ix7dtIZ35G-vN5W1IZu29NDL-IjARmI7juL2a7dnb81ogMLWe63nNNZcS9-eFJdfeCEw9ur_4oesLAhMTFwOByduUbKNrfrWed_q5TEMMlh65Jk_dq9BPD0-7YaPNrehfCel_JS01OrzESstRjA_JmCQwDdX4csSUYntIIthzszF9kvSf9f9t4F8AAAD___kOl_Y), including a semifinal in mid-July, putting two Texas cities squarely at the center of the world's biggest sporting event.

It stands as a powerful tribute to the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms. What makes this event even more meaningful is how it is funded. [The American Veterans Center receives no federal funding for the parade](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O3CAQh58Gd7vCYBsoKCKtXOXSRqnQHIxtFP5sAPvObx_5cmW6a-c3842-mZ8v5gV88Gn9ARF1e1-ySfhWA7aGxViIz3jW5m2EM-SKwVtMFZlhlE03OtzYaBz4cJqhc_qVOtV3qHshRN8PStFu0-MkHJNSjcKKYVqofeUomByVlYoqOXZeXzA6sLHvKafyLiiXUiBnStEFF0UGis63XO5tw4bvUJdw5gPL3ebYBb219qyEfyNsJmyuaPeCd0jocrs6CJshYvEW0u3AhgVSvVlMDcsVHfZDxqxQThMx5uIhED7XvBeLxmaHhD_m77-U4ooRNu0tmojO75HwB0bw4bP4b4LwxwbFQf1twP75jK5Dgl8T4Y__L-yKds83H4KvkyADXS_uh1_72lcOzf4GAAD__ztYozg). It is made possible entirely by private citizens who believe in honoring those who served. Your support helps bring this national moment of remembrance to life while also funding year-round efforts to preserve veterans' stories, educate future generations, and produce documentaries that highlight the true cost of freedom. clean_body: Texas health officials formally notified Camp Mystic on Friday that the Hill Country girls camp may not receive a license to operate this summer, nine months after Guadalupe River flooding killed 27. | | | | | | Saturday, April 25, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1838, the United States and the Republic of Texas signed the , establishing the western bank of the Sabine River as the eastern boundary of Texas and recognizing the Republic's claims to disputed territory in Red River County. Would you believe the firing squad is making a comeback in 2026? The Justice Department just made a major move to reshape the death penalty while also reversing the Biden administration's freeze on federal executions. When was the last time a firing squad was actually used in the U.S.? How soon could this new policy be put into place? And who could it apply to? On today's episode of The Flyover Podcast , host Amy Hess answers all your questions and breaks down the latest on this developing story. ! Today's sponsor is . They're reminding us that Memorial Day is a time to pause and reflect on the sacrifices made by those who served our country. This year carries even more significance as America approaches its 250th birthday. is leading one of the most meaningful ways to honor that legacy. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Camp Mystic May Lose License to Reopen Texas health officials formally notified Camp Mystic on Friday that the Hill Country girls camp may not receive a license to operate this summer, nine months after Guadalupe River flooding killed 27. The Department of State Health Services sent citing multiple deficiencies in the camp's proposed emergency plan and finding it out of compliance with state safety requirements. The agency has reviewed hundreds of complaints about the camp's response on July 4, and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has to withhold the permit until legislative and criminal investigations conclude. Texas Rangers are probing neglect allegations, and a court injunction prevents the camp from demolishing flood-damaged cabins while the family of 8-year-old Cecilia "Cile" Steward, whose body has not been found, continues . ICE Arrests 277 with Criminal Background ICE's Enforcement and Removal Operations division in Houston arrested with criminal records during a two-week targeted operation across 58 Southeast Texas counties between April 6 and April 17. Those detained had a combined , including homicide and drug trafficking. Also among those arrested was Minh Duy Tong Nguyen, a 54-year-old Vietnamese national in Houston in 1991 who had carried a longstanding removal order. ERO Houston Acting Field Office Director Paul McBride warned that any local measures restricting ICE cooperation would have "immediate impacts to public safety," adding those impacts are often felt most acutely within immigrant communities where criminal offenders may reside. Houston's World Cup Countdown Starts Now Houston's East Downtown neighborhood begins its most dramatic physical transformation in decades on May 1, when convert into a massive FIFA Fan Festival zone ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The festival runs June 11 through July 19, covering all seven at NRG Stadium. A $14 million Main Street revamp wraps by May 30, and downtown hotel bookings have surged 66% in June and 83% in July. Over in Dallas, , including a semifinal in mid-July, putting two Texas cities squarely at the center of the world's biggest sporting event. | This year's National Memorial Day Parade, , is set to be the largest in its history. It stands as a powerful tribute to the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms. What makes this event even more meaningful is how it is funded. . It is made possible entirely by private citizens who believe in honoring those who served. Your support helps bring this national moment of remembrance to life while also funding year-round efforts to preserve veterans' stories, educate future generations, and produce documentaries that highlight the true cost of freedom. () ➤ Statewide: Texas' Emergency Preparation Supplies Sales Tax Holiday begins today and runs through Monday, letting shoppers buy generators, batteries, first aid kits, and other preparedness items tax-free. The annual holiday arrives ahead of hurricane season, which opens June 1. () ➤ Statewide: A new VegasInsider analysis ranks Dallas/Fort Worth International Airport second in the nation for potential flight disruptions this summer, with a 67.3% probability of delay or cancellation, Dallas Love Field third at 61.1%, and Austin-Bergstrom ninth at 54.5%. () ➤ Central Texas: Copper thieves are increasingly targeting fiber cables as they mistakenly believe the lines contain valuable copper, disrupting internet and 911 services. | MAGA operatives are attempting to seize Michigan's voter records. Election law experts are calling it an unprecedented power grab.
Defend Our Courts' mission has always been to build the judicial firewall that stops exactly this. We helped retain three justices in Pennsylvania. We just secured Wisconsin's Supreme Court through 2030.
These wins matter because when MAGA's schemes land in court, these are the judges who stand between them and the ballot box.
We will stand with Michigan. But right now, Georgia needs us. And the stakes couldn't be higher:
---
| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OVrfVWkoXziHUVsuP2Ceg8G1if20JVKygE5OnSkew2mnp38UZJbbNG3MxUxPYzHwCT-EAodlAc0fUSeXuk-SflWMMisnbcMFAl_WRA-yscnUvuDioZ3m8i_qcaTDdP_IoZVwaJNFHg9tixscEnK_Frqcd4bjzH04inkCiRWkpFEatN_jHL4AOP9F71kUCMFQ5T4m9YFW6b5kQi4WNqhS2VWeXOfaXo4dHnBKBLqIbZSE_leC65wqab0L50X2Pj8Hdn5JcMbaX6Y=&c=D6E1ChAednKwDIKsiGhb23eGJuCJSG-9Th4zPZq_MkWpA9y-r7TWOg==&ch=By0O8CLeJRLTzCyTnAJ_dDGvGMmJSDOeEbxAdIGiLmCCJsVm0KnNTQ==)

| | | | | Georgia has been ground zero for MAGA election rigging since 2020. Fake electors. Pressure campaigns. Threats against election workers. MAGA never stopped plotting.
The Trump admin has already seized Georgia's voter records. Election experts know what that means. It's not research. It's preparation for the next election rigging fight.
The Georgia Supreme Court will decide who wins that fight. Right now, the court is controlled by MAGA.
We have one chance to change that on May 19th. Win, and Democrats can flip the court just months before the 2028 presidential election. Lose, and that window closes for good.
[We've already beaten MAGA in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. Now, we crush them in Georgia. name: Dr. Amy Acton
subject: Worked for a Republican Governor. Now I’m running to be a Democratic Governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2129%2E259176%2EV43t0A) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2129%2E259176%2EV43t0A)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Acton-Intro_B1_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2129%2E259176%2EV43t0A) Peter, I’m Dr. Amy Acton, and I’m the Democratic candidate for governor of Ohio. I grew up in Youngstown, Ohio, struggling through abuse, neglect, and hunger — and even spent one winter living in a tent. I often share that public schools saved my life. After pulling myself out of poverty, I worked three jobs to put myself through med school. Throughout my career, I’ve always worked with both sides of the aisle — because I’ll work with anyone who wants to solve problems instead of making them. In 2019, I was appointed by a Republican governor to lead the Ohio Department of Health. I held drug companies accountable, kept communities healthy, and was called to serve during the most unprecedented public health crisis of our lifetimes. I’m a doctor, not a politician, but I am a public servant. **I’m running for governor because people in my state are struggling, and I refuse to look the other way while bad actors and special interests keep taking Ohio backwards on nearly every measure.** The problems we face don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. They’re just problems that need to be fixed. And Peter, I don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican, either. I’ll fight for you and your family just the same. _But I can’t win this race alone; that’s why I’m asking for your help today._ We’re up against a Trump-endorsed, MAGA billionaire backed by other out-of-state billionaires. My opponent, Vivek Ramaswamy, just dropped **$10 MILLION** in this race to try and defeat me because he knows Ohioans aren’t falling for the MAGA playbook. [**If you’re ready to put an end to political games and get to work solving problems, please make a contribution before our monthly deadline passes so that we can win this race and shock the nation.** ](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Acton-Intro_B1_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2129%2E259176%2EV43t0A) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy Acton and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10971?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Acton-Intro_B1_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2129%2E259176%2EV43t0A)
---

Dr. Amy Acton

We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. clean_body: | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates, If you'd like to unsubscribe, Peter, I’m Dr. Amy Acton, and I’m the Democratic candidate for governor of Ohio. I grew up in Youngstown, Ohio, struggling through abuse, neglect, and hunger — and even spent one winter living in a tent. I often share that public schools saved my life. After pulling myself out of poverty, I worked three jobs to put myself through med school. Throughout my career, I’ve always worked with both sides of the aisle — because I’ll work with anyone who wants to solve problems instead of making them. In 2019, I was appointed by a Republican governor to lead the Ohio Department of Health. I held drug companies accountable, kept communities healthy, and was called to serve during the most unprecedented public health crisis of our lifetimes. I’m a doctor, not a politician, but I am a public servant. I’m running for governor because people in my state are struggling, and I refuse to look the other way while bad actors and special interests keep taking Ohio backwards on nearly every measure. The problems we face don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. They’re just problems that need to be fixed. And Peter, I don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican, either. I’ll fight for you and your family just the same. But I can’t win this race alone; that’s why I’m asking for your help today. We’re up against a Trump-endorsed, MAGA billionaire backed by other out-of-state billionaires. My opponent, Vivek Ramaswamy, just dropped $10 MILLION in this race to try and defeat me because he knows Ohioans aren’t falling for the MAGA playbook. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: The GOP’s latest moves in Georgia:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
MAGA is all in to flip Jon’s seat red.
# [](https://act.electjon.com/go/4629?t=1&akid=2175%2E5691347%2EKPYdtT)

Peter,
The GOP has made a _lot_ of moves in Georgia recently.
Before we explain more, [**we’re hoping you’ll chip in $27.91 to Jon’s campaign today. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi Just Overtook Britain
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msmomentum-12853035?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Something remarkable has happened. Mississippi — yes, our Mississippi — has overtaken the United Kingdom in terms of GDP per capita.**

The state that for most of the last century sat at the bottom of nearly every American economic table has, quietly, pulled ahead of one of the world’s oldest industrial nations.

Last week, Governor Tate Reeves highlighted this on X in his characteristically Southern style, and the post went viral.
---
|
---
_Tate Reeves tweet went global....._
| It is a moment worth pausing over — and worth understanding, because what has happened here is not luck. It is the product of a deliberate, sustained program of free-market reform that anywhere ever managed to pull off.

**I first noticed Mississippi was overtaking Britain back in 2023, and wrote about it at the time for both _The Atlantic_ and _The Sunday Times_.** The reaction from British commentators was a familiar scramble for excuses — purchasing power adjustments, Ukraine, Covid — anything other than the policy choices Britain itself had been making for thirty years.

Now the claim is no longer disputed. A new report from the _Institute of Economic Affairs_ asked British voters to guess where the UK would rank among America’s fifty states on GDP per capita. On average, they placed their country seventh. In reality, the UK ranks fifty-first — dead last, below every single U.S. state, including Mississippi. More than a quarter of respondents said they felt “shocked” when shown the truth. Facts, alas, do not care about British feelings.

**To me, the more interesting question is not how far Britain has fallen. It is how far Mississippi** **has climbed.**

For most of the last hundred years, the Magnolia State always seemed to be last. Per capita income was the lowest in the Union. Serious investment passed us by. That has changed — and it has changed because of deliberate policy choices, made year after year.

In 2021, Mississippi passed meaningful labor market reform, making it easier for people to work, train, and switch careers. In 2022, we replaced an old tax code with a flat tax.

We have kept our energy among the most affordable in the country, a quiet advantage every family and every employer benefits from. In 2024, we passed education funding reform that finally lets the money follow the child. In 2025, we took the historic step of passing legislation to eliminate the state income tax altogether — a policy that only a few years earlier had been dismissed as impossible. And in 2026, we have begun cutting through the thicket of red tape that has held back our healthcare sector for too long.

No single one of these reforms was enough by itself to turn the state around. Together, they are. And these reforms compound. Labor market liberalization makes tax reform more potent. Lower taxes make affordable energy more valuable. Better schools raise the human capital on which all of it depends.
This is what a real politics of growth looks like — not a single heroic leap, but a steady accumulation of practical wins, year after year.

**If you want to know why Britain is floundering, imagine what Mississippi might be like if we had had Bernie Sanders in charge for the past twenty years.** Taxes too high. Regulation intrusive. Immigration out of control. Energy costs are sky-high. Britain has been run by a succession of Bernies, and the result has been a disaster.

Mississippi shows the alternative. The policies that have lifted our state from the bottom of the American table are not secret. They are practical, proven, and available to any government willing to pursue them with the courage and patience they require.

**The world is starting to notice Mississippi’s success. So should we.**

Thank you for standing with us as we keep building a stronger Mississippi.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=89c9d31a37&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Yours,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=144ef97176) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=144ef97176).

# [When the Experts Disagree, Conviction Wins: A Bitcoin Investor's Case for the Long Term](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=195395484&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1Mzk1NDg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxMjEyOTksImV4cCI6MTc3OTcxMzI5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J9iYyxYFIFMTM8DYyuGidJak0f-A9ZrjZu1pb4XCoD4)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d2a91e2-5b47-410e-af9f-a4e6068652c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is a peculiar ritual that plays out every cycle in Bitcoin. Smart and well informed people make confident predictions about where the price is headed next, and then the market humbles nearly all of them. It is not that analysts like James Check, Anthony Pompliano, Jordy Visser, Joel Bomgar, or Michael Saylor lack credibility. Quite the opposite. They bring data, macro frameworks, and years of experience. But when you step back and look at their views together, something more important becomes clear than any single price target. Even the best informed voices do not really know what Bitcoin will do in the short term.
Listen closely and a pattern emerges. Check warns of sideways movement and the possibility of painful declines before any sustained rally. Visser describes phases where early holders sell into new demand, creating turbulence and uncertainty. Pompliano talks about quiet periods that often come before major moves, but does not claim to know exactly when that shift will happen. Bomgar points to improving fundamentals but avoids making precise short term calls. Even Saylor, who is known for his strong conviction, focuses far more on long term structural trends than on where Bitcoin might land in the next six months.
Despite their different tones, they largely agree on one thing. The near term is likely to be messy.
That reality is uncomfortable in a market that thrives on bold predictions. Investors want clarity. They want to know if Bitcoin is going to fifty thousand or one hundred fifty thousand in the near future. But the honest answer, reflected in these perspectives, is that short term price action is driven by forces that are difficult to predict. Liquidity cycles, macroeconomic shifts, investor sentiment, and the behavior of large holders all play a role, and none of them move in a perfectly predictable way.
What stands out is not disagreement, but shared uncertainty.
That uncertainty points to a different way of thinking about Bitcoin. Instead of trying to predict every movement, many investors are choosing to focus on a longer time horizon. The idea is simple. Short term price action is noise, while long term fundamentals are what matter. Bitcoin has a fixed supply. Adoption continues to grow. Institutions are becoming more involved. And its role as an alternative monetary asset is gaining recognition. Those factors do not change because of a few volatile months.
This is where the real divide exists. It is not between bullish and bearish analysts, but between those focused on the short term and those focused on the long term.
Short term predictions will always vary. Some will call for declines, others for rapid gains. Occasionally someone will get it right, but more often those predictions will miss the mark. Meanwhile, the long term case for Bitcoin continues to build gradually.
That is why a consistent approach of investing with a long term perspective, rather than reacting to every forecast, has proven to be more durable.
The irony is that the more you listen to expert predictions, the clearer it becomes that certainty is hardest to find where people want it most. In the short term, no one really knows. Over the long term, the direction becomes much clearer.
Bitcoin does not reward perfect timing. It rewards patience and conviction.
And in a market defined by uncertainty, that may be the only advantage that truly lasts.

Check warns of sideways movement and the possibility of painful declines before any sustained rally. Visser describes phases where early holders sell into new demand, creating turbulence and uncertainty. Pompliano talks about quiet periods that often come before major moves, but does not claim to know exactly when that shift will happen. Bomgar points to improving fundamentals but avoids making precise short term calls. Even Saylor, who is known for his strong conviction, focuses far more on long term structural trends than on where Bitcoin might land in the next six months. Despite their different tones, they largely agree on one thing. The near term is likely to be messy. That reality is uncomfortable in a market that thrives on bold predictions. Investors want clarity. They want to know if Bitcoin is going to fifty thousand or one hundred fifty thousand in the near future. But the honest answer, reflected in these perspectives, is that short term price action is driven by forces that are difficult to predict. Liquidity cycles, macroeconomic shifts, investor sentiment, and the behavior of large holders all play a role, and none of them move in a perfectly predictable way. What stands out is not disagreement, but shared uncertainty. That uncertainty points to a different way of thinking about Bitcoin. Instead of trying to predict every movement, many investors are choosing to focus on a longer time horizon. The idea is simple. Short term price action is noise, while long term fundamentals are what matter. Bitcoin has a fixed supply. Adoption continues to grow. Institutions are becoming more involved. And its role as an alternative monetary asset is gaining recognition. Those factors do not change because of a few volatile months. This is where the real divide exists. It is not between bullish and bearish analysts, but between those focused on the short term and those focused on the long term. Short term predictions will always vary. Some will call for declines, others for rapid gains. Occasionally someone will get it right, but more often those predictions will miss the mark. Meanwhile, the long term case for Bitcoin continues to build gradually. That is why a consistent approach of investing with a long term perspective, rather than reacting to every forecast, has proven to be more durable. The irony is that the more you listen to expert predictions, the clearer it becomes that certainty is hardest to find where people want it most. In the short term, no one really knows. Over the long term, the direction becomes much clearer. Bitcoin does not reward perfect timing. It rewards patience and conviction. And in a market defined by uncertainty, that may be the only advantage that truly lasts. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, Recently, there’s been a lot of talk about fundraising numbers in this race. And look — raising money is part of the process. We all know that. But how that money is raised matters. When a campaign is powered by large-dollar donations, it raises a simple question: Who is that campaign really built for? The campaign we have built is different. We have volunteer infrastructure, community relationships, and cross-partisan credibility that no dollar amount can replicate. | | | | This didn’t come from one event or one donor. # Did you know?

Early voting for the upcoming Primary begins on Monday, April 27th, and continues through May 15th. Mark your calendars for Election Day on May 19th to ensure your voice is heard in this critical race. Should any contest require it, the runoff election is scheduled for June 16th.

Kelvin King Will Stop Corruption
| I’m reaching out today because I’ve spent my life following a simple rule: **If you want the job, you earn it.** You may have seen my latest ad calling out the blatant corruption within our state government. Specifically, I’m talking about the sweetheart deal handed to Gabriel Sterling, the Chief Operating Officer for the Secretary of State’s office.

### **The $200,000 "No-Bid" Secret**
While hardworking Georgians are out there competing in the free market, Gabriel Sterling was handed a **no-bid contract worth over $200,000**. In the world of government, a "no-bid" contract is exactly what it sounds like: a deal cut behind closed doors without giving anyone else a chance to offer a better price or better service. It is the antithesis of transparency.
### **Business Done the Right Way**
Now, let’s be clear—I am a businessman. I own a company that does business with the state, and there is absolutely nothing wrong with that. Private partnerships are vital to making Georgia run. **But there is a right way and a wrong way to do it.** When I seek a contract, I submit a bid. I compete. I prove that my team can do the work more efficiently and effectively than the next guy. That is how the system is designed to work to protect _your_ tax dollars.
### **Why This Matters to Me**
This isn't just politics for me; it’s personal and professional. Before I was a business owner, I served as a **contracting officer**. I spent years studying government contracting and procurement. I know the regulations inside and out. I know that when officials bypass the bidding process to take care of their inner circle, they aren't just breaking a rule—they are breaking the public trust.
* **Ethics are paramount:** Without a fair process, corruption becomes the status quo.
* **Efficiency is required:** Competition drives down costs. No-bid deals drive them up.
* **Trust is earned:** You deserve to know that your money is being spent based on merit, not on who you know in the Secretary of State’s office.

I’m running to bring accountability back to Georgia. We need leaders who understand that the government’s checkbook isn’t a private gift fund for their colleagues. It’s time we return to a system where the "right way" is the only way.
---

body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=6298%2E582294%2El_wi23)
Here’s what I need you to know:
**First polls showed us neck-and-neck with my opponent John Sununu.** This race is in a virtual tie.
**Then a right-wing super PAC made the largest ad reservation in New Hampshire in a _decade_** — to the tune of $17 million.
**Now my campaign manager just told me we’re being outspent by another GOP super PAC backing Sununu.** In a race as competitive as this one, we can’t afford to lose an inch.
I don’t take money from corporate PACs, so I am relying on this grassroots team to win. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in $5 to our campaign today? We’ll put it right to work to keep New Hampshire blue and help Democrats flip the Senate. Every single donation counts in a race this close.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_1.jsT59u&refcode=em20260425-1&t=2&akid=6298%2E582294%2El_wi23)**

Thank you,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260425-1&t=22&refcode2=6298_582294_l_wi23&akid=6298%2E582294%2El_wi23)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Hand to God, I’ll never stoop to that low
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you!
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Friend!
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8151059/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcGQ4ZUNLRnpGdw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MjU/LbmNseDFCdFk2Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYTBHRnlaS0Vscw/gaezAJw/s5h05926277)

| Friend,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---
[**Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file for the month.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8151059/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLWpvcmRhbi9mYzE4NTRhZmIwOTI2ZDIwLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MjU/LbmNseDFCdFk2Zw/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDMzMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWJyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UldfQiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PTE1QJnV0bV90ZXJtPTIyNzMyX3dyMg/gaezAJw/s3q550493ef)

And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026. “Official GOP Voter Verification Questionnaire Scope: Measuring Voter Propensity” GOP Voter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 8337-190 | Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: I’m ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I will always put the people of North Carolina first – as I’ve done my entire career in public service.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
| | | |
---
Peter – lately, I’ve been out on the road meeting with North Carolinians all across the state, and here’s what I’ve heard from folks:
⛽ Gas prices are spiking, and it’s costing more to put food on the table.

🩺 Health insurance costs are skyrocketing, and people can’t afford the care they need.

🇺🇲 They’re fed up with the chaos in Washington DC, and they’re worried about the future of our country.
I know we can do better. That’s why I’m in this fight.

Before politics, before party and before power, I will always put the people of North Carolina first – as I’ve done my entire career in public service. As Governor:
✅ I expanded Medicaid for hundreds of thousands of working North Carolinians.

✅ I added hundreds of thousands of good-paying jobs.

✅ I increased teacher pay and expanded paid parental leave.
Now, I’m ready to keep delivering progress for working families in the Senate – but getting there won’t be easy. The GOP is coming after me as a top target to beat, pledging $71 million in this race, and I need your critical grassroots support to fight back and win.
**[It would mean a lot if you’d chip in to my campaign today so we can keep up with this surge in GOP spending and power our movement all the way to November. Can I count on your support to flip this seat blue?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9775?t=8&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9776?t=9&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9777?t=10&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9778?t=11&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/9775?t=12&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---
Thank you,

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1166%2E124072%2EmsbJcJ)
---

Raleigh, NC 27602

The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. subject: [Re]: a gun-crazed, hateful YouTuber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | | |
---
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130134295/616761397/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_260425fwd_N_BZ_NO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxOTFkMWUyLWFhNDAtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0faWPDXdzCiWlnJuK95HM7LLiq_J58y6zA3m5_Q_8r0=)
---
Hi Peter, did you see this message?

A terrifying far-right extremist is running to replace the now disgraced Texas Congressman, Tony Gonzales. Gonzales has been in the news because he resigned from Congress after admitting to inappropriate relations with a staff member who later died by suicide. _If you find this news upsetting, we are writing with our plan to help._

[**There is a phenomenal and qualified woman running for this seat in November. Her name is Katy Padilla Stout and Her Bold Move couldn’t be prouder to support her.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-stout/?refcode=EM_F_260425fwd_N_BZ_NO_7_NG_N_L)

This district suffered a horrific tragedy when a mass shooting took place in Uvalde at Robb Elementary School (where 19 students and 2 teachers were killed and 18 were injured). Following that shooting, Congress passed the 2022 Safer Communities Act, which expanded background checks and helped states implement red flag laws. The Republican running for this seat is literally running to protest that lifesaving bill.

**We cannot let this extremist who self-describes as a “gun absolutist,” win this seat – but with millions of dollars and a massive social media following (from the manosphere) behind his campaign, we need to act fast.**

[**We are proud to be supporting the Democrat running for this seat, Katy Padilla Stout. She is a mother, a former teacher, and an attorney in child advocacy. Please help us ensure that Katy has a massive grassroots push of our own by rushing a split $20.26 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Katy’s campaign immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-stout/?refcode=EM_F_260425fwd_N_BZ_NO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=20.26)

We need all hands on deck to ensure Herrera never takes his dangerous ideologies to the halls of power. We are counting on you, Peter.

Together,

Betsy Zalinski
Chief of Staff
Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

As claims of sexual depravity against Eric Swalwell mount, there’s a separate but parallel scandal happening on the Republican side of the aisle...

Texas Congressman Tony Gonzales also announced his resignation from Congress this week after admitting to an affair with a staff member who later died by suicide. While Gonzales is now disgraced and part of an ongoing discussion about men abusing their power, the Republican running for his seat, Brandon Herrera, is absolutely terrifying... (more about him below).

With all of the above in mind, we are thrilled to be supporting the Democrat running for this seat, Katy Padilla Stout. She is a mother, a former teacher, and an attorney in child advocacy. Katy’s opponent, Brandon Herrera, is a pro-gun YouTuber and gun manufacturer. This district includes Uvalde, home to Robb Elementary School – where 19 students and 2 teachers were killed and 18 were injured by a mass shooter in 2022. He has stated that the only reason he is in the race was because Gonzales signed off on a common-sense gun safety bill following that shooting – the 2022 Safer Communities Act, which expanded background checks and helped states implement red flag laws.

It gets worse:
* Herrera has worked with Kyle Rittenhouse (who, at 17, shot three men, two fatally, during protests in Wisconsin) to produce a pro-gun video for the National Association for Gun Rights.
* He has discussed his copy of Adolf Hitler’s “Mein Kampf,” used a WWII German weapon, and called it "the original ghetto blaster.”
* He has mimicked a Nazi march to Nazi music and joked about the Holocaust.
* He has been a member of a white supremacy organization called Sons of Confederate Veterans since he was 12 years old.

Peter,
BREAKING: New data shows my chances of winning the primary just dropped.
Why?
Because tech billionaires are pouring money into a massive super PAC to defeat me, after I supported a modest tax on the wealthiest few in the country.

name: Matt Van Epps
subject: I stared death in the face
body:
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=46c45153ab2545c199bfde4e051dde41&_e=pEME2AT5pqx7QeuYbP9lEGfPRLLg-Yh59BqPjAXasfN4wvRzKlHqD6H5kh_5EN_2IpYgWLPAK_cTILqIsazDhrAMfqfR1ExjURQoiPM5mtll4yKxhd1I_HXAnDnJAMzta4szg-H3Cr4wQzz3ZA1Jp9xbA7YHV-fMetYIkCta8e5EKWDbXl2lgHgddM2feiBOC0tC7OBgdhLFOfKpb_ZX8ppAnjtwz7ZKeVJOyOQ_4sgj4xkPP1lxRqeTUBq172d_lnlMPdAxztA-XpCSiXVaABQ70ukok2EWT5bF75s70g7b74MMkxvsFN5eRAxNOz3gTmIa8LbO2VN1gU5eniebkB-DQXsWIldloNbdKz8Vu4a7VNH_Q4dPrpLheWwbzZkevGoX_XveWczlnKNDPYUQccVDy0qizsCjj7hrnWMA927FPgIDJu8CQfWu9aBLZFZBycMLVa_TFfskHbPzUfuhj7FuTmtT46xY4Kwx8VnukIf2s6ohl4lyvQaJPHkDwPzayc4y3275CmralpjP09bUHPGQ5VLXA9WRvwRKbffobxUqH33n5hhHi3oHX8YJzVXN1EX0xnou4q1R7sj6pl0aZYb7EMGWQ9b0AaxmlMwXpbnOPC0EyNdiWMq1ardCxJfLtK6bzjtBpoOvDkKWDwnU2_Wigq6-fecPf2cfmDSyzD2hHLeOWQVuQN3fbaXtXvoK)
---
Patriot, Nothing makes you appreciate life more than staring death in the face – and walking away. For me it was during a deployment in Afghanistan, flying MH-47G Chinooks with the 160th SOAR “Night Stalkers.” I had a full team of special operators on board, and the fuel probe took a direct hit from a rocket-propelled grenade, or RPG. I thought that was it. It should’ve been. But God must have been looking out for us that day, because it never went off. So we kept moving, took the fight to the enemy, and finished the mission. I have no idea why I was spared that day, but I do know there is a lesson in that for all of us. **We’re only here on this earth for a period of time, and it’s on us to make our mark while we can. If we’ve got a mission, by God we finish it.** That’s why I’m reaching out. I’m not asking you to stare death in the face or pilot an attack helicopter into enemy territory. **Instead, I’m asking you to help Republicans keep the House out of the hands of the radical, far-Left lunatics who almost destroyed this nation, and are dead set on doing it again if God forbid they’re handed the keys in November.** When our razor-thin majority was on the line in last year’s critical TN-07 special election, I was deeply honored to get the support of President Trump and the whole MAGA movement. Now, with literally everything on the line in 2026, I’m doing everything in my power to save our majority and our agenda. **Hundreds of millions of left-wing dollars are being put to use as you read this to take back the House.[So humbly but with great urgency, I’m asking you to pitch in a few bucks to fight back.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=46c45153ab2545c199bfde4e051dde41&_e=pEME2AT5pqx7QeuYbP9lEGfPRLLg-Yh59BqPjAXasfN4wvRzKlHqD6H5kh_5EN_2IpYgWLPAK_cTILqIsazDhrAMfqfR1ExjURQoiPM5mtll4yKxhd1I_HXAnDnJAMzta4szg-H3Cr4wQzz3ZA1Jp9xbA7YHV-fMetYIkCta8e5EKWDbXl2lgHgddM2feiBOC0tC7OBgdhLFOfKpb_ZX8ppAnjtwz7ZKeVJOyOQ_4sgj4xkPP1lxRqeTUBq172d_KrdeMhP0QK6EumkxSMQsH7Aqvn3wpx3RopTc0YdF13EF27zDH94Hk3LnFl9D7MeOgjcYNzjKXv9NmAtSB07kukjTlyg5hwdMYpYrLI1paNNMHzUOMaYrc1YVvdvyPEdDPrPz6DdTZBJcoQwJIRTw0WSxuehoJ1x_UWzTTsD97kRe4N48l-yaRibDPd4u_xByvnizU4yox-hgpcnIugHmenzgMH-WtGSN6C9rpIEGNE9Hn99LC8i4jL6IA-n63QTOiCwljVZJ5Fgd17WmVAgTHWOcmMvnVIImywICNqtCblJMOQO41iZgaYswPnzvywIlQXAR_zz-r9nXog0jBAmVUBz9kWlOJ0YVNL5pfAw0iFAn1pHuauU4NDESYQn2_xDaOK5oXoQGVfZ0zG_1Uh7_PSjm4zetPSM9tUW-OjcS4k5QrGz_Oocu57l6vyFGNxyu)**

clean_body: | | | | Patriot, Nothing makes you appreciate life more than staring death in the face – and walking away. For me it was during a deployment in Afghanistan, flying MH-47G Chinooks with the 160th SOAR “Night Stalkers.” I had a full team of special operators on board, and the fuel probe took a direct hit from a rocket-propelled grenade, or RPG. I thought that was it. It should’ve been. But God must have been looking out for us that day, because it never went off. So we kept moving, took the fight to the enemy, and finished the mission. I have no idea why I was spared that day, but I do know there is a lesson in that for all of us. We’re only here on this earth for a period of time, and it’s on us to make our mark while we can. If we’ve got a mission, by God we finish it. That’s why I’m reaching out. I’m not asking you to stare death in the face or pilot an attack helicopter into enemy territory. Instead, I’m asking you to help Republicans keep the House out of the hands of the radical, far-Left lunatics who almost destroyed this nation, and are dead set on doing it again if God forbid they’re handed the keys in November. When our razor-thin majority was on the line in last year’s critical TN-07 special election, I was deeply honored to get the support of President Trump and the whole MAGA movement. Now, with literally everything on the line in 2026, I’m doing everything in my power to save our majority and our agenda. Hundreds of millions of left-wing dollars are being put to use as you read this to take back the House. Democrats know that GOP seats like mine are the only thing standing between them and power, and we need patriots like you in this fight. Thanks for your generosity and commitment. Sincerely, Matt Van Epps | | | Paid for by Team Van Epps, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Matt Van Epps for Congress, Keeping Freedom Alive PAC, and NRCC. body:
Everything is more expensive, and the world is more dangerous.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130136271/616767978/-153530995?refcode=EM_F_260425immoral_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM0YjFmZC1hYzQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTMC13VTqLumlcokcYH6KUYUUltC6HLjat6UK1W9EtU=) Peter,

**_It’s immoral._**

Under Republican leadership, gas, diesel, fertilizer, and food prices are more expensive, and the world is more dangerous. The people are paying the price, and we must fight back.

| | Peter,

The truth is ugly, but I won’t sugarcoat it:

The Democrat establishment in Washington right now couldn’t care less about families like yours and mine. They answer to coastal elites, global bureaucrats, and radical activists — not to the American people.

They mock our faith. They try to shame our values. They chip away at our freedoms while living by a completely different set of rules. __**[_Not convinced? See the facts for yourself:_](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=cffcbb98cc52410fa0d09b780e00455d&_e=FIlTEFump4ig9H23skYNBowDywBOlu3XgKnpEJZ_54tBYV-WfqRaPrd7X-rE3gdZoErs6IRyqv7g0LpnocqTJ6DZSEAiEZMYNnKhz76zUPX32IJfVew4Vk1h3Nl92TBv2kO1sBv_8JuBk1VLVzIzCd_vUhcMJrFw6utj7Z9GlWTUSLWfveXC_rhWKsYlg3E5fpeKKKKN2tYhaFMkrnXZlXcX6aCVhplUJHRF9gBEkIsKGhihtGjttYb3aHFy5B_ifgNHgkT_9aEZqB3cWbgyyhsSoZQD7nKhD5t1MLxxtbyfqq_yKcfklSl4_2CHW7Cs2uofpgIiZqNfMnJ7pmDGJzhNg7POJE7wqWkSwmL_7jO-Y-XPunnRZNXPK-dUXjlrIXuEEgI_JUl9OtMQssa8TliyHwZV7T5reqaRMs9PCu5wsrjn7AdWzCRDsJ4-1Px0TOR8XG-beg9q2v-cB5L4JU41bqIjYlT31l4Rlrjj_HE-hL0l8muGPbPOSv6BAZ-sFUKyLUVyP6rLBR1f8VF4Kua1rBULFdiLHirJsCTcY6NYA1zv_7txTwiOQ2kxgUa7tdCNBEiFGTXOeTwe46xOBtT7UaLTr0WqmkRmbSTvEGk2Azvv4_pLyJK6U267S0W_Y0_A1bszc0rC6kwGAB7RrQDDVvZ4nPhfk1OLVXhuBrnDSk7pBypg_9n_DnjV_p3g8Y0W5XiB_HX7jXiFNHn1_tWpwowqLIxBKcVxZfVzMXRWo4nSXpCEaiYym7DtMjiNT-yAnqI6GwQsx7YEXB7k0IKdp_AuSq3A3t4yNevPUHVDlNWB5VQ981Ka8qAfE8XXyhEa83Z-1JjXgCaD0sHF0Erwm1gs03Gtn-vsCR3qP9w%3D)**

| | DEMOCRAT PLAYBOOK
---
| | 1\. They fly private while telling working families to “cut back.” 2\. They back open borders and endless crime while hiding behind walls and armed security. 3\. They rig the economy against those who work hard, rewarding those who don’t. 4\. They hijack real suffering just to score cheap political points. 5\. And they’re more loyal to their special interest donors than to the Constitution they swore to uphold.
---
| | _These people aren’t public servants. _

_They’re _parasites_ feeding off the system while working Americans suffer. _
---
They’ve sold out this country to the highest bidder and laughed in our faces. This isn’t just corruption. **It’s an all-out attack on _everything_ we believe in.**

The Left is furious after their humiliating 2024 losses and are desperate to take back power in 2026. They want to flip the House, retake the Senate, and push their radical agenda on hardworking Americans again.

The Democrats are funded by billionaires who don’t care about you. Me? I’m fighting with real Americans like you, Peter. Small-dollar donations from patriots like you keep us in this fight. Without you, the Left wins.
---
[Make no mistake, even $1 can decide if we keep control or let the radical Left take over. I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

name: JD Vance
subject: The House Majority is GONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Guy for Congress, Inc
body:
This is Vice President JD Vance. I'm going to be completely direct with you: The Radical Left has one goal in mind. Take back the House majority and kill our America First movement. They will lie, cheat, and steal their way back to a House Majority.
They know the math. They know that without patriots like Guy Reschenthaler, the House falls. Guy is the single most reliable ally we have in Congress. He's a warrior who doesn't flinch when the swamp comes calling. President Trump has endorsed him twice for a reason.I want to make sure you understand what we're dealing with this year: If we lose the House, we lose President Trump.The moment the Left takes the gavel, they won't be focused on helping your family or fixing the border. They will immediately launch a sham impeachment to paralyze the President's agenda and overturn the mandate of the American people. They want to tie his hands so he can never finish the work we started and fought so hard for.Guy and I both know the meaning of service. I served in the Marines, and Guy served in the Navy. clean_body: This is Vice President JD Vance. I'm going to be completely direct with you: The Radical Left has one goal in mind. Take back the House majority and kill our America First movement. They will lie, cheat, and steal their way back to a House Majority. They know the math. They know that without patriots like Guy Reschenthaler, the House falls. Guy is the single most reliable ally we have in Congress. He's a warrior who doesn't flinch when the swamp comes calling. President Trump has endorsed him twice for a reason.I want to make sure you understand what we're dealing with this year: If we lose the House, we lose President Trump.The moment the Left takes the gavel, they won't be focused on helping your family or fixing the border. They will immediately launch a sham impeachment to paralyze the President's agenda and overturn the mandate of the American people. They want to tie his hands so he can never finish the work we started and fought so hard for.Guy and I both know the meaning of service. I served in the Marines, and Guy served in the Navy. We don't shy away from a fight, but you can't win a war without ammo. The Left is trying to bleed Guy's campaign dry because they know he is the line of defense between them and the President. that line breaks, everything we've built, the America First agenda, the border security, the economic comeback, it's all over in the blink of an eye.I refuse to let a pack of RINOs and radicals impeach our President out of spite. This is why I am coming to you, Peter. Will you stand by and let that happen? I didn't think so. not let them destroy our future. Stand with the President's biggest ally in Congress. Fi,Vice President JD Vance from Trump-Endorsed Navy Vet Guy Reschenthaler:** I spent all of 2024 by Trump's side to WIN Pennsylvania, the largest swing state in America. I've stood by Trump in a local McDonald's learning to make fries, and I've stood by him when he stepped back on stage in Butler, PA, after his assassination attempt. And now, every day I'm in the halls of Congress, I continue to stand with him. I don't care what the radical Left thinks of me because it's your support that matters most. Will you please join President Trump by giving me your endorsement? truth is, the radical Democrats will always attack you, me, and every other Trump-supporting patriot. I 'd be so grateful to see you stand with President Trump by giving me your endorsement. Thank you,Guy Reschenthaler | | Paid for by Guy for Congress, Inc.
