clean_body: Early voting for Chris Carr launches Monday – and we have ONLY 2 DAYS left to fuel his victory! | | | | == | | Friend, Early voting for CHRIS CARR launches MONDAY, April 27th, for the May 19th Primary! As Attorney General, Chris Carr has been Georgia’s relentless fighter – locking up criminals, taking down gangs and traffickers, protecting our families, and standing tall against radical Left-wing attacks. Now the battle is here, and it’s our turn to fight for him. We have****ONLY 2 DAYS left to build massive momentum before early voting explodes. This is the critical surge that will decide if Chris Carr starts with unstoppable force. Every dollar you give today will fuel our aggressive GOTV machine – texts, calls, digital firepower, and ground teams – all driving record turnout for Chris Carr. == | | | == | | The clock is ticking. Monday is almost here. Let’s rally behind Chris Carr – the proven conservative leader Georgia desperately needs – and deliver a crushing victory. Win this for Chris and for Georgia. Team Carr | | | == | | | = | | | = | | = | | Chris Carr has spent his life fighting for the people and values that make Georgia great. Chris knows what makes our communities strong – faith, family, freedom, and hard work. As Attorney General, he’s stood up for Georgia families, taken on violent crime, defended our businesses, and pushed back against Washington’s reckless overreach. Chris has always believed that Georgia’s future should be decided by Georgians – not by bureaucrats or political elites. Now, he’s ready to take that fight to the Governor’s office – to build on Georgia’s success, protect our freedoms, and ensure a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for generations to come. = | | | = | | | = | | Your continued support fuels our grassroots movement to reach voters, share Chris’s vision, and stop the Left’s attempts to flip our state. Make your impact last – become a recurring donor today! | | | = | | Show where you stand. Our Make Crime Illegal Again trucker hat is one of Team Carr’s most popular items: a bold statement in support of law, order, and safe Georgia communities. Every purchase helps fuel our grassroots fight and support Chris Carr’s tough-on-crime leadership. = | | = | | | = | | Looking for more ways to show your support? Visit the Team Carr Store for exclusive campaign merchandise you won’t find anywhere else. Every item helps power our movement and keep Georgia strong. | | | | | Stay connected with Team Carr to get the latest campaign updates, upcoming events, and ways to get involved across Georgia! | | | == | == | == ---|---|--- | | Ready to do even more? Whether it’s making calls, knocking on doors, or helping out at campaign events, your energy and passion will make a difference in this fight for Georgia’s future. | | | = | | ↓CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK↓** Carr for GeorgiaP.O. subject: Volunteer to flip TX-02!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0425 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0425]
Friend,
We’re officially ramping up our volunteer program to flip TX-02 — and we need you.
TX-02 is one of the most important swing districts in the country. This is a red-to-blue flip opportunity, and it could help decide control of Congress.
But winning a race like this doesn’t happen on its own. It takes people making calls, knocking doors, sending texts, and talking to neighbors.
That’s how we win, and right now, we’re building the team that will make it happen.
So sign up today to volunteer and help us flip TX-02! [https://shaunfinnieforcongress.com/volunteer] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0423]
SIGN UP NOW TO JOIN US! [https://shaunfinnieforcongress.com/volunteer]
We’ll get you trained, plugged in, and ready to take action right away.
And if you can’t volunteer, you can still make a huge impact.
Running a volunteer program at this scale takes resources: tools, training, outreach, and coordination.
Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help power this program, flip TX-02, and flip the House this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0425]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=10&refcode=em0423&express_lane=true] Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=20&refcode=em0423&express_lane=true] Donate $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=35&refcode=em0423&express_lane=true] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=50&refcode=em0423&express_lane=true] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=100&refcode=em0423&express_lane=true] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0423]
This is how we win a district like this.
Let’s get to work.
— Shaun Finnie for Congress

PO Box 130101, Spring, TX 77393

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: A once-in-a-lifetime Memorial Day for America and our veterans

| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5CeGRFM-_wR4jMUC9voY8hzlCgL1ghxaI2Dh3ib1CZOBjkclsnRBCV9l-k4F-Zla8lG9Xc_VZ1TXOIAqN9_CbIzWavs3Vvl34fOxy1G2D8wiY9VmlY73OKHSEuUT5O4x7O322VtBAm5I6TmyNwerbE0JR41TNvHe59qfz0Qezr-2wkByO1e9lbv-kM2nUUx9m8i_ZvebHJC6NbqHijmuiN98qvjw1edsDatqBpJ8SHXqlLcqMxNog7eThIpLqs5mLviUSOVEifTHnmfsoFFA0wvPCjujOF5Z7rBpAnH3Yah5yn8KVH9SEsQxbrr_KoIBqpxgYtdglvC_YowfSoP_QFJUzhBeQTCPGKfV9ohrqoFOlehoTZcC_z55VMcz7KjBVAYm9B3XYAVcTK1op5ikefnmpKCIvzJIjSdVs7UnHORUfQa4WPz_lb0DFBSErr9d7n)

Patriot,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5CujN0GpOMc-TniCKv7O3RLHpLJknBaEupoAq_OOa9Q7CJF70eUmz7Go2jil5AM2NT7wmP3c10LQ5m221VLUZ3twEjvjFq6q6IPK-4-6fYfnnxyzGj6wkLvR5yi-uKn95NNKTsf7lxJeG7RZ8YrgDQqDuZ8gozf2pOwtTM-wPO2BcBu2UZDkIePkGHdtOKKrLNK0bOmpK3iwwBCnANjK_QFWQpeR93KlDoe075MAHgMP2VSWjvlJC7HAljPDUJHk8iYej_BwrPfZp_ilhLrp2Yzmk1EnZOkAK7jgH4FuNhvV8rc1UKm2Ti0_vhyWXSUTmuy1hTiWEy-5smLc784rQVXqK9GyRLoBd312DRcojq9mVr2z2UEqXZQQ18rWIwzKlxZPP_Y_1dHMnXEPXEADy6fJ56zFztLnUw8fVe0YBPvQIS0MOvBhPzxGNN2w-aeS4e)
---
Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5CYTUSvOF0ijw6ENE4OOchY22pc4IEDla9fkVqsjObyU9g3Cl9L_lGdkjvAeczVs3NZIUxPtzY9lpnxhhISw1YhO5ZR0XGHxKU5LnV_8gCTisRKukc6Fj4sOmiy7Rm0gjm02YPsNoswz6HmunKHM3vTEAN8rD7JCkB60TUusCWVEmboigUTqEFdG3I7E7tsMQSyxNid3hgO-dfw8-KCWK4kYW5B-3q8HDZe7KHKoEeAu5ZpE96ylRASTY0qBmoWdZJXqfZl50R8Sa4dZanHUY_tEuXB-iM7mDgvozYvH-AHHjS8rnPs7_PTED5kNhTl7z0H5Zf1iREsf_3sUh0lnz74xZjz5-P0I_uPWGqhrynkseFH5RhlCXZOL7JiTyPuMOzJ9bOkbIK79qlxIeya6m2aUx91NnDa3RpUu2g9ureTXyd9Fd8o56lsooNvJMNhgiN)**

Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded ****_entirely_**** by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** **[Patriot, as we look ahead to this historic event, can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5Cq2TKnbWtv6kHVRsE_j-O9Sc9g-0jSHH9qM3P49IK2_Zkj8BKeUPNf56Kn90qT2D1_7nAVJc7MSx_DwtlmEOnvdT3wJ5XOD5duEimfUQ2oH3RvZECkIcbKY7f1dmEkral7AJHlxVQNio38ZGk0WC3Bqw0GEP92vO3nPBwK0KX62znGk17Y99HajTzIoKT5Xyd_SmVOU7qVFAIZpoB-kd_qwJ4icO7mPUbuCyylQhUniBY4AKB6wkvqW7DAaDbHknZeP4TEsGUpzWAMsVtm-Hs8oQscP9tIqIRaGWEB460RUjjhDV6QBzXVHDXclHQ1HyHYIH286oYECrCQfVZ8UFKobTUXaWZ80vPXJluBe1Xj0u6A_ProTTApNH87aU553oUDqPRrFVS0Qxs8BUkf9MfmB4X06cC4eEfJFcT8XXEVGZSAOmoLsN1eQF97Lf-8NjH)[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5CVpNqOCWv8LCuFAlKv3nuGqa5Z7957RguvfP7MGfUDMj4O3bnkTa-AUyQdew1ESeLk94yfLhX4JLBUGlb5fmHpGKnSpKiQbe5-HQ1kNtYXK1nZDQi_FXL0uUV3bOY2wtmxMnzSgrmAPTX-s1-LhaYEemhjZi53AFZNM2PZWMLZ44GIfsexQNjIIdYRZQlo0Zy-AxzGdkvIHlx-yHU1Ic7O_phAiUFJhhO-2vUdnLJ9QoAFCvN7Jpo2ODF1oGH9pUGCy5VUtvmwSRctaUECKiE47VAMHe2KIn-ihMT-ARa8HclhzYfH9UiyEJs-F_0GdIv0MRMtNERFY6bK8NnOKyKCz4XJmKNT8-C2W93V4Z-1XLUU189Pq0fJgz-JbN2GSRvJK8vRySV-K82oC-WNmZy0pk7ckoL06oUB1a9ZPtMG6jPEcSB1xjjHIClC-8MaOnj)**

| | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult.

On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America’s 250****th****birthday.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=662ce6426f82400a9009e787c92667c4&_e=H9HD0EIoQD4Goy9hE7h0mhYvX6qRYlDFdzzZ-wCxLAOunwn7alqSGS5XlI3YHZN0GeyCGkbAXlqt79KZUaUuPzYSHqxgBs0ysqr58mRzqv_qeWPngtXvkUq_RV7uJC65Nf_4sOkbFSFzzNDOSucP6AZyqRTtEvxNYwueQexzBaaR_1yqKZuQZtu4v0TJeLuGPcDnCjBI4mamUZfi8MQwxVAkX_9RXcX8RIDbMORUQVm52O-e2F6wefeI9NYP1_5CtygigdDlNb6JV-CKaauVwoY2gPtnAdhcF__7KGb6afUze4g9PJJU4RzsECchjTLsOOG8BELKj7K6-k0MvKHJ7E39ey-f9COUCT9rmFR_JeHnbhun1ieip19MdUAhuxa5pu1VNQQj8wNtAcAeHvr6jQGkuKi3T23DzT5t07ljArkYe5InMIU7u8PMKfTE9X22ZtMTdALXu16U_0voGkba_D-UzJGlmT7LKf_7uXadGtxEXZgztkVRqyTi1rXc1k6PuVpdG2lnmdCKU8WU64VSNMt_VQnqts1N8inmTT0z1TnF9KwH6YezDzF8tHbj_d1sFZaHxsDm0cdBHJk6u2S3qtOEN9LK24c_4y0Xx1cDmLwjEy3TaCUtALt7qGGyA3xX4-hHien91LjzQPH5N8uoMM7vZJO0zT-C2I5wX-tOybsjOqYvqDz-ZN0jO6qeqaGT)

Gary Sinise
Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: | | | Patriot, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade P.S. Patriot, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: | | | Friend — Let’s be honest about what’s going on. Billionaires and corporate CEOs are getting richer than ever... while working people are drowning in the cost of rent, groceries, and healthcare. That’s not an accident. It’s a rigged system. Bought-and-paid-for politicians in Washington are protecting corporate profits. MAGA Republicans are making it worse by pushing tax breaks for the wealthy, attacking workers’ rights, going after immigrants, and trying to rip away healthcare and basic freedoms. I’m running for Congress to stop these Trump sycophants, and to build something better. No corporate PAC money. No billionaire donors. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We need higher wages. We need Medicare for All. We need to protect our rights, our unions, and our democracy. And we need Democratic leaders who won’t back down to extremists or sell out to corporate interests. Thanks for your support Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My letter to Speaker Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
The American people deserve solutions. Following this month’s horrific mass shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, Speaker Mike Johnson declined my request to talk about how we can set politics aside to save lives from gun violence.
I am disappointed, but I will not be deterred. Please read my letter to Speaker Mike Johnson below. Thank you.
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q22026.j3JysD&refcode=em260425-1-b&t=1&akid=11420%2E3935704%2E9iYYYv)**
* * *
_April 2026_
Gabrielle Giffords
Tucson, Arizona
The Honorable Mike Johnson
Speaker
U.S. House of Representatives
Dear Speaker Johnson,
It is with an increasingly heavy heart and a growing sense of urgency that I write to you today. As a former House member, a gunshot survivor, a gun owner, and an advocate, I am seeking your partnership in solving a national crisis. Eight beautiful young children were killed last weekend in Shreveport, part of the community you represent and the state you call home. I want us to work together to ensure it never happens again. I mourn for your constituents, as I trust you do, and I know there are bipartisan reforms that can save lives.
I hoped to discuss this with you on the telephone and was disappointed when you declined my request. But I will not be deterred. The work of saving lives is far too important.
As Speaker of the House of Representatives, your position affords you the rare opportunity to rise above partisanship and advance effective, bipartisan solutions that prevent suffering and save the lives of countless innocent people. As a man of faith, I know you understand in your heart how meaningful that would be.
Eight young children were murdered in your hometown. Upon your election as Speaker, you said: “God is the one who raises up those in authority.” That’s a powerful sentiment, and you must understand that it is in moments like these where faith requires believers to stand up and lead. If not after a tragedy like this, when? For what other purpose were you raised to authority?
Few elected officials leave office on their own terms. I didn’t. Political careers can be short, but legacies last forever—they outlast Congresses, presidencies, and political movements.
You have a chance I never had, the opportunity to knowingly shape your legislative legacy before the story of your career is defined by circumstances outside your control.
There is, right now, bipartisan legislation that is ready to advance. Federal legislation that can take us closer to saving lives and ensuring our children once again feel safe walking down the street, playing in the park, and sitting in their classrooms, particularly in communities with many Black families, like Shreveport, that are disproportionately impacted by gun violence.
Right now, we could work together to enact popular legislation to fight the trafficking of stolen guns, protect victims of domestic violence from abusive partners, and fund the Byrne State Crisis Intervention Program, which supports not only violence intervention programs but also mental health and veterans services. All of these would make a meaningful difference in the lives of Louisianans and Americans.
You and I will never agree on everything, and that’s okay. But I bet that if we work together, we can agree on _something._
I remain ready to speak at any time. The stakes are too high for silence.
Sincerely,
Gabrielle Giffords
**Please, take a minute to read this...**
As a victim of gun violence, Gabby Giffords has led the fight to save lives for more than a decade, but she can’t do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**

**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q22026.j3JysD&refcode=em260425-1-b&t=2&akid=11420%2E3935704%2E9iYYYv)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=11420%2E3935704%2E9iYYYv) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Riley HQ
subject: Making sure you got this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress

Peter,

It’s Jessie, Josh’s Finance Director, with an urgent check-in. We are now in the critical stretch before our deadline, and I want to share exactly where your money goes when you donate to this campaign:

**➡️ **Defending against massive MAGA attacks. This year, Trump personally targeted Josh with his MAGA Majority Project, and Mike Johnson’s allies are running a $10 million ad blitz attacking him. Your donation helps fund the rapid response needed to counter these attacks and keep our momentum strong.

**➡️ **Expanding our grassroots field program. This means growing our team, knocking on doors, and ensuring Josh is traveling across NY-19 to reach every single voter in the district.

We are one of the most competitive races in the country, and we have to hit this $40,000 goal.

body:

Peter,

We need to talk to you about what just happened in Virginia. And we need you to understand exactly what it means for every state in this country, including yours.

**Virginia Democrats just passed a referendum to gerrymander 4 congressional seats away from Republicans.**

Four seats. Gone. Redrawn.

To make matters even worse, we offered to help organizations in Virginia fight this referendum. And we were denied! They did not want to support us financially.

Here's why this is important to you.

Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger is already going on the news saying Democrats will do this in all 50 states the moment they win back the House.

All 50 states!

That is not a threat buried in a policy memo. That is an elected official -- the Governor of Virginia -- announcing the Left's playbook on the record. They are not hiding it anymore. They know that if they can redraw the map, they will not need to win the argument. They will just eliminate the competition.

Here is the truth:

If this is what Democrats are willing to do right now -- out of power, in a single state -- just imagine what they will do if they reclaim the White House and Congress.

So here is where we stand right now.

**Turning Point PAC is hiring 700 NEW ballot chasers to deploy across Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire -- the three states that will decide whether Republicans hold the House and win the presidency in 2028.**

But we need to fund them. Right now.

Every $50 we raise keeps a ballot chaser in the field for one full day -- knocking doors, building relationships, chasing every ballot before Democrats can game the system any further.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Peter, We need to talk to you about what just happened in Virginia. And we need you to understand exactly what it means for every state in this country, including yours. Virginia Democrats just passed a referendum to gerrymander 4 congressional seats away from Republicans. Four seats. Gone. Redrawn. To make matters even worse, we offered to help organizations in Virginia fight this referendum. And we were denied! They did not want to support us financially. Here's why this is important to you. Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger is already going on the news saying Democrats will do this in all 50 states the moment they win back the House. All 50 states! That is not a threat buried in a policy memo. That is an elected official -- the Governor of Virginia -- announcing the Left's playbook on the record. They are not hiding it anymore. They know that if they can redraw the map, they will not need to win the argument. They will just eliminate the competition. Here is the truth: If this is what Democrats are willing to do right now -- out of power, in a single state -- just imagine what they will do if they reclaim the White House and Congress. So here is where we stand right now. Turning Point PAC is hiring 700 NEW ballot chasers to deploy across Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire -- the three states that will decide whether Republicans hold the House and win the presidency in 2028. But we need to fund them. Right now. Every $50 we raise keeps a ballot chaser in the field for one full day -- knocking doors, building relationships, chasing every ballot before Democrats can game the system any further. The Red Wall starts in 2026. Help us build it. For America and for Charlie, Tyler Bowyer Executive Director Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: We’re lowering our ask to just $1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

Can we be straight up with you?

Our grassroots fundraising slowed down this month, more than we expected.
While we don’t want to panic or overdramatize this, we do need to be
realistic about what it means.

Abdul is the strongest pro-worker candidate in this race. He’s polling
well. He’s building real momentum.

But because of that, powerful interests are paying close attention —
including corporate PACs and groups like AIPAC that are preparing to spend
big to stop our campaign.

So, we’re lowering our ask to just $1. Yes, really.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20260425-1-ak.bSmzNO&refcode=em20260425-2056&t=1004&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD ]If you can spare $1 or more, you can help us show that a campaign 100%
powered by the people has what it takes to win. Can we count on your
support, Peter?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20260425-1-ak.bSmzNO&refcode=em20260425-2056&t=1023&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD ]Donate $1 ››

Remember: Abdul is the only candidate in this race who’s never taken
corporate PAC money, and never will.

That means we rely on everyday people to fuel our campaign — not powerful
groups trying to buy influence. It also means Abdul can speak clearly
about Medicare for All, civil liberties, and the issues that matter most
to us, even when it makes special interests uncomfortable.

Corporate PACs and MAGA Republicans are betting against us. They’re hoping
our momentum slows just enough for them to drown us out with attack ads.

We can’t afford to let that happen.

So we’re asking, humbly and directly: [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/547?c0=em-ms-aes-20260425-1-ak.bSmzNO&refcode=em20260425-2056&t=1024&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD ]Can you chip in $1 — or whatever
feels right to you today — to help keep this people-powered campaign on
track?

Thanks so much,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this help us stay connected with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for taking the time to read this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1025&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1026&akid=2063%2E251025%2E0Y1kVD

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com
Volunteer: https://go.abdulforsenate.com/join

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: The Democrats
subject: Narrowing the gap
body:
---
Derek, We’re going to try something a little different today. Is there anything we can say to earn your support before our April FEC deadline? **What if we told you that this week, Team DNC was out knocking doors in Virginia to reach voters ahead of a critical special election?** We know that reaching voters on the ground, in their communities is what it takes to win. And every victory we have leading up to the midterms, including our victory in VA this week, is proof of that. **What if we reminded you that the DNC is the _only_ organization working year-round to elect Democrats from _every state_ at _every level_ of government?** That’s why reaching as many grassroots supporters as possible is so critical leading up to November. **Finally, what if we told you that the closer we get to the midterms, the more dark money Republicans will be funneling into attack ads against Democrats?** If we’re able to narrow the cash advantage that Republicans have, we’ll show Trump and his cronies that Democrats are coming for their majority in November, **_and we’re playing to win._** [**With that in mind, will you chip in $7 to the DNC today? _The Cook Political Report just increased our chances of defeating Republican billionaire Senator Pete Ricketts in Nebraska this November._ **This is MASSIVE news, and it proves that all of the polls are correct: Nebraska is once again _officially_ on the Senate map. We can win this Senate seat and defeat Republican Pete Ricketts!** [**This is a game-changer for our race, so I need your help to capture the momentum. I'll call it out. Every time.

No apologies.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2026 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

subject: There is a real path to flip the Senate this year... but only if Democrats have the resources to compete everywhere.

body:
That's where you come in, Peter
#
Peter,
**A year ago, we were bracing for a tough cycle.** Democrats needed to defend seats already held by Democrats in Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire. We thought maybe, just maybe, Democrats would have a path to flip Maine or North Carolina.
**But after Trump’s second term has brought us skyrocketing costs, a pointless overseas war, and chaos here at home, he’s less popular than ever – and it’s hurting GOP candidates everywhere.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103170?refcode=em20260425-10354&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10354%2E614464%2EyGLNkt)
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS EVERYWHERE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103170?refcode=em20260425-10354&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10354%2E614464%2EyGLNkt)**
So now, Democrats aren’t just playing defense – it’s time to go on offense. Ohio is winnable. Alaska is closer than anyone expected. Iowa is seriously competitive. And a surprise GOP retirement just put Montana in play. And the map just keeps on growing.
**There is a real path to flip the Senate this year – but only if Democrats have the resources to compete everywhere.**
**[Will you rush $15 or more right now to help us support Democrats running in competitive races across the country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103170?refcode=em20260425-10354&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10354%2E614464%2EyGLNkt)**

clean_body: That's where you come in, Peter Peter, A year ago, we were bracing for a tough cycle. Democrats needed to defend seats already held by Democrats in Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire. We thought maybe, just maybe, Democrats would have a path to flip Maine or North Carolina. But after Trump’s second term has brought us skyrocketing costs, a pointless overseas war, and chaos here at home, he’s less popular than ever – and it’s hurting GOP candidates everywhere. So now, Democrats aren’t just playing defense – it’s time to go on offense. Ohio is winnable. Alaska is closer than anyone expected. Iowa is seriously competitive. And a surprise GOP retirement just put Montana in play. And the map just keeps on growing. There is a real path to flip the Senate this year – but only if Democrats have the resources to compete everywhere. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We couldn’t do this without you! Thanks for all your help. – SDC HQ Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Refusing to accept the status quo as “good enough”
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260425-2193-foote&t=1001&akid=2193%2E342411%2EB-S4z7 ]Squad Victory Fund

Housing. Paid leave. Healthcare. Student debt.

These are just a few of the urgent issues that should be at the top of the
agenda for anyone leading this country,
Peter.

Instead, Donald Trump is spending at least $2 billion a day on a reckless,
illegal war effort that is putting both service members and civilians at
risk. It’s a misuse of power that is dangerous and shameful.

While that happens, communities across the country are still waiting for
real solutions. Families are struggling with rising rents, inadequate
healthcare, crushing student debt, and the lack of basic protections like
paid leave.

That’s why Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are fighting every day
for bold, progressive change. They’re not afraid to speak out, challenge
entrenched power, and push for policies that put working people first.

And that’s exactly what they’re doing — organizing, legislating, and
refusing to accept the status quo as "good enough."

The Squad Victory Fund exists to support our progressive leaders and
ensure they have the resources they need to keep fighting for all of us in
the halls of Congress. But real change takes sustained support from people
like you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260425-movement.0sFCjz&refcode=em20260425-2193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2193%2E342411%2EB-S4z7 ]Will you chip in $3 today to keep this movement going
and ensure our Squad has what they need to stand up to Trump and fight for
the policies our communities deserve? Every contribution builds a
stronger, more just future.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260425-movement.0sFCjz&refcode=em20260425-2193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=2193%2E342411%2EB-S4z7 ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2193%2E342411%2EB-S4z7

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Not even $50.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
I’ll get straight to it.
A new poll shows Zach Wahls trailing Republican Ashley Hinson by just 2 points.
In a statewide Senate race. In Iowa!
If Democrats are going to retake the majority, it will require winning races exactly like this one. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between Zach Wahls and Resist Reclaim Rebuild right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
DONATE NOW TO FLIP IOWA BLUE! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
Here’s the math: Democrats need a net gain to retake the Senate majority. There are only a handful of true pickup opportunities in the entire country this cycle, and this poll shows that Iowa is one of them.
Trump carried the state by double digits in 2024, but now, Wahls has narrowed that lead to 2. That’s why this race matters so much.
As someone who has spent a lot of time campaigning in Iowa, I know Zach has what it takes to win. Zach isn’t some placeholder candidate. He’s a 6th-generation Iowan who has spent his career standing up for working families and taking on powerful interests. He’s built real grassroots support without taking a cent from corporate PACs.
And now he’s within 2 points.
But here’s what I’ve learned over decades in politics: when a Democrat gets this close in a red-leaning state, national Republicans don’t sit back. They flood the zone with money and try to shut it down early.
If Zach has the resources to define this race, expand outreach, and reach persuadable voters before outside money drowns him out, he can win. If he doesn’t, Republicans will try to bury this opportunity before it fully takes shape.
Zach can win this race. But he cannot do it alone.
If you care about Democrats retaking the Senate, I’m asking you to split a contribution between Zach Wahls’ campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP DEMS WIN! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-wahls]
Iowa is in play. Let’s not miss this opportunity.
Howard Dean

Now, you might be thinking:_Just five bucks? What's that going to do?_
And I can't argue with that – $5 really isn't much. But here's how it can have a huge impact:
When you combine it with the $5 donated by a nurse in Pueblo, then the other $5 from a ski instructor in Monarch, the $5 from a ranch hand in Akron, the $5 from a geologist in Colorado Springs and so on ... all those $5 donations start to add up quick.
Since I don't take a nickel from corporate PACs, this campaign's power lies with people like you chipping in [_$5_ , _$15_ , _$50_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149426/616796978/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1384-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08IVkQLiBSuz0ML-9Q9JnhyT3jX5Ij6RB4J1K86BDow=) or whatever you can spare on a given day.
No matter how much you give, every single cent of it is put to work to help me meet voters face-to-face, get ads on the air and phone screens and continue building our momentum across all four corners of the state.
**But it's going to take a lot of $5 contributions to _win_ this race the right way **– especially once we have to face the MAGA-allied war chests that'll drop millions to help my GOP opponent defeat our grassroots campaign.
**_[It all starts with your $5, though, friend – so can I please count on your help today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149427/616796979/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1384-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08IVkQLiBSuz0ML-9Q9JnhyT3jX5Ij6RB4J1K86BDow=)_**

clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'm asking you to = to my campaign for governor of Colorado today. Now, you might be thinking:Just five bucks? What's that going to do? And I can't argue with that – $5 really isn't much. But here's how it can have a huge impact: When you combine it with the $5 donated by a nurse in Pueblo, then the other $5 from a ski instructor in Monarch, the $5 from a ranch hand in Akron, the $5 from a geologist in Colorado Springs and so on ... all those $5 donations start to add up quick. Since I don't take a nickel from corporate PACs, this campaign's power lies with people like you chipping in = or whatever you can spare on a given day. No matter how much you give, every single cent of it is put to work to help me meet voters face-to-face, get ads on the air and phone screens and continue building our momentum across all four corners of the state. But it's going to take a lot of $5 contributions to win this race the right way – especially once we have to face the MAGA-allied war chests that'll drop millions to help my GOP opponent defeat our grassroots campaign. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything, as always. body:
Trump is changing the rules to help the GOP win
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149432/616796986/-1975233963?amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk5755-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB6-eZhJ_z4WGVmzMeA1lM_x5hjAXXJWu_p7JWKrcFg=)
---
Friend,
Instead of fixing skyrocketing costs of health care, gas, and groceries, President Trump and the GOP are trying to stop people from voting so they can increase their odds in this year’s midterms.
The _SAVE Act_ they’re pushing through Congress would:
* Create a federal voter surveillance database
* Ban universal mail voting and online voter registration
* Prevent states from counting mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day
* Require proof of citizenship to register and a photo ID to vote
* Mandate purges of voter rolls

The restrictions in this bill are so severe that a woman who changes her last name after marriage could be barred from voting because her last name doesn’t match her birth certificate. **That one issue affects 69 million married women.**
The _SAVE Act_ would also effectively impose a **poll tax on millions of eligible Americans** who would need to get proof of citizenship to vote. Its **ban on universal mail voting** would cause election chaos in universal vote-by-mail states like Nevada. And I don’t trust what would happen if we **handed all our voter data to the federal government** while it is led by a corrupt President who has already tried to overturn the results of free and fair elections.
**With Trump and the GOP looking to use the _SAVE Act_ to prevent people from voting and boost their chances in the midterms, I’m looking for 10,000 supporters like you to speak out against it before midnight. [Will you please sign my petition now to make it clear that you oppose the _SAVE Act_ and will not stand for Trump and the GOP's attempts to limit our right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149433/616796987/-1764989439?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk5755-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB6-eZhJ_z4WGVmzMeA1lM_x5hjAXXJWu_p7JWKrcFg=&emci=eedb873a-eb3f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=fe9e9525-b840-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=3800590)**

Jacky

Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most.

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP.

**[Will you chip in now to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149436/616796990/-2104487471?refcode=footer&code=jtk5755-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB6-eZhJ_z4WGVmzMeA1lM_x5hjAXXJWu_p7JWKrcFg=)** You can also **[text JACKY to 30508](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130149437/616796991/-2104487471?refcode=footer&code=jtk5755-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTllOTUyNS1iODQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB6-eZhJ_z4WGVmzMeA1lM_x5hjAXXJWu_p7JWKrcFg=)** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign.

| | Friend, I have spent my life here in North Carolina. I was born in **Whiteville** , grew up in **Arcadia** , and graduated from **UNC Charlotte**.**** I married my wife Rachel in **Hickory,** and today we are raising our two incredible daughters in **Advance**. This isn’t just where I live—it’s who I am. North Carolina values matter. Faith. Family. Hard work. Personal responsibility. And the belief that if you fight for your community, you can make it stronger. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I have spent my life here in North Carolina. I was born in Whiteville , grew up in Arcadia , and graduated from UNC Charlotte.** I married my wife Rachel in Hickory, and today we are raising our two incredible daughters in Advance. This isn’t just where I live—it’s who I am. North Carolina values matter. Faith. Family. Hard work. Personal responsibility. And the belief that if you fight for your community, you can make it stronger. Now, as a husband, a father, and your Congressman, I’m more committed than ever to defend those values and deliver real results for North Carolina families. We’re at a turning point in this country—the beginning of a great American comeback—and we’re fighting every day to keep it going. We’re less than seven months from the midterms , and national Democrats are coming after North Carolina harder than ever. I’m fighting for the same values I was raised on—and the same future I want for my daughters growing up right here in North Carolina. If you believe in those values too, Stand with us. Chip in today and help us keep fighting for North Carolina’s future. Sincerely, Addison McDowellCongressman, North Carolina’s 6th District | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by McDowell for Congress Copyright(C) 2026 McDowell for Congress Our mailing address is:** McDowell for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . name: Team Moore
subject: Calling out MAGA B.S.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)
MAGA is currently running a crazy play in Maryland. But we’ve seen it play out across the country **_and we won’t be fooled._**
Do you know this guy?
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-1.hOvLlv&refcode=em-20260425-1&t=2&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)
The owner of the Baltimore Sun, **David Smith** , is a Trump-allied member of the billionaire family that runs Sinclair TV. **And he’s using the Sun and his TV stations to attack Wes Moore.**
But this isn’t unique to Maryland. Sinclair has used their reach to run pro-Trump propaganda across the country, consolidate their power, and hide their agenda behind the credibility of formerly legitimate institutions.
It’s partisan hackery pretending to be journalism, and now, the same guy is using the Baltimore Sun to flood the zone with right-wing slop right here in Maryland.
This could spread to every corner of the country, so we’re calling out this MAGA B.S. wherever we see it.
**[We need your help to stand up to this propaganda. We can only make sure our message gets out if enough grassroots supporters step up today-- so will you chip in to help re-elect Wes Moore? ](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-1.hOvLlv&refcode=em-20260425-1&t=3&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-1.hOvLlv&amount=5&refcode=em-20260425-1&t=22&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)**
Thanks for all that you do,
Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260425-1&t=23&refcode2=1321_1086043_UDI5Ps&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)**
**[Volunteer »](https://support.wesmoore.com/a/volunteer?source=em-20260425-1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1321%2E1086043%2EUDI5Ps)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I refuse to back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I know you're busy, friend

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=9173%2E400544%2ERAUd_5)
---
Friend, I know you're probably busy, so I'll cut right to the chase: **[With my end-of-month deadline quickly approaching, I'm writing today to ask you for $5 to power my campaign for Governor.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8069?t=2&akid=9173%2E400544%2ERAUd_5)**
$5 because Fox News has named our race a top pickup opportunity for the GOP.

$5 because several of my GOP opponents are self-funding their campaigns, willing to spend whatever it takes to bring their extremist agenda to our state.

$5 because this administration is doing everything in its power to attack our communities, roll back our rights, and undermine our democracy.

$5 because governors are the last line of defense when this administration abuses its power.
With our neighbors under attack, I refuse to back down.

My vision for New Mexico includes higher wages, safe communities, strong education, access to parks, affordable and healthy food to eat, and more._And I will always hold this administration accountable._

**But in order to deliver on this, I need your help.**
**_[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me become Governor of New Mexico, stand up against Trump's attacks, and move us toward a future where everyone can thrive?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8065?t=3&akid=9173%2E400544%2ERAUd_5)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8066?t=4&akid=9173%2E400544%2ERAUd_5)

Deb

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: SIGN my emergency petition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
FCC Chair Brendan Carr has disgraced his office.

---
| | | Peter, I’ll cut to the chase: I called on the FCC Chair to resign immediately. Brendan Carr has disgraced his office and abused his power. [Now, I’m asking for your help to reach 10,000 signatures before midnight to send far-right extremists a powerful message that the American people won’t bend the knee to Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130153100/616802223/-1696010785?source=20260425_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGEyM2U5MC1iOTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzIhtz8aNB7xWrbHNJniobVF5WwiU2V4j6OIHjZIcrs=&emci=832751e8-203f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=28a23e90-b940-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21290350) [_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We can’t let Republicans trample our First Amendment rights, censor artists and cancel shows they don’t like. Peter, Donald Trump is clearly the malignant King of Cancel Culture.
He has no respect for the First Amendment – and neither does his hand-picked FCC Chair Brendan Carr.
[That’s why I called for Carr’s immediate resignation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130153104/616802227/-1696010785?source=20260425_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGEyM2U5MC1iOTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzIhtz8aNB7xWrbHNJniobVF5WwiU2V4j6OIHjZIcrs=&emci=832751e8-203f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=28a23e90-b940-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21290350)
One thing couldn’t be clearer: Brendan Carr has lost all credibility to lead the Federal Communications Commission.
[_I’m calling for 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition before midnight to demand Trump’s disgraced FCC Chair resign immediately >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130153105/616802228/-1696010785?source=20260425_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGEyM2U5MC1iOTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzIhtz8aNB7xWrbHNJniobVF5WwiU2V4j6OIHjZIcrs=&emci=832751e8-203f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=28a23e90-b940-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=21290350)
The integrity of our institutions – and of our democracy – hangs in the balance.
I’m counting on your support to prove the American people won’t stand for the Trump administration’s rampage against our First Amendment rights.
Will you sign immediately?
Keep the faith,
Hakeem

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: The truth about RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team,**** here's the truth about RFK Jr:
1. He backs cuts to SNAP, leaving millions hungry.
2. His “Make America Healthy Again” slogan is just that — a slogan that has yet to translate into real policy solutions.
3. And rather than focusing on improving public health, he’s off recording videos with MAGA mascot Kid Rock.

**RFK Jr. isn’t just an inept, ego-driven jerk. He’s a cynical charlatan who has surrounded himself with quacks and conspiracy theorists. He has no business being in a position of power — but Trump’s Senate put him there anyway.**

America isn’t any healthier, and healthy food is even more expensive under RFK Jr’s tenure. When given the opportunity to have a real impact and stop companies from releasing toxic chemicals, he caved under pressure.

Republicans know he is unfit to serve, but they refuse to do anything to stop him. I’ve been holding him accountable at every turn, but the only way we put him in check is to flip the Senate blue.

[**_Will you please rush a $5 or more donation right now to support my efforts to elect the next wave of Democrats who are ready to put an end to RFK Jr’s antics?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130154357/616804901/1146729020?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_RFK-Truth_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzFjZWUxMy1iYzQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOhQprwMvS1zIx3EDXWi72goV0dLrKxKIgHDi1fYTao=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | **[ DONATE $5 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130154358/616804902/1146729020?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_RFK-Truth_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzFjZWUxMy1iYzQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOhQprwMvS1zIx3EDXWi72goV0dLrKxKIgHDi1fYTao=)**

clean_body: Team,** here's the truth about RFK Jr: 1. He backs cuts to SNAP, leaving millions hungry. 2. His “Make America Healthy Again” slogan is just that — a slogan that has yet to translate into real policy solutions. 3. And rather than focusing on improving public health, he’s off recording videos with MAGA mascot Kid Rock. RFK Jr. isn’t just an inept, ego-driven jerk. He’s a cynical charlatan who has surrounded himself with quacks and conspiracy theorists. He has no business being in a position of power — but Trump’s Senate put him there anyway. America isn’t any healthier, and healthy food is even more expensive under RFK Jr’s tenure. When given the opportunity to have a real impact and stop companies from releasing toxic chemicals, he caved under pressure. Republicans know he is unfit to serve, but they refuse to do anything to stop him. I’ve been holding him accountable at every turn, but the only way we put him in check is to flip the Senate blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = He’s done enough damage. As your attorney general, Phil has protected Coloradans’ rights and put money back in your pockets. As governor, he will:
→ Tackle **the affordability crisis** — from housing, to child care, to health care.
→ **Stand up** to the Trump administration’s bullying — _no matter what it takes to get justice for Coloradans._
→ **Hit the ground running** — no learning curve for Phil, thanks to his experience in state government.

California Governor candidate and pro-Trump Sheriff Chad Bianco **[fired back at Democrat candidate Katie Porter](https://substack.com/redirect/17436aae-6e16-4425-8555-2a40ce23c84f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for her non-stop nagging towards President Trump during a tense gubernatorial debate.
"That's not even close to what I said!" Bianco told Porter. "I have 33 years of dealing with the consequences of the Democrats' poor policies! The people who are hurting California are Democrats, it's not Donald Trump!"
## [WATCH: This didn't go well for Porter:](https://substack.com/redirect/17436aae-6e16-4425-8555-2a40ce23c84f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/17436aae-6e16-4425-8555-2a40ce23c84f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/17436aae-6e16-4425-8555-2a40ce23c84f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Sponsored by Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/e5af3d04-79e1-4066-983a-02ec071c1941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Scandal RFK Jr Exposed Keeps Getting Worse and WORSE
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5af3d04-79e1-4066-983a-02ec071c1941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **[Click here to discover what the scandal is.](https://substack.com/redirect/e5af3d04-79e1-4066-983a-02ec071c1941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/e5af3d04-79e1-4066-983a-02ec071c1941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **SPLC paid white nationalist informant $1M+ to infiltrate group it had already declared "almost irrelevant"**
The Southern Poverty Law Center **[reportedly paid a National Alliance member over $1 million over nine years](https://substack.com/redirect/8df32dd6-1e04-41e0-bd12-a7fe5d1a99e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to engage in activities including breaking into the group's headquarters to steal 25 boxes of documents that were photocopied and distributed to the SPLC for its reports, according to a federal indictment announced Tuesday charging the nonprofit with wire fraud, false statements to a federally insured bank, and conspiracy to commit concealment money laundering.
The Washington Examiner's Sarah Bedford noted **[the SPLC shelled out the $1 million to infiltrate the group](https://substack.com/redirect/e64b2279-c558-4961-ab17-a50e28dc5a2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after declaring it "effectively dead years earlier."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8df32dd6-1e04-41e0-bd12-a7fe5d1a99e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **SPLC 's own website contradicts the spending**: The SPLC's webpage about the National Alliance designated it a hate group that was "for decades the most dangerous and best organized neo-Nazi formation in America," but noted that by 2007 the group was on the decline and "had become almost irrelevant" by 2009--raising questions about why the nonprofit continued paying the informant through a nine-year period.

* **FBI Director: SPLC "lied to donors" while funding extremists**: FBI Director Kash Patel said Tuesday "They lied to their donors, vowing to dismantle violent extremist groups, and actually turned around and paid the leaders of these very extremist groups--even utilizing the funds to have these groups facilitate the commission of state and federal crimes." The National Alliance has been "closely associated with a litany of violent attacks since the 1980s, including a 1999 multi-state shooting spree targeting minorities and Jewish Americans, and the 1995 Oklahoma City bombing," while several big-name SPLC donors have remained silent since the indictment.

* * *
# **Iran leaves Pakistan without meeting US negotiators, throwing second round of talks into question**
Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and his delegation left for the airport Saturday around 6 p.m. local time after meetings with Pakistani mediators Field Marshal Asim Munir and PM Shehbaz Sharif--**[but not with US negotiators](https://substack.com/redirect/60ef3152-eb9c-43f3-9e6b-205d680a454d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite White House claims.
* **White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said Friday** that Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner would leave for "direct talks" with Tehran in Pakistan on Saturday, claiming "The Iranians reached out--as the president called on them to do--and asked for this in-person conversation," but Iran has consistently said it would only attend bilateral meetings with Pakistanis, not the United States.

* **Confusion over whether talks are happening** : Leavitt's Friday announcement left "Islamabad--and the world--buzzing" about a potential extended visit for new talks, but the White House has not responded to requests for comment about whether the Witkoff-Kushner trip is still on or what time they would leave. Iran continues to publicly claim they have no round two talks planned with the US.
* **What 's next**: The Iranian departure "does not necessarily mean a second round of talks is dead"--Tehran previously said it would visit Oman and Russia after Islamabad discussions, where they may seek support while preparing a new proposal for the US. If an arrangement is reached, Iran may travel back to Islamabad for another round of peace talks, but Iran has so far not publicly agreed to round two.

* * *
# **Trump attends White House Correspondents ' Dinner for first time as president after boycotting for years**
President Donald Trump **[is attending Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner ](https://substack.com/redirect/a6baea8f-acf9-43a8-8091-de020204c63d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**at the Washington Hilton for the first time as commander-in-chief after boycotting the annual event last year and each year during his first term, posting on Truth Social last month that it would be his "Honor to accept" the WHCA's invitation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a6baea8f-acf9-43a8-8091-de020204c63d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **WHCA president Weijia Jiang said** "We're happy the president has accepted our invitation and look forward to hosting him,."
* **200+ journalists demand WHCA "call out" Trump**: Despite Trump's acceptance, hundreds of journalists signed an open letter urging the WHCA to "forcefully demonstrate opposition" to Trump's "efforts to trample freedom of the press," saying his "systematic, sustained, and unprecedented attacks on the free press... render his presence at such an event a profound contradiction of its purpose."
* **Trump 's complicated WHCD history**: Trump last attended as a private citizen in 2011 during the Obama administration, when Obama joked about him and showed an image of the White House rebranded as "Trump White House Hotel Casino Golf Course" with gold columns and a chandelier. Trump actually has now begun to remodel the White House with a new ballroom under construction and added gold molding to the Oval Office.

Peter,

For too long, the medical establishment got away with mutilating children in the name of "gender-affirming care."

They gave puberty blockers to 13-year-olds, performed double mastectomies on 15-year-olds. And when the complications started -- when the regret set in -- the medical establishment walked away. _**No consequences. No accountability. Just billions in profit.**_

[_**The Chloe Cole Act changes that.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/GboFV1b6XtD8Llka_kPYjnReaJoB2wSqJEYWt66p2UeEvvUskt_oQT-gHccvTDCKEibLynWxhMnS06-N0Xr_ZNPctQq8xDz8wcHgclh-1Dxz1oiwtyi8r0qs3XSkzSZbpt_25nUc6U8MT0atRuq6z-UrQg0m5eso4BGgKYOUfzyeckB5t57Npm3UwBBvyKa1LVF8wwWrd2HQAAtvjZy1nQ2eakr9PiVRsazNodi0YGwV2r3sh4NMVgvOeYPtleYZPNK3b6u9dVE64cGQabxhzS2XzCLtFZ-IIDqP3A6QVeZFX3rd7mouwcbHzHkD6ADjl1jSxQV83rgrbn6_C1ET_pW7SR4LtWRZNJthwCI0wUkGTjhpPCqj3LKU4rq0bEl3edGhUzayHBfxNyBSCppPTPPVwBf_0ZvSJnwqalZvar5PbVO-4droYY_Lg-jfN_Y9NYMH0Y64qIOwUcAEqgaGhCke4hFMp6otPUl2pj8MKvmOuHYsLz5gca-fa7jICGcf9CvPNoIKIDQA3_SWK4E9WDkA3y49sQJNz49KgBRKxfEVEolKtvrN4iAtH4q2mfB43nQ5Tbj8dM0HG40YUGRbYr0582LpL7Jx5BtpSMjLt9YF_lib1iOytBfO5qp4HGuYKRHOCZg6HMvYmIPMPcWdQDEXe7b0jLwWNl78Ea6k2VDxxcyeMhpJGFmvzpt4CGqfsVVs/-uY7m6P0vG8K1I8Evwo9iHVJapBj1UQv/20)
