name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Public Health Cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | Friend, I recently went toe-to-toe with Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a House Education and Workforce Committee hearing where we confronted proposed budget cuts to mental health and gun violence prevention programs. **He finally admitted that gun violence is a public health crisis — a change in tune since his confirmation hearing. ** This is not a moment too soon. Firearms are now the leading cause of death for children and teenagers in this country. Since RFK was sworn in, our schools have endured 26 shootings and 240 reported discharges of firearms on school grounds — incidents stretching from Maryland and Michigan to Texas, Missouri, and Oklahoma. I pressed him with two urgent questions:
1. Why cut funding for trauma services, survivor support, and school‐based mental health for students affected by gun violence?
2. And what concrete actions has HHS taken to keep kids safe beyond commissioning yet another study?

His reply — that HHS is merely studying school shootings and what the shooters have in common — was unacceptable. When I was a teacher in Connecticut, our state saw one on the most horrific school shootings in our nation’s history. In the aftermath, our community worked tirelessly to invest in prevention and help our schools heal. This work matters. Our children deserve safe schools, reliable access to mental health and trauma support services, and leaders who treat their safety as the public health emergency it is. The NRCC has targeted our race, and outside groups will pour money into CT‐05. I represent everyone here, and I won’t let anyone endanger our children’s safety. [**Will you donate today, so I can keep fighting for safe schools and the mental‐health and survivor support our children need?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130164182/616829826/32036680?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTc2ZDI0MS1jYTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Va0Wd0aiPit7rrDk-ZEulLvCtdUomGA00Ry0g0IOEKA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130164184/616829828/32036680?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTc2ZDI0MS1jYTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Va0Wd0aiPit7rrDk-ZEulLvCtdUomGA00Ry0g0IOEKA=)

He finally admitted that gun violence is a public health crisis — a change in tune since his confirmation hearing. This is not a moment too soon. Firearms are now the leading cause of death for children and teenagers in this country. Since RFK was sworn in, our schools have endured 26 shootings and 240 reported discharges of firearms on school grounds — incidents stretching from Maryland and Michigan to Texas, Missouri, and Oklahoma. I pressed him with two urgent questions: 1. Why cut funding for trauma services, survivor support, and school‐based mental health for students affected by gun violence? 2. And what concrete actions has HHS taken to keep kids safe beyond commissioning yet another study? His reply — that HHS is merely studying school shootings and what the shooters have in common — was unacceptable. When I was a teacher in Connecticut, our state saw one on the most horrific school shootings in our nation’s history. In the aftermath, our community worked tirelessly to invest in prevention and help our schools heal. This work matters. Our children deserve safe schools, reliable access to mental health and trauma support services, and leaders who treat their safety as the public health emergency it is. The NRCC has targeted our race, and outside groups will pour money into CT‐05. I represent everyone here, and I won’t let anyone endanger our children’s safety. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I want to be very clear: the safety of children is a public health emergency. We cannot let inconsistencies go unchallenged. Thank you for standing with me as we demand accountability and prioritize the health of every student. Thank you for standing with me as we demand accountability and prioritize the health of every student. With gratitude, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you need to update your contact information, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Peter Willis,

Not long ago, the idea of flipping Texas blue felt impossible. But now
that moment is here.

Grassroots excitement is SURGING for James Talarico for Senate. He’s a
progressive champion who’s delivered for working families again and again.
But national Democrats are hesitating on whether to invest big in the race
– so it’s going to come down to ALL OF US to make sure we WIN.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37831?source=email-20240425&t=1061&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Headline: Dems aren't sure whether to actually spend big to flip Texas

Our Revolution is going all in to reach voters in corners of the state
that other groups have ignored for too long – training volunteers and
getting ready to hit the streets and the phone lines to have real
conversations with voters. We’ve used this playbook again and again and
know it works, but to pull it off, we need you with us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20240425nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Every $1 we raise allows us to reach a voter SIX times. Will you rush a
donation today to power our grassroots get-out-the-vote push for Talarico
and help us turn Texas blue for the first time in 30 years?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

James Talarico has a proven track record of fighting for working families,
standing up for public education, health care, and economic justice. He’s
not afraid to take on the billionaire mega-donors who have taken over
Texas and the rest of the country, which is EXACTLY why his opponents are
terrified.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37831?source=email-20240425&t=1060&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Headline: As Republican panic builds over James Talarico, operatives
set up Stop Talarico PAC

Talarico’s opponent in November isn’t yet decided as incumbent Sen. John
Cornyn and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton face a runoff next month. But
as Talarico’s momentum grows, Republicans are starting to panic, THROWING
money into the race.

That’s where Our Revolution comes in. We’re putting boots on the ground
across Texas to reach voters we can flip in red and rural areas who've
been ignored for too long.

And it isn’t just the Senate at stake. In Texas, we have a whole slate of
working-class fighters on the ballot — proven fighters like long-time Our
Revolution member Clayton Tucker for Agriculture Commissioner, Vikki
Goodwin for Lt. Gov., Sarah Eckhardt for Comptroller, and Freddie Haynes
for Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20240425nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Grassroots excitement is surging – and now we must match it with the
resources we need to win this fight. DONATE now to help us flip Texas and
elect a new generation of true progressive leaders!

Our movement’s fuel comes from you – not from billionaires or corporate
PACs. Every extra dollar we raise helps ramp up our get-out-the-vote push
– powering real conversations with key voters we need to turn out to win.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10605%2E5885482%2EOhbEv0 ]Website |

group in America.

establishment by committing to be a 2026 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

Team,

This election cycle is in full swing and we have strong Democrats running in all corners of the state, for all levels of government.

Our motto here at IDCCA is that all Democrats matter everywhere, so we’re fighting as hard as we can to elect as many Democrats as we can in every single zip code in November.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f15f72b2-ee52-418e-8b35-87943f457d21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you feel frustrated pray, scared pray, happy pray, anxious pray.

Last night I laid in bed tossing and turning at 4:20 am sleep evading me. Worrying about the rising cost of everything , how I was going to provide for my daughter and the upcoming election .

Everything was quite around me ( except my snoring dog at the foot of my bed). The world was quiet but why wasn't my mind?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nqBzvc5xxJmVRq3QF9HlR9Wicsb3A5cL0keC20F59Vw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=195457598)
Then I remembered a song as a kid from Bible class. ( He's got the whole world in His hands.) If I truly believe that as a follower then why is it my human instinct to still panic?

I know it's human nature. We think we are all alone in the world and no one else is feeling these stresses. But, Im not alone. Millions of people are probably feeling exactly the same.

So I decided to take a breath and pray. Pray for God to fill me with His peace. Peace that passes all understanding. As I prayed I felt my anxiety decrease and I finally drifted off to sleep.

I hope this is a help to someone who is feeling stresses of everyday life. You are not alone in this big world. God is walking beside you, holding your hand. He chases after us and loves us enough to never let go.

Cream Cheese Ball

INGREDIENTS

2 tsp seasoned salt
2 Tbs finely chopped onion
2 Tbs finely chopped celery
1 8oz can crushed pineapple drained.
2 cups of pecans finely chopped
2 8 oz packages of low fat cream cheese softened
1 square of Saran wrap

DIRECTIONS
* Mix all ingredients in a bowl minus 1 cup of pecans
* Tear off large square of Saran Wrap
* Spread remaining chopped nuts on square
* Lay the mixture on the nuts in a large ball.
* Make sure nuts are placed all over mixture
* Pull corners of Saran Wrap up and twist ends.

The mixture should look similar to a big soft ball. Place in a small bowl to help it become more round. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours. Place on a plate take off plastic and add crackers around for the garnish
Enjoy

body:
#
Breaking news, Peter: The Economist did a deep, data-driven analysis of the entire U.S. Senate map, **and it showed Texas is the third-most likely to flip.**
**[This is a must-win race if Democrats want to take back the Senate majority. Please make a contribution right now to help James Talarico win this seat.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260425-1-ak&t=1&akid=595%2E1347274%2Ex_zewq)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260425-1-ak&t=2&akid=595%2E1347274%2Ex_zewq)
Look, there is no doubt that the path to the majority is a difficult one. It requires winning really tough races like this one, but the massive grassroots movement we’ve built has put this seat in play.
The Economist’s analysis is built on more than 10,000 simulations of the November elections. Their model shows James Talarico has the third-best chance of any U.S. Senate candidate to flip a seat.
James’ message of taking on billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians is resonating all across Texas. But we need the resources to continue reaching every voter possible.
**[Will you please contribute to James Talarico’s campaign for the U.S. Senate? Our movement is going to need every possible resource to win in November.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260425-1-ak&t=3&akid=595%2E1347274%2Ex_zewq)**

subject: I’m so sorry to email you on a Saturday
body:
But tomorrow is the cutoff to respond!

| | | | Peter, I’m so sorry to email you like this, but tomorrow is the cutoff to respond, and your response was just flagged for me as **[MISSING]** from our database!

Do you approve of tapping into American energy resources?4.) Do you approve of using our military to address the border crisis?5.) Do you approve of ending taxes on tips?_*** Optional Question: Are there any questions, comments, or concerns you’d like to share with your Republican Senate Majority? ***_[ TAKE THE SURVEY →

name: Team Kelly
subject: PLEASE: Don’t click away just yet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
**FIRST:**
Mark won some of the most competitive elections in the country in 2020 and 2022 without taking a cent from corporate PACs. Millions of people donated. We’re proud of that fact, and you should be, too.

**THEN:**
Trump and Pete Hegseth came after Mark with everything they had. Court-martial, reduction in rank, arrest, even execution. Mark stood firm, and didn’t give them an inch.

**NOW:**
Mark is on the offensive. Trump knows his presidency comes to an end when he loses his majorities in the House and Senate, and Mark is gonna fight like hell to flip them both.
Things aren’t great now, to say the least. But look closely: The tide is turning. Trump is lashing out because he’s scared, because he knows his authoritarian rampage ends with Democrats running the show in Congress.
And if you understand how important Mark is in the fight against Trump, we’re humbly asking you:
[**Make a donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign. His end-of-month deadline is approaching fast, and he has a long way to catch up to hit his goals.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr26/.fve8Wt&refcode=em260425-1-1m&t=1&akid=6433%2E6688874%2ESHlKLy)

name: James Carville
subject: This should scare the hell out of every Democrat in the country —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
New Hampshire’s Senate race is tied. And I’m rattled.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on more campaigns than I can count, and let me tell you: **I don’t rattle easily.**
But this race in New Hampshire? **It’s TIED. In a dead heat. And that should scare the hell out of every Democrat in the country.**
**[💥 Before you read another word, chip in $10 or whatever you can to help Chris Pappas pull ahead right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&refcode=em20260425-2&t=1&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)**
**[Chip in Now »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&refcode=em20260425-2&t=2&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)**
Here’s the deal: Jeanne Shaheen is retiring. That means this seat is wide open. **And now John Sununu — yes, one of those Sununus, the long-time New Hampshire political dynasty — is running to flip it red.**
He’s got the name, he’s got the money, and he’s got the full weight of the Republican donor class behind him — from Wall Street to the far-right Super PACs. They see New Hampshire as their ticket to locking down the Senate for another decade.
And right now? **This race is neck-and-neck. It could go either way.**
Chris Pappas is our guy. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four times. He knows how to reach voters across the aisle and build a coalition that wins. But he cannot — _CANNOT_ — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Rush a contribution to Chris Pappas today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare to help Chris take the lead and hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&refcode=em20260425-2&t=3&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&amount=5&refcode=em20260425-2&t=22&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)**
The GOP knows if they take New Hampshire, Democrats don’t have a shot at retaking the Senate. And they’re ready to bury us in negative ads and dark money.
We’ve got to fight smarter, faster, and harder. We’ve got to help Chris Pappas build the campaign we need to win. **Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t buy another Senate seat. Not on our watch.**
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&refcode=em20260425-2&t=23&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260425_2.-N2Moj&refcode=em20260425-2&t=24&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260425-2&t=25&refcode2=6297_582294_BJAzCy&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=26&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=27&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=6297%2E582294%2EBJAzCy)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

But this race in New Hampshire? It’s TIED. In a dead heat. And that should scare the hell out of every Democrat in the country. Here’s the deal: Jeanne Shaheen is retiring. That means this seat is wide open. And now John Sununu — yes, one of those Sununus, the long-time New Hampshire political dynasty — is running to flip it red. He’s got the name, he’s got the money, and he’s got the full weight of the Republican donor class behind him — from Wall Street to the far-right Super PACs. They see New Hampshire as their ticket to locking down the Senate for another decade. And right now? This race is neck-and-neck. It could go either way. Chris Pappas is our guy. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four times. He knows how to reach voters across the aisle and build a coalition that wins. But he cannot — CANNOT — do this alone. So here’s what I need from you: The GOP knows if they take New Hampshire, Democrats don’t have a shot at retaking the Senate. And they’re ready to bury us in negative ads and dark money. We’ve got to fight smarter, faster, and harder. We’ve got to help Chris Pappas build the campaign we need to win. Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t buy another Senate seat. Not on our watch. Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate. — James Carville New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Aaron Ford for Governor
subject: In a race this close, this margin could decide everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Aaron Ford
body:
# [](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/12?t=1&akid=34%2E127862%2EL-w42n)
This isn’t good.
When it comes to voter registration, the math isn’t on our side right now:
[](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_af_20260425_1_ak.7WvDLO&amount=5&refcode=em20260425-34&t=2&akid=34%2E127862%2EL-w42n)
In a race this close, that margin could decide everything.
But the good news is we have a message that resonates across the state — one focused on lowering costs and holding powerful interests accountable — and a campaign ready to organize around it.
**If we invest early, we can reach the Nevadans who will decide this election and make sure they’re ready to vote in our June primary election and in November.**
**[Will you rush an urgent donation of $5 or any amount to help us close this gap and make sure Nevadans know what’s at stake in these upcoming elections?](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_af_20260425_1_ak.7WvDLO&amount=5&refcode=em20260425-34&t=3&akid=34%2E127862%2EL-w42n)**

Thank you,
Team Ford

name: Team Moulton
subject: You should see what's happening across the state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
We need to match their energy.

| |
---
Hey friend, Right now, across Massachusetts, hundreds of volunteers are out collecting signatures to get Seth on the ballot. In the rain, on weekends, after work, in every corner of the Commonwealth. They're showing up because they believe in what we’re building That's what a grassroots campaign looks like. But keeping a field program running takes resources. Printing, supplies, organizing events, and getting teams where they need to be across the state. None of it happens for free, and all of it matters. We've set a goal of $10,000 in the next 5 days to finish the month strong and make sure our field operation has what it needs heading into May. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: No race can be taken for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, I promise I’ll keep this short. I’ve run in a lot of close elections throughout my life. **But this one is unlike any other.** Here in Pennsylvania, we’ve rejected the chaos, cruelty, and corruption that defines Washington right now. But if we fall short on Election Day? That backwards brand of politics could come straight to our Commonwealth’s front door. [_**Derek, I know we can pull this off as long as folks like you step off the sidelines and get into the game. Can you chip in and help us reach undecided voters all across Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130165770/616833440/-1368017556?refcode=email_042526_granted&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjQxYmY5Mi1jZjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOlG-9URJ_DhiTgUi5S6DkIVM7QDZHxAH3bp-vRJyIQ=) I’ve always believed that no race can be taken for granted – and today, that's truer than ever before. **Thanks for staying in this one with me.** – Josh Shapiro

But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130166348/616835499/156431970?refcode=20260425-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlNWIwOWEtZDA0MC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NksTwo2K0AtUC25WXhph3KQluuJnr2acLPP8x0vvNwQ=)

But when I see our constitution and our democracy under attack the way they are right now by people like Lauren Boebert, there was no answer other than to try to serve once again.
We can defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her embarrassing political career. Adam Frisch only lost to Boebert by 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country. She is not invincible.
And if we do defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, Democrats are basically guaranteed to take back the House this November!
But Lauren Boebert has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs and the likes of Elon Musk. **If we are going to be able to fight back against the Super PAC lies and win, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in to my campaign now.**

clean_body: Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert. Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert – = I never thought I’d run for Congress. After 34 years in the Navy, I retired planning to spend a lot more time with my husband and our kids. But when I see our constitution and our democracy under attack the way they are right now by people like Lauren Boebert, there was no answer other than to try to serve once again. We can defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her embarrassing political career. Adam Frisch only lost to Boebert by 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country. She is not invincible. And if we do defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, Democrats are basically guaranteed to take back the House this November! But Lauren Boebert has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs and the likes of Elon Musk. If we are going to be able to fight back against the Super PAC lies and win, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in to my campaign now. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can finally give Lauren Boebert the boot – but we can only do it together. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired) United States Navy ** Paid for by Eileen for Colorado Eileen for Colorado 9249 S Broadway #200-172 Highlands Ranch, CO 80129 United States Contributions or gifts to Eileen for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: CONFIRMED: AIPAC is spending in PA-03
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In the Democratic primary for Pennsylvania’s 3rd congressional district,
AIPAC is trying to secretly support one of our opponents, and she lied
about it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260425-cr.B7KAxm&refcode=em20260425-37707&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p ]Tweet by Julian Andreone: NEW @DropSiteNews exclusive from @ryangrim &
me on AIPAC’s use of passthrough shadow PACs to funnel money to preferred
candidates. This time, it’s in Philly’s District 3. Despite denials, AIPAC
is now funding campaign of Ala Stanford In Philadelphia.

Dropsite News has just confirmed that Dr. Ala Stanford has received
contributions from AIPAC donors directly to her campaign and through one
of AIPAC’s shell PACs, 314 Action.

314 Action has dropped $2.6 million in support of Stanford so far, and
they recently received $500,000 from Kimbark Foundation, a group whose
only other political donation was $500,000 to another group AIPAC has used
as a shell PAC, EDW Action.

Plus, Stanford’s campaign directly received $27,000 from Democracy Engine,
“a vehicle used by AIPAC to bundle donor money and funnel it to preferred
candidates.”

These revelations come after Stanford has adamantly denied being funded by
AIPAC, all while refusing to call what Israel is doing to Palestinians a
genocide. So she lied to voters because she knows how toxic AIPAC has
become.

Meanwhile, this is our candidate in the race:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260425-cr.B7KAxm&refcode=em20260425-37707&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p ]Gif of Chris Rabb saying "AIPAC is trash."

State Rep. Chris Rabb is the only true pro-Palestine, anti-war progressive
in this race with the backbone to loudly reject AIPAC and denounce
Israel’s war crimes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260425-cr.B7KAxm&refcode=em20260425-37707&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p ]We can’t let AIPAC buy this seat in the bluest district in the
country, Peter. Split a
donation of $5 between Chris’s campaign and Justice
Democrats to help us defeat them on May 19 →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260425-cr.B7KAxm&refcode=em20260425-37707&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260425-37707-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37707_1203867_4jq9-p&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37707%2E1203867%2E4jq9-p

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Six months left to take back power. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130166702/616836642/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP78_20260425_6MonText_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058519&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjZiMTIxNy1kMTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktZx7k6vBisXDUrvKbbcMSEFK1sne4gqsj_HIVrvLOg=) Peter,

Donald Trump has spent his second term making life harder for the average American while enriching himself and his cronies. But in just six months, voters will have a chance to put a check on his corruption and recklessness at the ballot box.

That means we have just six months to make sure our candidates have the resources they need to make their case to communities across the country, turn out the voters we need to win in 2026, and take back power.

**[That’s why we’re launching our $150,000 End-of-Month goal today: To support the women competing across our toughest map yet. Peter, will you donate today to help EMILYs List women reach voters from coast to coast and win in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130166703/616836643/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP78_20260425_6MonText_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058519&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjZiMTIxNy1kMTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktZx7k6vBisXDUrvKbbcMSEFK1sne4gqsj_HIVrvLOg=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130166704/616836644/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP78_20260425_6MonText_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058519&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjZiMTIxNy1kMTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktZx7k6vBisXDUrvKbbcMSEFK1sne4gqsj_HIVrvLOg=)

With just six months until Election Day, many of the voters who will decide the balance of power are still making up their minds. That’s why it’s more important than ever for EMILYs List women to show up in their communities, meet with constituents, and build real support.

Trump and his MAGA allies also know how important these next few months will be. They’re prepared to spend millions to cover up their disastrous record and keep anti-choice extremists in power. And as we get closer to Election Day, they’ll only get more desperate.

That’s why we’re counting on this community to step up now. Early donations help fund the staff, ads, and organizing programs that allow EMILYs List women to get ahead of MAGA misinformation, reach the voters hungry for change, and build power in states across the country.

********[There’s no time to waste. clean_body: Six months left to take back power. | = Peter, Donald Trump has spent his second term making life harder for the average American while enriching himself and his cronies. But in just six months, voters will have a chance to put a check on his corruption and recklessness at the ballot box. That means we have just six months to make sure our candidates have the resources they need to make their case to communities across the country, turn out the voters we need to win in 2026, and take back power. = | = With just six months until Election Day, many of the voters who will decide the balance of power are still making up their minds. That’s why it’s more important than ever for EMILYs List women to show up in their communities, meet with constituents, and build real support. Trump and his MAGA allies also know how important these next few months will be. They’re prepared to spend millions to cover up their disastrous record and keep anti-choice extremists in power. And as we get closer to Election Day, they’ll only get more desperate. That’s why we’re counting on this community to step up now. Early donations help fund the staff, ads, and organizing programs that allow EMILYs List women to get ahead of MAGA misinformation, reach the voters hungry for change, and build power in states across the country. ******=****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: $1 BILLION in Michigan??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
These numbers are CRAZY, null

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17548?t=2&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)
---
Null, you have to take a look at these numbers!
**Axios is projecting $1 billion worth of ad spending in Michigan – that's right,_$1 BILLION_ just in our state. **
_Take a look:_
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17549?t=3&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)
MAGA megadonors are planning to flood Michigan with ad spending because they know Senate control will be decided here. They've already committed $45 million to this race and they're just getting started.
**That's why this grassroots team is so important.**
Because Haley's not a millionaire. She can’t cut herself a giant check to drop big money on her campaign.
What she does have is you. And with thousands of grassroots Democrats chipping in a little at a time, there's no doubt that we will have what it takes to win.
**_[So please, will you step up and join this team by rushing $5 or even $25 right now to help Haley keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17549?t=4&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)_**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17550?t=5&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)

* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17544?email=&zip=&t=9&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17548?t=10&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=11&akid=2852%2E49239%2E8CeJSc)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
| We’ve helped power 300+ Democratic campaigns — join us.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)_

Hi Peter, it's been a while since we've chatted. We get it, the world is on fire and inboxes fill up. [**But we wanted to take a moment to reintroduce ourselves. Hopefully when we’re done, you'll join our movement to protect our democracy and elect leaders who defend it.** ](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11315?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Reintroducing-Ourselves_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo) | [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11316?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Reintroducing-Ourselves_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)
---
Blue Amp Action exists for one reason: to amplify the good in our politics.
We connect grassroots supporters like you with the candidates and causes actually doing the work: lowering costs, fighting for civil rights, protecting healthcare, tackling climate change, and standing up for working families.
And we don’t just talk about impact, we help power it.
With your support, we’ve helped drive grassroots fundraising for **300+ Democratic leaders and organizations** , including folks like Senator **Mark Kelly** , Governor **Abigail Spanberger** , Senator**Jon Ossoff** , Attorney General **Letitia James** , Senator **Sherrod Brown** , Governor **Roy Cooper** , Representative **Mary Peltola** , Representative **Deb Haaland** (and many more fighting for real change)!
**At a time when misinformation and extremism are louder than ever, our job is simple:**
✅ Help the right voices reach the people who care.
✅ Cut through the noise.
✅ Lift up truth.
And that only works with a strong grassroots community behind us.
[**So now that we’ve reconnected, can we count on you to join this work with a $3 donation today? Every dollar helps us keep supporting campaigns, mobilizing voters, and protecting our democracy from the ground up.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11315?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Reintroducing-Ourselves_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $3 →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11316?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Reintroducing-Ourselves_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=7&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)
---
[DONATE MORE →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11078?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Reintroducing-Ourselves_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=8&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)
---
We’re building something powerful. Campaign by campaign, voice by voice.
And we’d love to have you with us.
— Blue Amp Action
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=9&refcode2=2131_259176__83xeo&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)
---
We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=10&refcode2=2131_259176__83xeo&akid=2131%2E259176%2E_83xeo)**

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: My grandpa and my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Are you with me?

| | | | | | | | | | | My grandpa served in WWII.

My dad served as an Army Green Beret in the Vietnam War.

I was a Navy Helicopter pilot.

I’m married to a Ret. Navy pilot.

And now, I’m a proud Navy mom, too.

Peter, service isn’t just important to me – _it’s in my blood._

That’s why I decided to find a way to serve after my military career was done. I used my GI benefits to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner and take care of the Greatest Generation.

Now, as a Congresswoman, I am still prioritizing care for our veterans. I have never, ever turned my back on my fellow veterans, and they deserve the best care our country has to offer.

_Unfortunately, the values of honor and integrity have gone completely missing in the Democrat Party, and they’re spreading lies that I don’t care about veterans –**Can you believe how low they’ve stooped?**_

My life has been shaped by service to our country, but I need you to have my back here.
---
| | **[Please sign my petition if you trust me to take care of America’s heroes – ones just like my grandpa, my dad, and my husband:](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDI1XzFTLVdELjExMDExN190MTg4MTIxNi0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQyNV8xUy1XRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODEyMTYtMjA2OCJ9/BTWP_MWHpWB5ulGaDAv6cQ)**
---
| | [ **SIGN THE PETITION!** ](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDI1XzFTLVdELjExMDExN190MTg4MTIxNi0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQyNV8xUy1XRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODEyMTYtMjA2OCJ9/hBV_jDaMO1deGYIaI35agg)
---
| | We can’t let Democrats get away with these lies and go unchecked. I’m demanding we hold them accountable and set the record straight – _together_.

Thank you SO much...!

Jen Kiggans
---
| | [](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)
---
I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America’s success!
---
[ **SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS** ](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._NDr-6g)
---
| |
---

---

# [Propaganda is everywhere](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw)
### Even foreign newspapers trying to see through the illusion of American exceptionalism inadvertently reinforce it
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Apr 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzE0MjA2MywiZXhwIjoxNzc5NzM0MDYzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mYjYjh7HHkRVG4kCKQhfogIkRkskg2PqGpcVu6RUtO8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw)
---
| | [](https://substack.._zqxfRoom_WhwKv7i2CRSv1Kv4rK2w92ezOyJUpuMy8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/propaganda-is-everywhere?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As an American, I have long recognized the need to read foreign news sources in order to escape the pervasive propaganda that infects our so-called "Free Press." One of the publications I particularly appreciated--until it [joined](https://substack.com/redirect/c995977b-da0b-4657-9b5c-49db4089317c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the ranks of newspapers that [smeared](https://substack.com/redirect/fd49857f-6908-4bdf-a53e-b90d9e8455d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) me in 2020 when my congressional campaign politically threatened an [oligarch](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a2324-cd11-4a64-9eb8-2f441ad2deae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) they indulged--was the UK-based Guardian.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2837389-b854-41de-9859-6f21ffdfc5ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A few weeks ago, the Guardian published [a thoughtful editorial](https://substack.com/redirect/75dff5af-d8fa-4d7d-986e-0ae62c126a89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that aimed to expose the increasingly inescapable role of the United States in the world as a chaotic disruptor and agent of preventable international economic crisis.
It's hard not to notice, however, how the editors of even a seemingly insightful publication continue to fall prey to the very same propaganda that they aim to deconstruct. [I started writing this post the same day as that editorial was initially published, before growing distracted as the news cycle forced me to turn my attention to other fronts.]
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! Help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw)
### **Call it what it is**
My first article published in the wake of the war on Iran identified Trump & Netanyahu, both leaders of supposedly "democratic" countries, as the center of a new axis of evil.
## [Welcome to World War III](https://substack.com/redirect/09ca2669-e8f7-483a-8783-0bfc64b48563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 6
[](https://substack.com/redirect/09ca2669-e8f7-483a-8783-0bfc64b48563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The war on Iran launched last weekend has unleashed catastrophic destruction across the Middle East, wrecked the global economy, revealed American subservience to Israel--and may have spelled the end of Trump's aspirations to remain in office for life.](https://substack.com/redirect/09ca2669-e8f7-483a-8783-0bfc64b48563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/09ca2669-e8f7-483a-8783-0bfc64b48563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's easy to understand why the Guardian's editors would stop short of using such clear language when describing the objects of their critique. After all, newspapers are generally in the business of prevarication, whereas rhetorical clarity can reveal the perspective of a writer attempting to lead thoughtful readers to their own conclusions.
The hole in that bucket, of course, is that even the seemingly few Americans who still read often lack critical thinking skills. Relying on them to draw seemingly obvious conclusions from a well-reasoned argument is a bit like hoping they might start making better choices at the ballot box, even after decades of electing corrupt Democrats to fight the equally corrupt Republicans who they ultimately [enable](https://substack.com/redirect/61f41b40-879c-425a-b40c-0739b0449608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I made a substantially similar point when [responding](https://substack.com/redirect/7f85a1cb-b4d9-4b2a-bc17-29887e384c4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a few years ago to Ryan Grim's thoughtful analyses of the Democratic Party's complicity in white supremacy, which he repeatedly observed--but declined to name.
## [Democrats vs. Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/7f85a1cb-b4d9-4b2a-bc17-29887e384c4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/10904314-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| October 20, 2022
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7f85a1cb-b4d9-4b2a-bc17-29887e384c4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[This Sunday, the Intercept published a detailed analysis written by its DC Bureau chief, Ryan Grim. Grim's latest article, "Primary Occupation," picked up where his July article, "Elephant in the Zoom," and his 2019 book, "We've Got People," left off. His 2020 articles address the corruption of the Democratic Party and progressive social movements by examining patterns within the Party, as well as non-profit organizations typically aligned with it.](https://substack.com/redirect/7f85a1cb-b4d9-4b2a-bc17-29887e384c4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/7f85a1cb-b4d9-4b2a-bc17-29887e384c4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Worse yet are the many points at which even the Guardian's seemingly thoughtful editorial indulges the propaganda of the global empire buttressed by Wall Street and the Pentagon.
### **Misdiagnosing the illness**
The central premise of [the Guardian's editorial](https://substack.com/redirect/75dff5af-d8fa-4d7d-986e-0ae62c126a89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is that the United States went from being a guardian of international peace to an agent of international chaos. It concludes with a suitably sharp reflection on the current state of international relations:
> Erstwhile US allies in the liberal west have been forced to accept that Trump's America is no longer a reliable partner in the service of international stability, but perhaps the main source of global uncertainty.
> They are becoming aware that Trump will offer up any number of hogwash excuses to justify his belligerence. He justified bombing Iran by arguing that it presents an imminent nuclear threat just after he claimed he had obliterated its nuclear program last year. He wants to raise a new tariff wall after the supreme court struck down his earlier efforts using some spurious argument about forced labor.
> Who knows what justification he will make up next, for instance when he remembers he also wants to take over Greenland and the Panama canal.
The problem with the thesis is that the US has never supported international peace, at least not for the last 75 years. On the one hand, the Guardian's editors indicate an awareness of the systemic rot in Washington that remains far more deeply rooted than the current occupant of the White House.
> It is foolhardy to believe that this episode of wanton aggression is a freak occurrence, that US belligerence will end after the 2028 election, or maybe earlier if Democrats manage to take over Congress in November.
On the other hand, the editors continue to fall prey to Trump derangement syndrome, noting in the very next sentence that:
> Tens of millions of Americans in the Maga base are motivated by contempt for the rest of the world....
> This political force will not soon go away.
The sad reality to which many are finally waking up for the very first time, is that the nature of Washington's corruption is disappointingly bipartisan. The illusion that Democrats offer better alternatives ultimately falls on the [shoals of history](https://substack.com/redirect/61f41b40-879c-425a-b40c-0739b0449608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication made possible by readers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SFyE0i5rPuM7RC92IlFdONNlfaGUCAP02x1DsZ24ITI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=195461782)
### **Seeing the past through rose colored lenses**
While helpfully critiquing Washington, the Guardian's editors reveal their confusion in a number of ways.
For instance, they adopt (in the helpful context of critiquing) a phrase promoted by Washington's international sycophants who imagine a "rules-based order" as the basis for international diplomacy. In particular, the editors argue that mounting economic harm to the U.S flowing from the war on Iran launched by the new axis of evil:
> adds an uncomfortable chapter to the main narrative of the world economy....a story in which the United States--once a guardian of a rules-based global order--dons the role of its nemesis, recklessly spreading havoc among friends and foes while suffering relatively little harm of its own.
What political scientists often describe as [Pax Americana](https://substack.com/redirect/0e18cbc6-1eda-4515-ae9a-4dddd84d610f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has, in fact, been little more than a convenient cover for naked imperial aggression. The war in Iran today offers a crucial case in point, as does the [history that led up to it](https://substack.com/redirect/86ad6087-00cb-474e-bf94-012170dd6d0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's impossible to understand Iranian resistance and resilience in the face of Trump & Netanyahu's assault without remembering [the 1953 CIA coup](https://substack.com/redirect/b36aee2d-07c3-4de8-ba61-85f4da1bff25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that removed a democratically elected socialist government and replaced it with a brutal dictator. It was only after a generation of subservience to the US-backed monarch that the right wing theocracy emerged, after a bloody revolution that left thousands of left-wing students dead or in prison.
But Iran is far from the only example establishing a pattern of longstanding international belligerence from Washington. [Guatemala, Cuba, Brazil, Ecuador, Bolivia, Chile, El Salvador, Grenada, and Panama](https://substack.com/redirect/7a777c3e-86dd-4a53-a9f6-99ddc9b816ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) might like a word.
So might [Vietnam, Cambodia, and Laos](https://substack.com/redirect/7d1df6ff-d85f-4ce8-9f3d-7e4e4fc37a99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Or, for that matter, [Iraq and Afghanistan](https://substack.com/redirect/2eff801b-22ce-42e6-9454-fa707ae4570d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Or, for that matter, urban residents of [any major U.S. city](https://substack.com/redirect/5fe3b312-091e-4afe-8f74-8f70bf6d689b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
For the Guardian's editors to even indulge the narrative that the U.S. was ever "a guardian of a rules-based global order" requires editors burying their heads in the sand and ignoring documented history. That indulgence is part of why Europe has proven so relatively compliant and easy for Washington to manipulate.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw)
### **Evaluating economies by privileging capital and ignoring the plight of labor**
The Guardian's generally thoughtful editorial also makes a supposed observation that the U.S. economy has proven more resilient in the face of global supply chain shocks than many other countries more seemingly reliant on Middle Eastern oil.
Its central basis for that comparison seems to be an evaluation of those countries' respective stock markets, alongside macroeconomic forecasts issued by international institutions.
The problem with that approach is that stock market markets don't measure the health of economies. They measure the health of major corporations, which often run counter to the economic health of the workers and consumers whose resources they essentially steal through various sophisticated schemes.
It may be the case that Wall Street has weathered Netanyahu and Trump's storm better than those of other countries.
But if the Guardian's editors think that the U.S. economy is more healthy, they might look beyond Wall Street to consider what it's like to actually try surviving in this country.
[Medical debt](https://substack.com/redirect/63bc123a-30ef-4e3f-bb74-609842872b78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a financial yoke around the necks of millions of working American families.
[Student debt](https://substack.com/redirect/147ebba0-925b-4a14-ba11-a4186706a146?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) effectively indentures those who hope to change their class status or pursue a life of learning.
Meanwhile, [homelessness](https://substack.com/redirect/da575f49-bf9b-41f7-9a92-aff9adc8a16b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) continues to expand relentlessly, and will likely accelerate due to economic contraction forced by the war on Iran.
Each of these crises are largely specific to the U.S. and conspicuously absent in other countries, because they have functioning governments that recognize basic human rights and--unlike Washington--remain beholden to the consent of the governed.
The United States has never been either a guardian of international peace, or an economically stable place for people to live, work, and raise families.
The economic burden confronting working families is so severe that the birth rate in this country has [visibly dropped](https://substack.com/redirect/2777943c-8e32-4a41-845e-3740e655b8d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the past generation.
If the United States was capable of mustering even a modicum of political sense, that might suggest embracing immigration to offset the predictable decline in the domestic population prompted by declining birth rates--but that might expect too much of a place whose [ignorance](https://substack.com/redirect/79dfb079-ee6d-4bd5-bc6b-7f3bec8e9eb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is its defining characteristic.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195461782&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NDYxNzgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDIwNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTczNDA2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZSt1FAepJVo6yyKB0Nd2RSkg8WLs1Luo7ecqz_GOhw)
### **A welcome conclusion, decades after the fact**
I wholeheartedly embrace the [colorful conclusion](https://substack.com/redirect/75dff5af-d8fa-4d7d-986e-0ae62c126a89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the Guardian's editors eventually reach:
> Alongside China taking Taiwan and Russia wanting the Baltics, "the US pulls an argument out of a hat to raise random hell" must be added to the world's risk premium.
What prompted me to write this reflection was the recognition that, had Europe woken up and smelled the proverbial coffee at any point in the recent past, the unfolding nightmare of the future could have been led in a different direction.
Instead, Europe [continued](https://substack.com/redirect/4b58bce7-2740-45fd-bf27-b00708896ae8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to enable the United States and its international belligerence not only through the era of its imperial wars on Iraq, Nicaragua, Vietnam, and dozens of other countries, but even in the [latest wars on Iran](https://substack.com/redirect/8df567d9-4780-46db-b213-5d6c373ce783?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Venezuela, and Cuba.
It's encouraging to see so many European countries finally stand up to Washington by [denying Trump's repeated request](https://substack.com/redirect/44f26ac9-46a8-44a3-a3f3-4a59c77fb276?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to sacrifice their own navies in a futile effort to open the strait of Hormuz.
Yet the U.K. remains an international outlier, still largely [enabling](https://substack.com/redirect/a982c9d1-a470-4f30-8c6e-9c770f2356ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a criminal president despite documentation of his corruption, international belligerence, and pedophilia.
The sooner the rest of the world figures out which side the United States is on--neither theirs, nor anyone else's, except for an [international terrorist](https://substack.com/redirect/cd8280d4-404d-41b2-89e0-ad467ace1e98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leading the state of Israel--the sooner we might all might actually have a chance to experience the peace that the Guardian's editors imagine in the past.
One might hope that the international press would maintain the independence that US journalists have been [institutionally forced](https://substack.com/redirect/5834fe3f-f453-4afd-be67-cede1883c02a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to abandon.
That, however, might be like hoping for change while enabling the same corrupt political parties to continue placing the interests of oligarchs before those of working families around the world.

In particular, the editors argue that mounting economic harm to the U.S flowing from the war on Iran launched by the new axis of evil: adds an uncomfortable chapter to the main narrative of the world economy....a story in which the United States--once a guardian of a rules-based global order--dons the role of its nemesis, recklessly spreading havoc among friends and foes while suffering relatively little harm of its own. What political scientists often describe as has, in fact, been little more than a convenient cover for naked imperial aggression. The war in Iran today offers a crucial case in point, as does the . It's impossible to understand Iranian resistance and resilience in the face of Trump & Netanyahu's assault without remembering that removed a democratically elected socialist government and replaced it with a brutal dictator. It was only after a generation of subservience to the US-backed monarch that the right wing theocracy emerged, after a bloody revolution that left thousands of left-wing students dead or in prison. But Iran is far from the only example establishing a pattern of longstanding international belligerence from Washington. might like a word. So might . Or, for that matter, . Or, for that matter, urban residents of . For the Guardian's editors to even indulge the narrative that the U.S. was ever "a guardian of a rules-based global order" requires editors burying their heads in the sand and ignoring documented history. That indulgence is part of why Europe has proven so relatively compliant and easy for Washington to manipulate. Evaluating economies by privileging capital and ignoring the plight of labor The Guardian's generally thoughtful editorial also makes a supposed observation that the U.S. economy has proven more resilient in the face of global supply chain shocks than many other countries more seemingly reliant on Middle Eastern oil. Its central basis for that comparison seems to be an evaluation of those countries' respective stock markets, alongside macroeconomic forecasts issued by international institutions. The problem with that approach is that stock market markets don't measure the health of economies. They measure the health of major corporations, which often run counter to the economic health of the workers and consumers whose resources they essentially steal through various sophisticated schemes. It may be the case that Wall Street has weathered Netanyahu and Trump's storm better than those of other countries. But if the Guardian's editors think that the U.S. economy is more healthy, they might look beyond Wall Street to consider what it's like to actually try surviving in this country. is a financial yoke around the necks of millions of working American families. effectively indentures those who hope to change their class status or pursue a life of learning. Meanwhile, continues to expand relentlessly, and will likely accelerate due to economic contraction forced by the war on Iran. Each of these crises are largely specific to the U.S. and conspicuously absent in other countries, because they have functioning governments that recognize basic human rights and--unlike Washington--remain beholden to the consent of the governed. The United States has never been either a guardian of international peace, or an economically stable place for people to live, work, and raise families. The economic burden confronting working families is so severe that the birth rate in this country has over the past generation. If the United States was capable of mustering even a modicum of political sense, that might suggest embracing immigration to offset the predictable decline in the domestic population prompted by declining birth rates--but that might expect too much of a place whose is its defining characteristic. A welcome conclusion, decades after the fact I wholeheartedly embrace the that the Guardian's editors eventually reach: Alongside China taking Taiwan and Russia wanting the Baltics, "the US pulls an argument out of a hat to raise random hell" must be added to the world's risk premium. What prompted me to write this reflection was the recognition that, had Europe woken up and smelled the proverbial coffee at any point in the recent past, the unfolding nightmare of the future could have been led in a different direction. Instead, Europe to enable the United States and its international belligerence not only through the era of its imperial wars on Iraq, Nicaragua, Vietnam, and dozens of other countries, but even in the , Venezuela, and Cuba. It's encouraging to see so many European countries finally stand up to Washington by to sacrifice their own navies in a futile effort to open the strait of Hormuz. Yet the U.K. remains an international outlier, still largely a criminal president despite documentation of his corruption, international belligerence, and pedophilia. The sooner the rest of the world figures out which side the United States is on--neither theirs, nor anyone else's, except for an leading the state of Israel--the sooner we might all might actually have a chance to experience the peace that the Guardian's editors imagine in the past. One might hope that the international press would maintain the independence that US journalists have been to abandon. That, however, might be like hoping for change while enabling the same corrupt political parties to continue placing the interests of oligarchs before those of working families around the world. Our nation’s borders must be secure | | | | Friend, When the American people went to the ballot box in 2024, their verdict was crystal clear: _ _ ✅ _**Our nation’s borders must be secure.**_ _** **_ **✅** _**The Rule of Law must be enforced inside the United States.**_ _** **_ **✅** _**Fundamental American principles must be restored throughout our society.**_ **Senator Ashley Moody** has been a vital partner in delivering on those priorities. I had the distinct honor of swearing her in to fill Marco Rubio’s vacant seat after President Trump nominated Marco to be Secretary of State. Since her very first day in office, she has demonstrated her fidelity to the Constitution and our conservative principles by working side-by-side with President Trump. **But now she’s facing a critical special election, and Democrats have zeroed in on her seat to strike a critical blow against our Senate majority.** But it’s even worse than that. Leading the race on the other side is one of the worst, Trump Derangement Syndrome-afflicted offenders possible – Alexander Vindman, the deep state operative who helped orchestrate the very first impeachment. And he’s raised over $8 million in left-wing money to take one of our most important seats. **The Democrats are emboldened by multiple recent special election victories in Florida. They smell blood in the water and have their eyes on the crown jewel.** **[I’ve prepared an exclusive briefing on the race and what we need to do to win it FOR YOUR EYES ONLY.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7b90e68fc7bc4cd380d71b88dc8a68a1&_e=Kqjcfv13EC-c1viNLxfYLZ-soXvTCPn24JBX7VG2MFFh1umsXrjzSru62Y6RYn8gIGczMLQlBg9GmXg_-uJh4eDukEPwHB1MfSD-IdZuyXng16h0nU8oAxPwERANY7WdUpURVqsAEMU__o37piYxcTdy781MUIc4SnTXEeLeKCtgLuoI0mVP65PXvWSiWWCMdXrxQtXUeQJZ6S78Tzn6iJm27hJHg6UjBgfHW1CTW-_1JuAh67SCJ2gc2LZFdzU24GWnqNWbZpUOksM_FvfhLMrNvskFR3hN9mMNTk92TL2dlWVbx6izIJFHPzkqhFKylICQKEeg_EaAU8x32xiYmoN_QkE6UipeIyJS-M03OMchZWiG2lXTb-fLUIYTLCGvN682KM7tYe_7V6i01mbyIscJ6g2wYCVQ6-uUIhMGXT_euaQJ4y45uHPUxYGO35PhOyG_SMzsYyFSSPDrB9M-e-QCDxbDLc_wwylxoiz2x9GM8W4aHiwVRHKvfVPrNVRd3vql-cyOmcXuLzhwLQYVGNTZHg_i2qQIld3R5MBoKUU35PotC_oaPXIsrTdHA4wguc9J9KtHoC8uFgwjzdPpzeU9oQW-w7A5LWeyfR2qzawUpLs8ysgaUIQvLqZU5PDO2tP5Un-g-ClvoZ9wPyrklSMBNxehzUc7hb3yR64Y9yBATS1Yb_p7hBTyU2JkNN7m)** [**Please give it a read ASAP – before it’s too late.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7b90e68fc7bc4cd380d71b88dc8a68a1&_e=Kqjcfv13EC-c1viNLxfYLZ-soXvTCPn24JBX7VG2MFFh1umsXrjzSru62Y6RYn8gIGczMLQlBg9GmXg_-uJh4eDukEPwHB1MfSD-IdZuyXng16h0nU8oAxPwERANY7WdUpURVqsAEMU__o37piYxcTdy781MUIc4SnTXEeLeKCtgLuoI0mVP65PXvWSiWWCMdXrxQtXUeQJZ6S78Tzn6iJm27hJHg6UjBgfHW1CTW--XFZD5hae9H8GWk2G2rN6-4nQs2oClrfO6I9cg8Vx1J1zvYm2jcudFiE4sGVMkl_CRVw3SEh5CB7KGncM87k7WfaEWZe5lHAGRDGrmS_alYjTVTMaQk3ZucEoUsKfqGdNjRoUUSAR7b4ixWsuuMGEdT4ePEVhnhMcq3fLF8FseFUdTYIqVJKxwDKG-2HAwxcJr9rHBFUvA57VLB4w-_88VS0K-J5ScsXTvanYjzX4DGey-SerRr0W_PQ7GmeOK8FkRhyYYj9sUbNtUvMyj4VrM3KiitccS8eV-6Idkjfozk-3QILzWtOT3fBkD6v1Vr5UI-xBOb-xp17DC1m7bZVkclrZRFhl90IW8hPqv8xDKu_mFgG3dl-Z7P2TMua0xoMc5TEJCv_j9w3Sn8HDGR6NbCAXB5JMQlWhNzGWIQ8mTrLHmSUeSqJOLGMJX59hkrsSEQme6yD54xAlGLAKFgckA) Thank you, JD Vance Vice President of the United States
