name: Legislation Tracker [Voter Action Project]
subject: MAGA's latest voter suppression bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: House Republicans propose stricter voting requirements as Trump administration eyes the midterms [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042526_1&amount=25]
Folks, we've been warning you about the SAVE Act since it was introduced, since it's a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote.
Well, there's a new champion in the " anti-voting legislation " category with the introduction of the Make Elections Great Again (MEGA) Act. The new bill goes far beyond even the SAVE Act, with the MEGA Act now being called " the most extreme voting restrictions ever proposed at the federal level ."
The name also tells you everything you need to know about the target audience for this bill. With Trump focused on re-litigating the 2020 election, this legislation would give him all the power he would need to take federal control of the upcoming midterms .
PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE MEGA ACT ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042526_1&amount=35]
While the SAVE Act focused almost exclusively on requiring voters to produce documentary proof of citizenship when registering, the MEGA Act is far more sweeping. It would:
* Impose a strict photo ID requirement to vote
* Create a centralized voter surveillance system in every state
* Mandate constant voter roll purges, gutting the “Motor Voter” law that expanded access to voter registration
* Bar states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day
* Ban universal mail voting, in which states mail a ballot to all registered voters
* Bar the federal funding for voter registration by outside groups
* Unleash lawsuits against election officials
Estimates said the SAVE Act could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. The MEGA Act would be much, much worse.
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the MEGA Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042526_1&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=042526_1&amount=35]
The scariest parts of the MEGA Act are how it goes after so much more than proof-of-citizenship at registration. States aren't mandated to provide ID to eligible citizens, but the MEGA Act would require citizens to show the right kind of ID every time they went to vote. This creates inequality, like in Texas, where you can vote with a hunting license ( which doesn't require proof of citizenship ) but you can't vote with a college photo ID.
This bill targets voter registration as well, demanding that eligible voters re-prove their citizenship every election, while also requiring states to " take affirmative steps... on an ongoing basis " every 30 days to check and verify their voter rolls. How would they check them? Using a nationwide federal database controlled by MAGA partisans, of course . And the bill calls for all these measures to be in place before we vote in November's general election.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights said about the SAVE Act. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
His words ring even more true about the MEGA Act. This bill is nothing less than an all-out partisan assault on our fundamental right to vote . If made law, this bill would codify MAGA's power for decades to come, invalidating millions of eligible voters and ending our democracy for a generation or longer.
None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines, Team, and watch our fundamental right to vote die. Fight back against these cynical vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=042526_1&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042526_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042526_1&amount=20]

April 25, 2026

On Friday night (April 24,2026), Fairfield had its annual carnival at Jennings Beach. Unfortunately, some unruly youths disturbed it, and the police of Fairfield and Bridgeport had to be called to restore order. Rather than continue the carnival over the weekend, First Selectman Christine Vitale decided to cancel it out of safety concerns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5dc479ae-c4f7-432d-9dff-4c2d77e31eb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Police at the now closed Jennings Beach Carnival
For some reason, local politicians like to invade my Facebook page. This was the case with Fairfield Board of Finance Member, Kevin Starke. I did not sign up to receive his post. It just [magically appeared](https://substack.com/redirect/90007808-6ff9-49a0-a5b2-ee99d7d80169?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But I did respond. Below is the dialogue that followed. All comments are unedited.

I will leave it to whoever reads this article to decide who is correct, me or Mr. Starke.
**Mr. Starke:** In the wake of the McKinley Carnival incident, which is not the first of its kind, it makes more sense to ask why this particular event is prone to trouble. Other similar events are not. Take the Assumption Septemberfest, which happens each year on the other side of my fence. Take a look at the results of [the Perplexity analysis](https://substack.com/redirect/6ff9f18e-cf47-46ca-82ea-c741a9512f13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the link below. It's blatantly obvious that the location of the McKinley Carnival is the biggest part of the problem. It's too open, too easy to come to in big groups unsupervised. You can bemoan the loss of "Old Fairfield" or say it's Bridgeport kids all you want (and by the way, we have no idea if they were from Bridgeport or Fairfield or the moon). You can blame town government. But all of that is not useful because it is not forward-looking. One comment I saw was even from a local businessman who was saying how he can't wait to get out of Fairfield. That's not a great way to talk about your customers. Time for thinking proactively, not curmudgeonly. And how wonderful it is to see the hundreds of people who posted asking how they can give to the McKinley PTA. You can't tell me Fairfield has changed for the worse when you see that kind of community spirit.

**My Response:** This is nonsense. This incident did not occur because " It's blatantly obvious that the location of the McKinley Carnival is the biggest part of the problem. It's too open, too easy to come to in big groups unsupervised."
It occurred because the Democrats won the election and appoint liberal judges and prosecutors who overlook this behavior. And this will only get worse as long as Democrats keep winning elections. Fairfield got exactly what it voted for.

**Mr. Starke 's Response to My Comment: **It's tempting to hide a comment like this becuase [sic] it is so obtuse. But I'm just gonna [sic] let it hang out there for others to observe. People who see the world only as Democrat vs Republican are the biggest problem of all. I see the world as: people I go to church with, people. I'm in scouting with, people I do business with, people my son goes to school with, people who own dogs that I love, etc.

**My response:** My comment is not obtuse. It is blatantly clear. If we are no longer able have carnivals in our town, it is because the Democrats refuse to let our police do their jobs because they fear losing their jobs and their pensions if they do so. And even if they did, liberal judges and prosecutors that the Democratic politicians appoint would let the criminals walk.
As Mr. Starke says "It's blatantly obvious that the location of the McKinley Carnival is the biggest part of the problem. It's too open, too easy to come to in big groups unsupervised."
So, all we have to do is move the location and this problem will end. Tell that to Chick-fil-A. Maybe they should move to a smaller location too. We could even interview the criminals and see what yardage requirements they have in the hope they will stop terrorizing our citizens.
But Mr. Starke won his election fair and square. His viewpoints are clearly in the majority. Mine are in the minority as other comments on this page substantiate. Thus, if the people of Fairfield prefer to have rampaging gangs roam the town terrorizing our citizens. Fine. Vote for Mr. Starke and all the other Democrats who have the same viewpoint as his. We get what we vote for.

Respond to Dr. Bentivegna at: [jfbentivegna@gmail.com](https://substack.com/redirect/1351e0a2-49fb-4827-9b01-26d843087925?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name: End Trump’s illegal war in Iran ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Yesterday, I introduced a War Powers Resolution to put an end to Trump’s illegal war in Iran. Enough is enough — we must end this war for good.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260425-6176-footer&t=1&akid=6176%2E420207%2EKnc5bE)
Peter,
We must put an end to Trump’s illegal war in Iran.
It’s simple. _Congress alone has the power to declare war._ That’s what our Constitution says — and Trump has been violating it every single day since he launched this war.
For almost two months now, we’ve watched this administration thoughtlessly and recklessly drag our nation into another endless conflict, putting millions of lives at risk.
Thousands of Iranian and Lebanese civilians have been killed. 13 U.S. servicemembers have lost their lives. Dozens of veterans and their family members who peacefully protested against this illegal war were arrested at the Capitol earlier this week. And billions of American taxpayer dollars are going up in flames for bombs and military operations, all while working families struggle to pay rent, access care, and put food on the table.
**I have said it before and I’ll say it again: this is a war of choice, and it is not in our name. We cannot allow one man’s tantrum to cast a shadow on our democracy.**
That’s why I’ll continue to stand up against this illegal war until we end it for good. And it’s why I need you standing with me right now, Peter.
[**Will you add your name to this petition demanding that Congress immediately pass the War Powers Resolution and put a stop to Trump’s illegal war?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/pass_war-powers-resolution/?source=em20260425-6176&t=2&akid=6176%2E420207%2EKnc5bE)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/pass_war-powers-resolution/?source=em20260425-6176&t=3&akid=6176%2E420207%2EKnc5bE)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260425-6176-footer&t=4&refcode2=6176_420207_Knc5bE&akid=6176%2E420207%2EKnc5bE)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Nikki, Campaign Manager
subject: I'm making some tough calls this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
It’s Nikki, I’m Jocelyn’s Campaign Manager.

I wanted to reach out because we’re five days out from our end-of-month
deadline, and I’m in the middle of making some tough decisions about where
this campaign goes next. [ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4231?t=1001&akid=1605%2E181023%2E0GXkHi ]If you’re already on board, please chip in now
to help us hit our April fundraising goal.

This is the part of campaigns most people don’t see.

Right now, we’re deciding how quickly we can scale our outreach, where we
can invest early, and how prepared we’ll be as this race gets more
competitive.

And those decisions all come down to one thing: resources.

Michigan is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive races in
the country. Outside groups are starting to spend, and we know that’s only
going to ramp up in the weeks and months ahead.

So the choices we make over the next five days matter more than they might
seem. I want to make the most aggressive calls possible. But I can only do
that if we have the resources to back them up.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4231?t=1002&akid=1605%2E181023%2E0GXkHi ]That’s why I’m reaching out today. Can you make your first contribution
of $25 or
more to help us make the strongest possible decisions over the next few
days?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4232?t=1003&akid=1605%2E181023%2E0GXkHi ]Donate $5 →

Thank you,

Nikki
Campaign Manager

clean_body: Will you please help us fight back? Our grassroots power will prevail, but only with your help. This is the reality we’re facing this year, Peter: More corporate and dark money than EVER is flooding into our elections. We’re talking BILLIONS of dollars expected to be spent by the corporate elites responsible for stripping our communities for parts. All to help the corrupt politicians blindly supporting the anti-American, anti-worker agenda that puts all of us in danger. That’s why we’re asking for your help today, Peter. With your support, we’ve already proved that we’re able to build a record-breaking grassroots movement. And that’s exactly what we’ll need to continue building as we work to fight back against this flood of cash and finally take back our country for real working people. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we can put working people in charge of our country. Thank you for helping us do it. Heartland Patriots HQ | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Team Pou
subject: This is unacceptable
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Friend,

Gas prices have been climbing since Trump's war with Iran began.

secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260425_tp_eom1_img1 [secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260425_tp_eom1_img1]

This is unacceptable.

MAGA told working families they had a plan to bring costs down. Instead, Trump started a war without approval from Congress.

Now, working families are paying at the pump, and they're being forced to deal with the consequences of Trump's rash and careless decision-making. New Jerseyans have already been feeling the impacts, and there's no telling how long it will take for prices to return to normal.

If you're ready to hold MAGA accountable and elect a majority who will fight for working families, we need you on our team. Can we count on your support before our end-of-month deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260425_tp_eom1_l1]

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?amp;refcode=260425_tp_eom1]

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

MAGA told working families they had a plan to bring costs down. Instead, Trump started a war without approval from Congress. Now, working families are paying at the pump, and they're being forced to deal with the consequences of Trump's rash and careless decision-making. New Jerseyans have already been feeling the impacts, and there's no telling how long it will take for prices to return to normal. If you're ready to hold MAGA accountable and elect a majority who will fight for working families, we need you on our team. Can we count on your support before our end-of-month deadline? [] CHIP IN [] Thank you for standing with us, Team Pou [] About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. name: Jason Crow
subject: Trump’s erratic temper is jeopardizing our A steady hand saves lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
On April 3, two U.S. airmen were shot down in Iran.

A shocking new report has revealed that Donald Trump’s military advisers deliberately barred him from the command room during the search and rescue mission.

Why? Military officials feared Trump’s erratic temper would jeopardize the mission.

As a former Army Ranger and Captain who led troops in combat, I know a steady hand saves lives. Command decisions in life-and-death moments must be guided by expertise and calm judgment.

This report also raises serious Constitutional questions that Congress cannot ignore.

The president does not have unchecked authority to conduct military operations without congressional authorization. It becomes especially clear why that’s the case when our commander-in-chief can’t be trusted by his own military advisors.

We need a full congressional review of how leadership protocols were applied in this operation and reforms so that no commander-in-chief can put missions or lives at risk. Will you join me in calling for that review today? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2604-trump-shut-out-1]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2604-trump-shut-out-1]

Thank you,

Jason
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a56a08eca39c4c84a455f6f7ba8bd4ce&_e=B4QCkSJaONm3O114RT-u4exUcTdRXUh3BP4-ZpZgp-Lmx74m0W5_Fmjply6MQ8PKeJrLqttQgo3Pa3UUUemhjNgmISNrEIGIuGJm1bkZc-zzlBCWmLEAiB3VNflPey0093O0drH6xURPwVJ8XATpygPN4FTkIT1bXJiTGgAwg0Hy0wyz0gI-a2tC77J3pC6fmrDi4EcrHBN10gswdSBEWg-tONVcPrFCIBPIYjELrz1CtjkB60PqYuqeeIDiqLhFPIRDIHJrX6b4xlJBY_-Rp8v0QTnPWcqiFE3VPry5nyPzWWCCAS_T3AskhbcyZo69ixK5jJK6LnJoapn_QpDb-E9ABXBJtpW_yt3vWwmpMRR9AWZRIHrghREUNGN69OySQpzUAqoK6nN_v-3UJro_9P2RnhXf30B3_INfYngKWlcwN6B72-2VyvJNRZCkvLbphtjnEwYpU5gfZxHj8DNR2HaND5098M0cdOQMcjV6xpZ0MtRdId-2-k3YXaX_sxryAAkTheGLeYjlT7AbTB2gOn6ydYIzPdZKcOwukpuoWpmZENpQzIhYmIe4GybILQS81sh7U4i__rpBGAG-OzBR-w%3D%3D)
Peter,

We need to talk to you about what just happened in Virginia. And we need you to understand exactly what it means for every state in this country, including yours.

**Virginia Democrats just passed a referendum to gerrymander 4 congressional seats away from Republicans.**

Four seats. Gone. Redrawn.

To make matters even worse, we offered to help organizations in Virginia fight this referendum. And we were denied! They did not want to support us financially.

Here's why this is important to you.

Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger is already going on the news saying Democrats will do this in all 50 states the moment they win back the House.

All 50 states!

That is not a threat buried in a policy memo. That is an elected official -- the Governor of Virginia -- announcing the Left's playbook on the record. They are not hiding it anymore. They know that if they can redraw the map, they will not need to win the argument. They will just eliminate the competition.

Here is the truth:

If this is what Democrats are willing to do right now -- out of power, in a single state -- just imagine what they will do if they reclaim the White House and Congress.

So here is where we stand right now.

**Turning Point PAC is hiring 700 NEW ballot chasers to deploy across Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire -- the three states that will decide whether Republicans hold the House and win the presidency in 2028.**

But we need to fund them. Right now.

Every $50 we raise keeps a ballot chaser in the field for one full day -- knocking doors, building relationships, chasing every ballot before Democrats can game the system any further.

[Please send an urgent donation of $10, $26, $100, $250, or ANY amount you can generously spare today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a56a08eca39c4c84a455f6f7ba8bd4ce&_e=B4QCkSJaONm3O114RT-u4exUcTdRXUh3BP4-ZpZgp-Lmx74m0W5_Fmjply6MQ8PKeJrLqttQgo3Pa3UUUemhjNgmISNrEIGIuGJm1bkZc-zzlBCWmLEAiB3VNflPey0093O0drH6xURPwVJ8XATpyjXcgtxO4OE3inwr8ThCz7gdqSVRIAWyBa11BORY_Va_7HdUejr4HG147D-yfMEvnlWKD42-hltvx23OQmXlNGXYVYOb2SNE7zVc2rYo0Jnv1pn4FbUVBi01nmPp5zmZpr6qCl3f_O87a7b6n_bw4o9Svfzo4mrhiGl3LvropaNwZBa2ZuGIcZi5QPC1ltvLszcDtAT2-IgJUH2WKzoDYMnsljhb5meK7XutYLSWietp6dkCLOJcYoylAqh0pyB491DuZ7RW8w0fHdbqHuZFdXtOOXoiRD-eCS7Ajl6NKZE6Aj7dj7xuuVOAC24lScSPHfggOKVyjVfsLc0yBYnT6771KkxPGM8M3UUA7KOQvYbNowxMoHAsSLCltOUOfnxC01KP8-o9VppPpCHKEKLIhORA4EM84AKQzAJeWLax7BRAaYKzuig_0u3XdjQ1GnpijVK-qU-kcVpYeiT7919_RjQ%3D)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Peter, We need to talk to you about what just happened in Virginia. And we need you to understand exactly what it means for every state in this country, including yours. Virginia Democrats just passed a referendum to gerrymander 4 congressional seats away from Republicans. Four seats. Gone. Redrawn. To make matters even worse, we offered to help organizations in Virginia fight this referendum. And we were denied! They did not want to support us financially. Here's why this is important to you. Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger is already going on the news saying Democrats will do this in all 50 states the moment they win back the House. All 50 states! That is not a threat buried in a policy memo. That is an elected official -- the Governor of Virginia -- announcing the Left's playbook on the record. They are not hiding it anymore. They know that if they can redraw the map, they will not need to win the argument. They will just eliminate the competition. Here is the truth: If this is what Democrats are willing to do right now -- out of power, in a single state -- just imagine what they will do if they reclaim the White House and Congress. So here is where we stand right now. Turning Point PAC is hiring 700 NEW ballot chasers to deploy across Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire -- the three states that will decide whether Republicans hold the House and win the presidency in 2028. But we need to fund them. Right now. Every $50 we raise keeps a ballot chaser in the field for one full day -- knocking doors, building relationships, chasing every ballot before Democrats can game the system any further. The Red Wall starts in 2026. Help us build it. For America and for Charlie, Tyler Bowyer Executive Director Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. # [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240811%2E444211%2E3LZhHl)
We’ve hired 13 organizers so far to help us reach as many Democratic voters as possible before the elections in November. We have a staggering 84 upcoming organizing events!
We pay every single organizer a living wage—and we’re proud to.
We’re looking at our budget through Election Day and are hoping to hire even more organizers, so we can reach our goal of mobilizing 100,000 voters
Beto is setting out to visit college campuses across Texas, our organizers are having conversations every day with potential Democratic voters. This work is only possible because of contributions from supporters like you.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: “Do you think I should wait for my turn?”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5384%2E35263%2Ew28xFd)
I want to take a moment to share a story about my very first campaign, folks. [**But if you’re short on time, please consider making a contribution today. Your support powers my work supporting Democrats running for Senate so we can retake a majority this November.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-apr26.zut75R&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5384%2E35263%2Ew28xFd) Back in 1997, when I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin, no one thought I could win. And after an extremely popular challenger entered the race, I was written off. I recall huddling with one of my staffers at the time. She said, “Well, Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” **I looked her right in the eye and asked,_“Do you think I should wait for my turn?”_** And then I said: I believe that women have to run and not wait our turn — especially when it’s hard. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder, or we’d never get anywhere. Defying the odds, I ended up winning that race. Wisconsinites elected me and sent the very first woman from Wisconsin to the House of Representatives. We've defied the odds several times since then, making progress for our state and our country. Now, I need this team's help as we fight back against this extreme and corrupt administration. [**Can I count on your support?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-apr26.zut75R&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5384%2E35263%2Ew28xFd) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-apr26.0nKLzm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5384%2E35263%2Ew28xFd)

name: Yes or No
subject: Peter: Do YOU approve of Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)

name: Chaz Molder
subject: What I did instead of checking Twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
Highly recommend it.

| | | | |
---
Peter, I went turkey hunting this past Sunday, and you know, between that and Mule Day on Saturday, it's been one of those stretches that reminds me why I live in Tennessee. And, why I love Tennessee! [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/iT9gFlCwx7KHOtoIwUODag~~/AAUS1hA~/-_Iu8kP4-t87S0XXwQ6MurPvd5nzg11DTA7dWXTCGlwod4nv9Mty6D-pXcizJjqqyMaGYU_V5jge2WxB8lW-04uEfu1t_bKLYEVRyKUcg-ld83n1wSqHiJlNV3ZkHzhP4Jx1S4WvgXDjCo_Pi4HaTDHbowChHvbEIoAyywdwTIDC_OiqWZ_ajsStWGaTEfeYmJ8-sKk_fAPzcEDb4Zndpx_mhgy_OuxiPYduKhnyrfytT8eyiAxzaMnVTdH9wlzpQ9lGQBt3ZAnM2RrKso7eIA~~) It’s a way of life. You have to live it to understand it. I’ve lived it, and our kids are growing up the same way. That is something a lot of folks here in Middle Tennessee understand because it's the same for them. We take care of our corner of Tennessee, and we hope that the people making decisions in Washington have some idea of what life actually looks like back home. That part keeps bothering me — because I don't think Andy Ogles has any idea what life is like here at home. Andy is too busy chasing headlines to notice that the people he's supposed to represent are living a life he doesn't seem to understand or care much about. [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/GMg9eZCiJpJs0yL4Q2HDIQ~~/AAUS1hA~/-_Iu8kP4-t87S0XXwQ6MurPvd5nzg11DTA7dWXTCGlwod4nv9Mty6D-pXcizJjqqyMaGYU_V5jge2WxB8lW-04uEfu1t_bKLYEVRyKUcg-ld83n1wSqHiJlNV3ZkHzhP4Jx1S4WvgXDjCo_Pi4HaTDHbowChHvbEIoAyywdwTIDC_OiqWZ_ajsStWGaTEfeYBAIgGTA9WPUYEgcmkU1__05xoJY45ZGh8Heb7rQtMVsDG88BX_Nr-ZujJIGVtUedjG84Oqe0EL8DtzuGOvDbrA~~) As Drew Holcomb’s lyrics in ‘Tennessee’ say, ‘I was born here. name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I’m still buzzing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Let’s make a big Blue wave in November.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4551%2E898137%2EePF5R0)
The Michigan Democratic Party convention was last week, and I'm still buzzing with excitement.
There's nothing quite like it — thousands of people in one room, a sea of signs, reunions with organizers I haven't seen in years, and that feeling that everyone there is fighting for the same thing.
If you’ve been scrolling through your feed lately, you know how heavy the world feels right now. It is easy to feel small when the headlines are dominated by divisiveness and the weight of the challenges ahead.
I feel it, too. But then I walked onto that stage at the convention. I looked out at the faces of people from the 4th, the 7th, and the 10th districts who are fired up to flip their seats blue and take back the U.S. House of Representatives. I saw the volunteers who have spent years knocking on doors that never seemed to open — _until one day, they did._
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-april2026.vCnu4h&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4551%2E898137%2EePF5R0)
And suddenly, the anxiety lifts. Because when the world feels down, that is precisely when we come together. And when we come together, we don’t just hope for change.
**We build power.**
**[Seeing everyone’s energy_](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6105?t=3&akid=4551%2E898137%2EePF5R0)** , I knew we were ready. We have the team to make a big ass Blue Wave happen in Michigan. We are ready to fight, **and we are ready to win.**
[**We can carry this McMentum all the way through the primary and the general with you on our side. Can we count on you to donate now to keep this team rolling?**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-april2026.vCnu4h&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4551%2E898137%2EePF5R0)_

clean_body: Let’s make a big Blue wave in November. The Michigan Democratic Party convention was last week, and I'm still buzzing with excitement. There's nothing quite like it — thousands of people in one room, a sea of signs, reunions with organizers I haven't seen in years, and that feeling that everyone there is fighting for the same thing. If you’ve been scrolling through your feed lately, you know how heavy the world feels right now. It is easy to feel small when the headlines are dominated by divisiveness and the weight of the challenges ahead. I feel it, too. But then I walked onto that stage at the convention. I looked out at the faces of people from the 4th, the 7th, and the 10th districts who are fired up to flip their seats blue and take back the U.S. House of Representatives. I saw the volunteers who have spent years knocking on doors that never seemed to open — until one day, they did. And suddenly, the anxiety lifts. Because when the world feels down, that is precisely when we come together. And when we come together, we don’t just hope for change. We build power. , I knew we were ready. We have the team to make a big ass Blue Wave happen in Michigan. We are ready to fight, and we are ready to win. subject: Trump election rigging scheme is crumbling, but GA is next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Democrats are fighting back, and winning.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016W03PJSxXwFkUPmqjTrxDKlhPLbKwJctpXSFEPA0XPME4RBy4ojc4AFZikQSl7lTTETnWKj1I4mZIlgw8khbo1jxspoznCs1fUieAGiwWtjf4FfHslMdsf5lY5Z_Hk5NpmBgrcU7mUwcYUT5QfHZXGuUfb1VnReNZ3KRQDMyDsiaeMRRGIcKRZAyUjfwjvIZEBdRW1lIaoazdBS7OZHBNvEkC5s7wfwgHDLZAIE8WqM=&c=L9Tzjfd--syKNUYxsuicwuXwIZmtd3jgyiFXQC8XY4iuC-ZFDv7U7g==&ch=K1akEMKuKyYddmmk5DuffVAgDYyRUZN1cRg6xFTgPWFAI2L4qWDp3w==)
---
|
Peter,
Donald Trump has launched a full-scale war against free and fair elections in his second term.
With his job approval collapsing and MAGA's House majority on the line heading into the midterms, he is pulling every lever he can to rig the outcome before voters get their say.
MAGA's election rigging strategy has two main fronts:
First, gerrymandering red states to manufacture more Republican seats in Congress.
Second, attacking elections directly -- attempting to seize voter data in key states, calling for the federalization of elections, and laying the groundwork to challenge results at the state level.
But Democrats are fighting back, and winning:

* After California redistricted, Virginia just voted to do the same. Democrats have now completely countered MAGA's gerrymandering and head into the midterms with an edge on the map.

* In 2025, we successfully defended the Wisconsin and Pennsylvania Supreme Courts from MAGA takeover attempts.

* Earlier this year, we won again in Wisconsin -- securing a pro-democracy majority on that court through 2030 at the earliest.

* We have now built a judicial firewall in two of the most critical swing states in the country for the remainder of Trump's presidency.

But the war isn't over.
In less than 26 days, another critical battle arrives. On May 19, Georgia holds a state Supreme Court election -- and Democrats have a chance to knock two MAGA judges off the bench.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016W03PJSxXwFkUPmqjTrxDKlhPLbKwJctpXSFEPA0XPME4RBy4ojc4AFZikQSl7lTTETnWKj1I4mZIlgw8khbo1jxspoznCs1fUieAGiwWtjf4FfHslMdsf5lY5Z_Hk5NpmBgrcU7mUwcYUT5QfHZXGuUfb1VnReNZ3KRQDMyDsiaeMRRGIcKRZAyUjfwjvIZEBdRW1lIaoazdBS7OZHBNkEwfs8PDSpoSZQ-Vi_g4nU=&c=L9Tzjfd--syKNUYxsuicwuXwIZmtd3jgyiFXQC8XY4iuC-ZFDv7U7g==&ch=K1akEMKuKyYddmmk5DuffVAgDYyRUZN1cRg6xFTgPWFAI2L4qWDp3w==)
---

Win these two races, and Dems are positioned to completely flip the Georgia Supreme Court in 2028, just months before the next presidential election.
Georgia has been ground zero for Trump's election rigging schemes. Fake electors. Seized ballots. Trump personally pressured officials to find 11,000 votes.
Control of GA's state Supreme Court is the firewall that stops these schemes.
But this election is getting barely any media attention. So it's going to come down to which side can turnout more voters in these final 3 weeks.
After back-to-back wins in the PA and WI Supreme Court races, Defend Our Courts is taking our winning formula to Georgia. With over 100,000 supporters nationwide, we can play a decisive role in the outcome of this race. We just need you with us.
[Peter, can we count on you to keep up the momentum by rushing a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help Democrats win another crucial battle in Georgia?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016W03PJSxXwFkUPmqjTrxDKlhPLbKwJctpXSFEPA0XPME4RBy4ojc4AFZikQSl7lTB2kJdcD5xsvlKT1IXLebkLhwSKCJSxvPXQKqwhrLkV8JkfWUPWeRZhsEUbA8PUPgOwcD8RR7NdZDMETFhjbBW1mQ_hP7AaBAjtqU7kmale_y6zbPH8U8R8xg_fg9Z_TWaNwxVlb4ekUX4eDiVSyOOzAQRTsyLzRtnAFOO0hL1LXkFG-FRVwpYuJQ8clVWjsv&c=L9Tzjfd--syKNUYxsuicwuXwIZmtd3jgyiFXQC8XY4iuC-ZFDv7U7g==&ch=K1akEMKuKyYddmmk5DuffVAgDYyRUZN1cRg6xFTgPWFAI2L4qWDp3w==)

secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg? [secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
Dear Peter,
It’s hard to believe, but April is almost over. Time is flying—and we’re now just a little over two months away from the June 30 primary.
We’re working every day to build the strongest campaign possible, reach voters across Colorado, and make sure we’re ready for what’s ahead. But with less than one week left to hit our end-of-month goals, we need your help to finish strong. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg? [secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]
As Secretary of State, Jena has already shown what it means to stand up and deliver. She has:
* Protected Colorado’s elections from extremist attacks
* Expanded access to voting, including secure vote-by-mail
* Strengthened protections for election workers and voters
As Attorney General, she’ll take that same approach even further, standing up to powerful interests, defending our rights, and making sure the law works fairly for everyone.
But with the primary fast approaching, we can’t afford to fall behind. Can you chip in today to help us close out April strong and hit our end-of-week goal of $10,000? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-jg?]

Derek — I’m excited to share that Chrissy Houlahan has endorsed my campaign for Congress and even invited me to contact you, to tell my story, and to ask for your support. Like her, I’m a veteran. Like her, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. Her childhood dream was to be an astronaut and I spent some of my career at NASA. I’m grateful for her support and hope to earn yours, too.

I’m running in Florida against Cory Mills, someone you might have heard of. And not for anything good.
Not for serving his community, not for fighting for working families, but for a deeply disturbing record of dating violence, sketchy arms deals, and stolen valor stories that are now being scrutinized from coast to coast.

**A Republican insider called him “George Santos with a gun” over his record of fraud, corruption, and violence.**

This isn't just a tabloid scandal. It’s a national security risk to have a foreign arms dealer sit on the House Armed Services and Foreign Affairs Committees. And it’s disgusting to let a man who was slapped with a restraining order serve in the U.S. House at all.

A lot has happened this month, Peter.

Artemis II gave us hope for the future and a timely reminder of what we can accomplish when we work toward a shared mission instead of division and conflict.

Back in Washington, the chaos of the Trump Administration is multiplying by the hour. The war in Iran is causing prices to soar even higher while many working families are struggling to make ends meet.

**These challenges aren’t easy – but the path forward begins with a Democratic House majority. And my race is one we need to win:**
* I was one of very few Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat back in 2024. Our race came down to the wire – and we faced _$15 million_ in outside spending and attacks from GOP groups.

* We’re preparing for our first re-election battle, and I’m facing a hand-picked MAGA challenger – endorsed by the Republican incumbent I defeated. It’s a signal that with only a few seats separating control, attention is still on this race.

name: George Conway
subject: I apologize.

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/120031/images/Screen%20Shot%202026-01-08%20at%201.35.25%20PM.png]
Is there ANYTHING I can say to get you to split a donation between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild one last time before our end-of-month deadline on Saturday?
What if I told you Mike Johnson just announced a $65 MILLION warchest to buy a Republican House majority?
What if I told you Donald Trump is trying to rig our elections nationwide??
What if I told you we’re falling DANGEROUSLY short of our end-of month deadline? We still need to raise $24,428 TODAY.
These are the most consequential Midterm elections we've faced in years... Health care, cost of living, voting rights -- it's all on the line.
I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to fight with me against these MAGA cowards. CNN says we CAN win back a Democratic House Majority. But to do it, we can’t let up for a single moment or else Trump and Mike Johnson will sense weakness, flood this district with MAGA cash, and drown our hopes of taking back the House for Democrats.
I apologize. I know you’ve heard a lot from me, and I ask a lot of you. But this is quite possibly my most urgent ask yet. If we don’t close this dangerous fundraising gap by SATURDAY AT MIDNIGHT, we could end up handing the House to Trump and giving him the power he craves.
If you care about flipping the House and saving our democracy, rush anything you can afford ASAP, before midnight on Saturday, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-conway]

David Shuster is back with his Weekly Update -- and folks, this might be the funniest one yet. The internet handed us five absolute _gems_ this week: AI parodies, song spoofs, and the kind of viral satire that reminds you the funniest people in America right now aren't on cable -- they're on your phone. One clip alone has racked up 11 million views. Another is a song parody so cutting it should come with a warning label. And the targets? Let's just say a certain FBI director is having a very, very bad week.
We're not going to spoil the countdown. But the top two are both song parodies, and one of them might actually ruin a beloved comfort-food delivery service for you forever. The number one entry? A musical farewell to a high-ranking federal official whose only crimes were absenteeism, fine wines, expensive steaks, and watching too much hockey. Hit play. Laugh out loud. Then send it to the most wound-up person you know.
* * *

name: Tim Scott
subject: 6x as far…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s that easy... | Fellow American,

“Karl Rove Warns GOP It Has to Worry About Losing the Senate in Midterms” -Mediaite

**If we lose the Senate, God help us.**

That’s why I’m doing EVERYTHING in my power to ensure that the doomsday scenario doesn’t happen.

[ With everything on the line, I’m asking you to split a donation between **FOUR critical campaigns** that could decide who wins the Senate. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b49c429ce1d4d6daeacac4462ce19db&_e=Pskg70PHjXcNwQD5WEsnb9fQd1vMPoy1awfi4mKdDQv528pLNs_43zLNJjKzqPtdKN3bFjjwyCwg6XE8O42Yk1SHIlDE2u6Jdry5wZetk3Pzh7MW7Y6nzRXjneYCkVC-6yzI-tH9sE3upHUjmZHo5MvaYgUEzQOO2iPfV0SkUkEXSo9B8bIfUyeOtZAKP9wBjE5EeNRuNA_TjDsrZVvWf2N9mzFqsuhkVcOS3uRq82bSqzgl7OxYVHlMJbCo5tHvq9ObvjB3PH8JgC0Ygo7d3WfWOTEx2ohpvbTfQ20rGPxQyn2ZSfPWb8SdMs6-p8GXCXZwFe4Dy6g9gNpLLe9n49464n4UWCecPQytvfjmRpbsQxikFnG33NBGlPT3A8DDUBWAQ8i71pXJExf3_VZ0TnhgDK5xf2wdYqz912ZjGPdW5wUjYyownqqb4f4u8K4AAzGo9h8d9Q_c1FtFF2D8wPpGe3EIfpuazvJ5bu0tGcBJ--HgUPs867rCtX_78sP3ChHTcEtNMwAUI6lUSBmHSvv5Waa-m4Mv39PL44GvkmN2glN3UD5VnE6HOWMsKOPjUZZ1jO6Q43zbsMnjVHmDe549-j2IkhTHZ4hQ38w-xRSpMR6fkd8HG1EC-644Lh5gbuCjNhG0TruSWdzzEM0HhAoE7MmVYbVL31HBcLqqfqHYY52QCPp_KcG-Ur-81rQIljvrLdWHFV0ZP0FyULTtI88dDwYndTBn2u_yc7hcloCFIele7ZEhys-tZ3nfxbOKqiZcI2M0FCeObHjLjllmi_s4BiIWIQJjjjfBh1o8FfhOueeLcdbSJllB7ChUciHCUm3FhxOykKHUzWr_XOBN1zVqxicsKCy7Ac3TfHJ_tyhqlCYZgXUQ0w6ogIgIWh8q)

_**Whatever you’re able to donate today will be split evenly between Republican candidates in Georgia, Maine, Michigan, North Carolina, Ohio, and New Hampshire.**_

These races are ground zero in the battle to stop the most extreme far-left Democrats running this cycle- just take a quick glance at what we’re up against in these battleground states:

**Sherrod Brown in Ohio** — Sherrod Brown is one of the most extreme liberals in the Democratic Party — a big-government socialist who champions higher taxes on working families, radical environmental regulations that kill jobs, and soft-on-crime policies that put Ohio families at risk. Ohio cannot afford to send this far-left ideologue back to Washington.

**Jon Ossoff in Georgia** — The vulnerable Democrat incumbent who has pushed radical immigration policies, opposed strong border security, and consistently sided with the far-left on criminal justice reform that endangers communities.

**Graham Platner in Maine** — The Bernie Sanders-backed progressive challenger with a history of extreme online rhetoric and a platform that includes far-left economic populism and identity politics.

**Abdul El-Sayed in Michigan** — The leading progressive in the open Senate seat race, a vocal advocate for Medicare for All, wealth redistribution, and other socialist-leaning policies that would explode taxes and government control.

**The radical Democrat ticket in North Carolina** — Democrats are targeting this open seat with candidates who have embraced defund-the-police style rhetoric and extreme positions on crime and borders — exactly what we cannot allow in the Senate.

**Chris Pappas in New Hampshire** — The leading Democrat in this open seat race has a long record of supporting far-left priorities like massive government spending, climate alarmism, and social policies that undermine traditional values. Chris Pappas is simply too liberal for the Granite State to send to the U.S. Senate.

clean_body: It’s that easy... | Fellow American, “Karl Rove Warns GOP It Has to Worry About Losing the Senate in Midterms” -Mediaite If we lose the Senate, God help us. That’s why I’m doing EVERYTHING in my power to ensure that the doomsday scenario doesn’t happen. Whatever you’re able to donate today will be split evenly between Republican candidates in Georgia, Maine, Michigan, North Carolina, Ohio, and New Hampshire. These races are ground zero in the battle to stop the most extreme far-left Democrats running this cycle- just take a quick glance at what we’re up against in these battleground states: Sherrod Brown in Ohio — Sherrod Brown is one of the most extreme liberals in the Democratic Party — a big-government socialist who champions higher taxes on working families, radical environmental regulations that kill jobs, and soft-on-crime policies that put Ohio families at risk. Ohio cannot afford to send this far-left ideologue back to Washington. Jon Ossoff in Georgia — The vulnerable Democrat incumbent who has pushed radical immigration policies, opposed strong border security, and consistently sided with the far-left on criminal justice reform that endangers communities. Graham Platner in Maine — The Bernie Sanders-backed progressive challenger with a history of extreme online rhetoric and a platform that includes far-left economic populism and identity politics. Abdul El-Sayed in Michigan — The leading progressive in the open Senate seat race, a vocal advocate for Medicare for All, wealth redistribution, and other socialist-leaning policies that would explode taxes and government control. The radical Democrat ticket in North Carolina — Democrats are targeting this open seat with candidates who have embraced defund-the-police style rhetoric and extreme positions on crime and borders — exactly what we cannot allow in the Senate. Chris Pappas in New Hampshire — The leading Democrat in this open seat race has a long record of supporting far-left priorities like massive government spending, climate alarmism, and social policies that undermine traditional values. Chris Pappas is simply too liberal for the Granite State to send to the U.S. Senate. All six of these far-left threats need to be defeated. I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground.

Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=735692ee418646aaa594fdded05f4d42&_e=BP1nFLIOVBqJQ_ks-iRNlDPB0b7o7RL5CCGaIrymoFmboZBBKStHgJhLsg9CZsTl-7iWFMgW6ImpCG9c72WZ_Z_VO5Yen0R13Q3bYYR0Eym3wBKuYclROBpDcjG_eZhqyclD5cX29kjTW38SnYqsA4PTeS6UMC54oaP6nMBa6m2NNI1D_3k33roW7nwvy21bZptYCVHQ5173qB0_LP2nFfP2C0cMfX53xEyTfInocE1Qd0g1_r0Ic_CUSGdi3K8dCfgNPhfVAT8L91K8AlEbG_SwZf8YGmT7kOlkFxOhKy3zntoTdgQXd1NGHSsWLTSYob8XWYL66lnGALjmCGfnHwwlzT-iPyGYdCWq_Of5AX1pZnD4xFmRBGB8w2_91FX6FQxHYoMigCio-vixL8oWG3nSP5m2wlWsPjgwHar5InN3H4cgMRDf09DKR4v_uVYRiw5sLXCsPzQKtX_DDtYJWdRrTy8Ky2pGLMr4fN2TcgbuBGenG1cBvVi7ONHT-hunsLXteM7AdRFfhXGIAgdIE98Bjbc_qLv_7orFu4bhzEhmoQEnvTomWb-EgdNhOBshS1IwnwZyP1uF27ff9xrUkn42bB17sS_WCKdtN8Y9_zXFFvEAykt9wuqCwfI2vBRvUG3KnjNf_wyLO54HA5DaK7MeojE-eN22kLqGPj2zLDw5ZzdfZuiQkqqlkx0HxmV9qqm72kW-SSAhCoKpLSvrWQ%3D%3D)
---
_Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona_
---
These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them.

They're already claimed. And we don't have extras.

By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in.

Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it.

That's where things stand right now.

We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment.

And I don't say that lightly.

Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down.

The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great.

And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing.

Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back.

**We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. **

For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there.

And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=735692ee418646aaa594fdded05f4d42&_e=BP1nFLIOVBqJQ_ks-iRNlDPB0b7o7RL5CCGaIrymoFmboZBBKStHgJhLsg9CZsTl-7iWFMgW6ImpCG9c72WZ_Z_VO5Yen0R13Q3bYYR0Eym3wBKuYclROBpDcjG_eZhqyclD5cX29kjTW38SnYqsA4PTeS6UMC54oaP6nMBa6m2NNI1D_3k33roW7nwvy21bZptYCVHQ5173qB0_LP2nFfP2C0cMfX53xEyTfInocE1Qd0g1_r0Ic_CUSGdi3K8dVnyzzlmc2xf18ZQQTAbdEBGdJVKyxkRtg4RVoZiRBwwb1XzEdCYdGszQykJZ8JqWfXgST1eYhE-tnzPTBcDxtGjJEseNujfsSBLZxPOIEAyhgSdIa2EwdVqeyS4icZ45vVwo320WdKiUyPShKAKLXu8T7ozrp6vfL-G43ei923_4fHsGTDM7szvDZz2IG0MnL6O-hkJ0hhB1g4P7t7J4c5X07cTaJu0Jd-o-HHDsAo0TSEFh-WXwPocV9467sN8jxpzAhbjKL2CS3J1syIOmxSdEoGgB9j1f-b7-EZqTW96RKHAfqwF-m2JBzhlTyXOwCllWxOMah5nR1cJz29WzJ8B1QHskM-80h5kPlerpuQzIwzCH7Pxm-iCwG_WlXIm6W6-WISr4ubWOMGmZqPz9MvSF4YihbJZFr52MfsEdq2LzU1HpTWL_3j3MH3ncfvDKr6JtURALhVmChVusBLG5PQ%3D%3D)
---
That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens.

And it's not isolated growth anymore.

**We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. **

But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America.

That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation...

And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak.

So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build.

What's different now is the pace.

**Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: **

✅ Arkansas
✅ Florida
✅ Idaho
✅ Indiana
✅ Montana
✅ Nebraska
✅ Oklahoma
✅ South Carolina
✅ Texas
✅ Tennessee

That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=735692ee418646aaa594fdded05f4d42&_e=BP1nFLIOVBqJQ_ks-iRNlDPB0b7o7RL5CCGaIrymoFmboZBBKStHgJhLsg9CZsTl-7iWFMgW6ImpCG9c72WZ_Z_VO5Yen0R13Q3bYYR0Eym3wBKuYclROBpDcjG_eZhqyclD5cX29kjTW38SnYqsA4PTeS6UMC54oaP6nMBa6m2NNI1D_3k33roW7nwvy21bZptYCVHQ5173qB0_LP2nFfP2C0cMfX53xEyTfInocE1Qd0g1_r0Ic_CUSGdi3K8dIC_TnfLiL4J5qwRJLoWEQ8UqJHjydAVCodlsvI0JcY-HpVGRjd8OL1jDtDtHTtvzNNzkZlP3Mr63UYEmeEsavp1OtY9khWIKiX56NUzYRQ0YGHE563bkokHPC5QQNjC8LLkZACwxi4nNg-yGu10ZNxistGgyyx3uygPAauPEYvt6eJLZ_p6uDft3AhM6LlWbO69fsZd-hdn89kjkHhI66f992n4bP0KvOKVm5hBGTGDWYYu2_bgSjFyxQa9ZQpC7gWQ_UE1s71vRcFf4QCejrXM90jdOxnPnEnFk18wdoX_sCdpTBSCvdjg-fW3NOdWvEryfXKukpffdOncQdvNVO4d_qb8Y9pExoNMAwm2Pv4-6ZNcoFneqNehJLpGJEcNEKiOuFN1pj2i_wbxw_V2AkIddEBsOoh4QkAToSgYlF_0KXmWgMXMb7WuXOe2pjV9wKmJ2lMhW1T9npiFuv6nCBA%3D%3D)
---
That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly.

It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up.

Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through.

And right now, that's where we're stretched.

We're not lacking interest or momentum.

We're working to keep up with both.

_So here 's how you can help... _

Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it.

**An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: **

✅ Constitutions.
✅ Chapter guides.
✅ Flags.
✅ Materials to organize and lead.

It turns a student who wants to speak up... _into one who actually does. _

And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here."

**[Each activism kit costs $25 to pack and ship to a student chapter. Will you put one into a student’s hands today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=735692ee418646aaa594fdded05f4d42&_e=BP1nFLIOVBqJQ_ks-iRNlDPB0b7o7RL5CCGaIrymoFmboZBBKStHgJhLsg9CZsTl-7iWFMgW6ImpCG9c72WZ_Z_VO5Yen0R13Q3bYYR0Eym3wBKuYclROBpDcjG_eZhqyclD5cX29kjTW38SnYqsA4PTeS6UMC54oaP6nMBa6m2NNI1D_3k33roW7nwvy21bZptYCVHQ5173qB0_LP2nFfP2C0cMfX53xEyTfInocE1Qd0g1_r0Ic_CUSGdi3K8dbZmHro9HCMRvlntvWcLnQwSuI02rAaqYZRVgIeIoXpLmF6mCvYX3KkbarWKdQ7ACYaIQVv2wOqJS6CRbO6F-PUQFPjM9RJvfHS62HDuIMkBPsm0qUeC84Tf_LotTYjqeg4xo2mAetg3sTlcmat7Lc20Kzoi3Ms8BPGwTSwAZt-iR1zB2czCgDQxAg8iYZKaFww5GqkbdrUVh9-_xzgnyoq0OPxG38PCjahpAUEZcmhb3K9qjuAGOSUEPskmpQSjhoiVjho4hcJzdAyV3iNjYIwmwsYRbZOedzVaqvmqYPzfeiPv4WxiTD3dnrkBY4_VIVVB4OgD6tWyeHqyg99as2UuuNM1j6vOZgoGzT6QGaUusTooc2Vfs9SlMMn26FF6wKffzbhlHos1CgUuvpUviz9eu86wskW55o4ncabMQuK5HaypOl-2cKLR3293RBfJVRDczXI7xXiXxHJVnINrRAg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: We don’t have enough of these right now | | | | | Friend, I want to give you a picture of what's really happening right now -- not the polished version, but what it actually looks like on the ground. Inside our office, tables are covered in supplies and open boxes. Coworkers are coming together, packing materials, sealing kits, and sending them out the door as fast as possible. Above: Activism kits bound for new chapters being packed with Constitutions, chapter handbooks, American flags, and more at TPUSA HQ in Arizona These boxes aren't sitting around waiting for someone to need them. They're already claimed. And we don't have extras. By the time one batch goes out, more requests come in. Different schools, different students, same situation -- they want to start something, and they're asking us to help them do it. That's where things stand right now. We have more students stepping up than we can fully support at the moment. And I don't say that lightly. Because for years, the challenge wasn't getting students the tools -- it was getting them to speak up at all. Most kept their heads down. The Left has spent years trying to convince this generation to sit down, stay quiet, and be ashamed of their country and everything that makes it great. And for a long time, it worked. But that's all changing. Now, we're seeing students stand up and push back. We saw it clearly at Wheeling High School in the Chicago suburbs -- Charlie's alma mater. For the first time, students there launched a Club America chapter. It took months to get approved, but a chapter is finally there. And now, students are standing outside with signs about free markets and freedom -- not because it's easy, but because they've decided it matters more than staying quiet. That's not something you can just manufacture. But it is something you can support when it happens. And it's not isolated growth anymore. We 're now working with more than 1,450 college chapters and over 3,400 high school chapters across the country. That's real scale. But if you zoom out, there are roughly 27,000 high schools in America. That means tens of thousands of campuses where the Left still dominates the conversation... And where students are waiting for someone to help them stand up and speak. So as much as this has grown, we're still in the early innings of what Charlie actually set out to build. What's different now is the pace. Many states are moving to bring Club America chapters to every high school statewide, including: ✅ Arkansas ✅ Florida ✅ Idaho ✅ Indiana ✅ Montana ✅ Nebraska ✅ Oklahoma ✅ South Carolina ✅ Texas ✅ Tennessee That brings us to ten states now taking this seriously -- not just talk, but action. That kind of expansion doesn't happen slowly. It stacks quickly -- and it creates pressure behind the scenes to keep up. Because every new chapter, every new student leader, every new school means more materials, more support, more follow-through. And right now, that's where we're stretched. We're not lacking interest or momentum. We're working to keep up with both. So here 's how you can help... Right now, there are students ready to step up -- they just need the tools to do it. An activism kit puts everything they need directly into their hands: ✅ Constitutions. ✅ Chapter guides. ✅ Flags. ✅ Materials to organize and lead. It turns a student who wants to speak up... into one who actually does. And you'll make it possible for us to keep saying yes when a student reaches out and says, "I want to start something here." Every activism kit you help sponsor means one more student is ready to lead instead of sitting on the sidelines. That's how we keep saying "yes" when the next student steps forward. That's how this movement actually scales. Because the reality is, the demand is here now. The only question is whether we're equipped to meet it. And that comes down to whether people like you decide to step in and help carry this forward. One final thing: I also wanted to say thank you. If you've supported Turning Point USA before -- whether once or many times -- you've already played a role in building what you're seeing right now. Students finding their voice. More state partnerships. New TPUSA chapters like the one at Charlie's former high school. This kind of momentum doesn't happen without people willing to stand behind it. And we don't take that lightly. I appreciate you taking the time to read this, and for everything you've already done to support this work. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. Friend, what you're seeing right now is something we've been working toward for years -- a generation of young Americans who are no longer willing to sit quietly while the Left dominates their schools and culture. But moments like this don't sustain themselves. If we don't keep up, we lose ground. It's that simple. We need to keep pace with the growth happening right now -- to fund more activism kits, support more chapters, and make sure no student is left standing alone after they decide to speak up. If you've already supported Turning Point USA in the past, thank you for carrying this movement forward every single day. If you haven't yet, I'm asking you to step in now. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
I didn't grow up dreaming about running for Congress.

| |
---|---|---

---
# [I'll tell you the truth.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3102347&post_id=195369660&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1MzY5NjYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDkzMTcsImV4cCI6MTc3OTc0MTMxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxMDIzNDciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NCBwYRzTePwrtrEEr08A5rFZADPAFQTBhH4Dy5PiHY4)
### I didn't grow up dreaming about running for Congress.
| | [Harry Dunn](https://substack.com/@harryadunn)
---
| Apr 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@harryadunn)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3102347&post_id=195369660&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1MzY5NjYwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzE0OTMxNywiZXhwIjoxNzc5NzQxMzE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzEwMjM0NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2MdKYJHBf-CBBUuEQRcl15YVqD4xI0bPR9khEjPazms&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3102347&post_id=195369660&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1MzY5NjYwLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcxNDkzMTcsImV4cCI6MTc3OTc0MTMxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxMDIzNDciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NCBwYRzTePwrtrEEr08A5rFZADPAFQTBhH4Dy5PiHY4)
---
| | [](https://substack..d8cfy_7oUITTtvlDvyOdqpgg1sDDajgNfOaP6Cmb938?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/harrydunn/p/ill-tell-you-the-truth?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I'm going to be real with you.
I didn't grow up dreaming about running for Congress.
I spent 15 years as a Capitol Police Officer because I wanted to serve, not because I wanted a title. I risked my life on January 6th to face down a violent mob that Donald Trump sent to invade the Capitol. And I'm telling you right now -- the extremism in this country has only grown worse since then.
**That 's why I'm running.** Because Trump's Republicans are trampling all over the Constitution. Because Donald Trump thinks he's a king (he recently said that we "_shouldn 't even have an election" _this year). Because we need Democrats who are willing to actually stand up and fight back.
#### **[Ads are already flooding the airwaves in MD-05, and I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to fight back. If you can chip in just $5 before midnight, I would be so grateful.](https://substack.com/redirect/676818e8-61c5-444e-92a5-6408b52814ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[PITCH IN](https://substack.com/redirect/676818e8-61c5-444e-92a5-6408b52814ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Here's the thing about this race.
I'm in one of the most crowded, competitive primaries in the country -- and I'm being outraised and outspent. A handful of my opponents are self-funding their campaigns and raking in corporate money.
I'm not a millionaire and I refuse to take a cent from corporate PACs.
But I have something even better: you.
#### **[When we channel our grassroots power together, we can create real change. Please chip in $5 or anything you can today to help us raise the funds we need to build this people-powered movement.](https://substack.com/redirect/676818e8-61c5-444e-92a5-6408b52814ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ PITCH IN](https://substack.com/redirect/676818e8-61c5-444e-92a5-6408b52814ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you,
Harry Dunn
You're currently a free subscriber to [Standing Our Ground](https://substack.com/redirect/a8f7245f-a108-4b0a-93f8-499adcb57f3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..I7-xrtzZyHa5e2o22KAe0uRS2COX_AG7ZTLmFJSb0VM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I7-xrtzZyHa5e2o22KAe0uRS2COX_AG7ZTLmFJSb0VM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter
subject: I’m back in Texas fighting ICE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260425_texas2026_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260425_texas2026_act]
ICE has arrested more than 2,100 Oregonians since Trump took office for the second time.
The federal government continues to detain families in inhumane conditions, including children, those who are pregnant, and those with serious medical needs. All while using our tax dollars to do it.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260425_texas2026_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260425_texas2026_act]
I am in Texas right now conducting oversight and demanding accountability. Every person in government custody, especially the most vulnerable , deserves representation, dignity, and care.
Instead, officials are forcibly separating families and leaving children to face immigration court alone—in situations where they often cannot understand the language or the proceedings taking place.
I watched young children go through court appearances without their parents. No child should have to defend themselves against the very system that should protect them.
I am also hearing that officials are limiting medical care for minors in custody.
This is unacceptable. I took an oath as a physician to heal and protect. I serve in Congress to confront systems that cause harm. I will keep pushing for change until this system protects us, not the other way around.
I’ll keep you posted on what I find, but I will not rest until we end child imprisonment.
If you’re with me, support our campaign today. We’re less than a month away from the May 19th election, and I need your help to power our movement for change: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260425_texas2026_act]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

– Dr. Maxine Dexter

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Public lands should unite us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
For the first time, a long-standing protection for public lands was overturned. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130169851/616847411/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDk0NTZhOS1lNTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vI5w6JL4zCqksU-KnDNB55Gc2EUICgnwWOvQGgrCNuc=&emci=57d543a3-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=d49456a9-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Last week, the Senate voted along partisan lines to overturn a 20-year mineral withdrawal moratorium protecting the watershed of the Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wilderness in Minnesota, one of America’s true gems and most visited wilderness areas in the United States. **It is the first time the Congressional Review Act has ever been used to strip protections from public lands in this way.** The vote puts more than 200,000 acres of public land at risk: land that holds one of the most extraordinary freshwater systems in the country. A place of more than a thousand lakes, countless streams, and forests that have never been cut. A place where families paddle between lakes, sleep under open skies, and experience something that feels increasingly rare in this world: real freedom. I know that because my own family was there last summer. _(I was supposed to join but I was stuck in DC!)_ They carried their canoes from lake to lake, slept under a blanket of stars, and came home with memories that will stay with them for the rest of their lives. Nick Offerman — actor, woodworker & lifelong public lands advocate — strongly advocated against this vote: _"Canoeing the Boundary Waters is one of our nation's greatest available pastimes — one I've personally enjoyed my entire life. This is a place where you paddle between pristine lakes, camp under open skies, and experience real wilderness. The sulfide-ore copper mining that Congress just cleared the way for produces toxic acid runoff and heavy metals that can poison entire watersheds. We must protect these public lands from those who would turn them into a poisoned wasteland."_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130169852/616847412/-1084101055?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDk0NTZhOS1lNTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vI5w6JL4zCqksU-KnDNB55Gc2EUICgnwWOvQGgrCNuc=&emci=57d543a3-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=d49456a9-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045) Instead of listening to the people who care deeply about this place — Minnesotans, conservationists, and Americans across the country — the Senate chose an unprecedented path. No meaningful public input. No real debate about the long-term consequences. Just a blunt-force decision to allow a foreign-owned mining company to pursue a project upstream of one of our most treasured wilderness areas. _**Our public lands should never be treated this way.**_ Our public lands are not partisan. They do not belong to one party or one administration. They belong to all of us. They are one of the clearest expressions of our democracy: places where every American, regardless of background or belief, can stand on the same ground and share in something bigger than themselves. This vote is a setback. There’s no getting around that. But it is not the end of this fight. **This fight isn’t over. I will keep working in the Senate to protect our public lands, to demand transparency, and to make sure decisions like this are not made behind closed doors without the voices of the American people.** [**Will you let me know you support my work to protect our public lands by adding your name today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130169853/616847413/1223778469?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDk0NTZhOS1lNTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vI5w6JL4zCqksU-KnDNB55Gc2EUICgnwWOvQGgrCNuc=&emci=57d543a3-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=d49456a9-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130169854/616847414/-1084101055?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDk0NTZhOS1lNTQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vI5w6JL4zCqksU-KnDNB55Gc2EUICgnwWOvQGgrCNuc=&emci=57d543a3-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=d49456a9-e540-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for standing with me.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump Says He Will Cut Medicare to Pay for Iran War. Tell him HELL NO!
body:
Don't Let Trump Cut Medicare to Pay for Iran War
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't Let Trump Cut Medicare to Pay for Iran War](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7e9a3b1-bbf2-4614-9070-f77b97003a7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebebcf6a-af97-46f4-ad36-d357a4d3558a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Did you see this? Holy cow, he said it out loud. **At a private White House Easter luncheon — in remarks he tried to hide by taking the video down — Trump admitted point-blank that he will cut Medicare and Medicaid to fund his war in Iran.** _" It's not possible for us to take care of Medicaid, Medicare, all these individual things. We have to take care of one thing: military protection. We're fighting wars." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb87ad646-3de1-48e7-8247-b7195f7b2554/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) _ Hundreds of billions for an unnecessary war in Iran -- but nothing for Medicare? [_**SIGN and STOP Him.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f4ce2ca-2768-4323-aca2-3ce54260eae2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This isn't a dog whistle. It's not spin. It's the President of the United States telling 140 million Americans that the healthcare they paid into their entire working lives is now a "little scam" he can't be bothered with. [**SIGN PETITION → Tell Trump & Congress: Hands Off Our Medicare**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28729c44-d03e-41fa-bb51-f6617912bd70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Sign now — and share with as many others as you can. A lot of people missed this in the crowded news cycle, and this needs to get a lot more attention if we're going to push back and stop him.
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94c984ff-5256-41a0-a288-2a493c1b029d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action [(P.S. - Go Here for Other Actions You Can Take)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T472bf75f-9d8e-47e9-81c5-a6b4232ffcfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: [Response Requested] Please, personally endorse Ruben Gallego
body:
#

Peter -
Thanks to your help, Ruben's fighting for us in the United States Senate.
He knows what it's like to face down a tough election. And as we organize in advance of the critical elections in November, there is no one more committed to supporting the candidates we need to win than Ruben.
Ruben enlisted in the Marine Corps and fought for this country in Iraq. He was ready to fight for it again on January 6th. And he will be on the frontline of the fight in the years ahead.
As he works to defend our communities, deliver for the people of Arizona, and win back majorities in Congress in November, he’s going to need your help again. **So, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Ruben Gallego.**
[**Will you add your name to say that you’re ready to fight alongside Ruben? He would be honored if you would renew your support.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_260323/?source=em260425-1-90&akid=4116%2E734936%2EgZzwjQ) With so much happening, it might seem like adding your name is a small, insignificant act. But with thousands joining you it adds up to something far larger. When you add your name you’re helping support Ruben as he defends our democracy and fights to deliver real results to improve people’s lives through his work in the Senate. It’s important. Really. So thank you in advance for adding your name. Team Gallego

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=4116%2E734936%2EgZzwjQ). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4116%2E734936%2EgZzwjQ). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=4116_734936_gZzwjQ&akid=4116%2E734936%2EgZzwjQ)

name: Doug Jones
subject: I hate doing this.
body:
But I’ve gotta do it. | | Look. I hate doing this. **I love to campaign. I love to get out there with people. But I hate begging for money.** But we’ve got to do it. I understand that. In order to run the kind of grassroots campaign that we need to, we’ve got to get the investments from folks like you.
