name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: You paid Trump’s tariff tax, but they’recashing in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Guzman for Congress
clean_body: | | | — Make it make sense. You paid higher prices because of Trump’s illegal tariffs. Now, the corporations that charged you more are getting the refunds — not you. That’s the system we’re living in. Working people take the hit, and big companies cash in. It’s not right, and it’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. We need leaders who will take on corporate greed and fight for an economy that actually works for working people — not just the people at the top. I’m not taking corporate money or PAC money or billionaire money, so this campaign depends upon and is responsible to grassroots supporters like you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. I’m ready to take this fight to Congress. — Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Guzman for Congress PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Guzman for Congress. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Wes Moore
subject: Not a “blue state”
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)
Peter,
Some political pundits consider Maryland a “blue state.” But the reality is a little more complicated:
Two of the last four governors of Maryland have been Republicans. **_In fact, the governor right before me was a Republican._**
Winning re-election is _not_ guaranteed. We’ll have to make up for lost ground after our three-month fundraising freeze -- **[so anything you can chip in today will help us catch up.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-2.6YPpKJ&refcode=em-20260425-2&t=2&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)**
With summer approaching fast, we have to prepare now for a competitive, expensive election year. That means building strong organizing and fundraising infrastructure early. The stakes will only get higher and higher.
**[If you’re able, chip in $10 to help us prepare for the fight ahead. Can I count on you to make a donation today, Peter?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-2.6YPpKJ&refcode=em-20260425-2&t=3&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-2.6YPpKJ&amount=5&refcode=em-20260425-2&t=22&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260425-2.6YPpKJ&refcode=em-20260425-2&t=23&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260425-2&t=24&refcode2=1324_1086043_0CrZe5&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)**
**[Volunteer »](https://support.wesmoore.com/a/volunteer?source=em-20260425-2)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1324%2E1086043%2E0CrZe5)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Friend,

Your time is valuable, so I promise this is the shortest email in your inbox.

We’re days away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and my finance team tells me we’re pacing behind our goal.

**I’m locked in one of the most competitive re-election races nationwide. After flipping this seat by 653 votes, I’m the most vulnerable Democratic incumbent in Southern California and I’m facing four GOP challengers.**

**[These next few days will set the tone for the primary and how hard we can hit the campaign trail to reach undecided voters – will you rush in a $3 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130170523/616849651/1897980251?refcode=em-4.25.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVkYWM0ZWYtZTk0MC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5bjBvHYPJdv41RKoJXEcC0uF6V4utyTwNrxY3UKVBB4=)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the full weight of the executive branch bearing down on me right now.
| | |
---
Hey there, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
**_[I’m asking you to split a donation between Michael Bennet and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130170650/616850153/1446759855?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1356-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWE0ZDFkYS1lYjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIGicLY0sBHl5bFkxBc3pYDjSFSWxz4Az0PdOmICR1s=)_**

"Ron DeSantis is putting his own congressional delegation in jeopardy, which probably shouldn't be surprising because all of them, as I understand it, can't stand the charismatically challenged lame-duck governor of Florida," **[said Jeffries.](https://substack.com/redirect/74db88b6-57d5-4045-ad1d-fd03d02dce93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Our message to Florida Republicans is, 'F around and find out,'" Jeffries added.

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: Afghans bled for us. Now Trump is abandoning them.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The New York Times reported that Donald Trump is planning to send some of our Afghan allies to the Congo.
#
Peter, this is urgent.
A few days ago, _The New York Times_ reported that Donald Trump is planning to send some of our Afghan allies to the Congo. If they choose not to go, they will be returned to Afghanistan, where they will almost certainly be killed by the Taliban.
**Lives are on the line, and we must act. Now.**
[**Add your name and DEMAND that Donald Trump reverse course on this outrageous plan. These people bled for us, and they need our help now.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260422_VV_AFGHAN_ALLIES/?source=em260425-1-60RS&refcode2=35107.3013755.1AlUIB&akid=35107%2E3013755%2E1AlUIB)
| [SIGN ON NOW](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260422_VV_AFGHAN_ALLIES/?source=em260425-1-60RS&refcode2=35107.3013755.1AlUIB&akid=35107%2E3013755%2E1AlUIB)
---
Thousands of brave Afghan men and women worked for and supported the United States in Afghanistan. They all did so at great risk to themselves and their families. We promised to care for them and offer them safety should their country ever fall.
After we withdrew in 2021, some of those allies were able to evacuate here, and others to friendly nations. Far, far too many were left behind, and many have already been killed.
**This is a moral stain on this country that will not be lifted in our lifetimes.** It is infuriating, and will have a serious impact both on our reputation and our capability to wage and win wars. Our failure here **_will_** come back to haunt us in future conflicts when we find ourselves in need of allies on the ground.
VoteVets is mobilizing action on Capitol Hill to stop this, but the only way to guarantee action is for the American people to raise hell. The least we can do is speak out against this, and I am asking you to add your voice.
Specifically, each of us has a US Representative and two US Senators. Their staff are trained and organized to take our calls and to inform their boss about what we say. I have seen them work and they are terrific. Please call them on this matter.
**And please:[Demand that Trump stop this. These Afghans fought by our sides. They put their lives on the line. We made them promises, and they will die if we do not keep our word.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260422_VV_AFGHAN_ALLIES/?source=em260425-1-60RS&refcode2=35107.3013755.1AlUIB&akid=35107%2E3013755%2E1AlUIB)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260422_VV_AFGHAN_ALLIES/?source=em260425-1-60RS&refcode2=35107.3013755.1AlUIB&akid=35107%2E3013755%2E1AlUIB)
---
Please. This cannot wait.
V/R
Paul Eaton
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired
Senior Advisor, VoteVets

Things are getting serious in Texas, Peter.

My friend, Chip Roy, is in a runoff for Texas Attorney General. Everything is on the line.

I've known Chip a long time - and I don't say this lightly: There is no one tougher, more relentless, and no one more committed to the America First agenda than Chip Roy.

He's stood shoulder to shoulder with President Trump, fighting to undo the damage of the Biden years and restore law and order, secure our border, and defend the Constitution.

In Congress, Chip has taken on the cartels flooding our communities with drugs and crime. He's fought to protect the integrity of our elections. And he's been a leading voice demanding real border security - not empty promises.

**Now, in this runoff, the stakes couldn't be higher.**

The establishment is coming for Chip Roy. California billionaires and special interest groups are pouring into Texas to try to buy this election.

_They know Chip won't bend.
They know he can't be bought.
And that's exactly why they're trying to stop him._

Texas is the backbone of conservative leadership in this country. We cannot allow coastal elites to come in, meddle in our elections, and install someone who won't fight.

Texas doesn't need just any Republican.

Texas needs a proven conservative warrior - someone who will stand up to the radical Left, defend the rule of law, and take the fight directly to those trying to undermine our state.

**[That fighter is Chip Roy.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=092f7dded9a149d0a563c26eb583b7d5&_e=dJFh9MsVl7fZTkJ5zGoG8-GkoV8_CePCSd3yoBCZWkDR8zqhRIIo8ILT7mKEohyRejAtllG1XcJ8-yOqM20xqGInK_5w3e5-V8fdwv2O4Fy89VxKbUWHS2-0BQJys3BJV-_XuJXnuleWz0qQ5udyPzNS8--32Laeb9eaXJ4Y-gDvQ_MndGAd04OxY8PPda5e6qhCDj-4g6CV_YPcH66s3a2iw1lhfsN8KRnUmVh_J9jjawqgAaipQSq99FD4BqoJy0pVVdxOlmA-6WZ4cuxZjpJgcPJCN88RlrVW_YzQfPIRO75sbZub74W5I2ZRFdg_z4_9o11UPL4MU0hAqhMmZ29ov6ZJvKFlefPiuxNE6ZUV9CZmdQvXoF5EqDSaIAh2C8Nr44sCK0uovUH8jWDW-hwq-bGcDofNgkmJbnRgHs-5_9dHxVDqp_v-aXuVPPgvtMqbBzgirgWi9WCCaw9UFCNQm0aG__1ckRZbKynazYtUqIIm6Mb-7jL3sPTnWpJZ66TJkOvhJQcTC-x8IUPPgjRPnarPj0gtQaWx3CKGdGNq49pyRa5R5qV8prsmrCnq0TLb2HcvN147kIXqQYbnmLKX2SzR31kv4X1Qp6IxXQy8ajzp4RflHeQZkY1Lukqy8MLprYcrnmmWj_mWdVYWeZzqvPlkPnzyXRHX2eqAkkc%3D)**

He's stood shoulder to shoulder with President Trump, fighting to undo the damage of the Biden years and restore law and order, secure our border, and defend the Constitution. In Congress, Chip has taken on the cartels flooding our communities with drugs and crime. He's fought to protect the integrity of our elections. And he's been a leading voice demanding real border security - not empty promises. Now, in this runoff, the stakes couldn't be higher. The establishment is coming for Chip Roy. California billionaires and special interest groups are pouring into Texas to try to buy this election. They know Chip won't bend. They know he can't be bought. And that's exactly why they're trying to stop him. Texas is the backbone of conservative leadership in this country. We cannot allow coastal elites to come in, meddle in our elections, and install someone who won't fight. Texas doesn't need just any Republican. Texas needs a proven conservative warrior - someone who will stand up to the radical Left, defend the rule of law, and take the fight directly to those trying to undermine our state. With the runoff underway, every dollar matters. The other side is spending big, and we need to make sure Chip has the resources to finish this fight and win. Peter, we’ve got
good news and bad news.

The good news: A recent poll shows Abdul narrowly leading the Democratic
field.

Momentum is on our side heading into the final stretch of this primary
race, and it’s all thanks to support from this grassroots team.

The bad news: A Super PAC dedicated to electing Republican senators just
announced they’re spending a whopping $45 million to flip Michigan red:

[ MAGA ]MAGA Money is coming for Michigan: $45M

We know we can win this primary, but we also have to be ready to take on
the right-wing mega donors itching to hand Donald Trump another Senate
seat.

Peter, Abdul is
the only candidate in this race who’s never taken corporate PAC money.
This grassroots team is the reason why we’re in a position to win, and
we’re counting on folks like you to step up and chip
in to defeat our opponents and send a Bernie-backed
fighter to the U.S. Senate.

Peter,

body:
I’ve always believed that we have an opportunity not just to participate in the transition to clean energy across the country, but to lead it. | | | [](http://links.matsuiforcongress.com/s/c/ThmHR47-iwMXWKB66zif-0sP7fWoFpI6wtCzJWiZdCIGF2jMWZ9RqrWzPd3p44TzKSWqFPoAtGDlDUqL1Vyez84MAZU4lUFJPq2GMUs9R5WcNluW1ASWadas6bxyyxodHKpA35JQ-nZTkDZXWMl7vItfS4M87yS8EdI_qBlUetVm_rDO9DL2rdL5VRhoiNem2R32rf_ldP9YZkC6HRFa5GKf0H7NmNJoF18bOodASO7QUQvRdv9GGqTjP8mzEQQbUUJA_CfqV08ZAZj2cCOmTuVKv2rj5VKbvPQ1unBNN9NsPf0Tfip2yyPWqsyRiSfoH1cN3zy0fG6Avul8vueR05XrVF31XDVxwwmH8sIKPVgGupGey4qJlfXJjixF3eXgKkfIQSsb7wsVqHB9cwWvaHGA7lAh_7Jck7TZSCP4Q5xioOvJj8MpYI8bHeoCjfuEjpTBrkZVSn-IXvJ5VJAvwJjW84LiK7wpCFb1BVouHXhs7kO_KOKwgw7c9kU4Vl7RFsFKlEWkOZ9sgTV_8xcQapnPm5zUqGQu93xuVHZq96r5aegnZFy4O1KRhzlLDw1OIs04dP3OtfpO0s35R4UcXdb01vw-Ds25sn2YR3NrorvWaYOjkFiyRhhZw7Y9mO7rd72nX7r2FFZa6E2AyvDi4ZEMK8mHIETkXzS5k8qOwlmTFqQPXdxPpQ0f-WKbj1kG4djsWo_NpLkPkVzpdjJs_UaDbNjfvv5GHVHHwQDseJQ2jiqh25sUcWcPbyjxHvw5WiJJWVisswhlf04I0XBIR3HDQNp7DgHdxeVNiZ003dAgLDQYDQ6YnSZJbxbcutKIRWj7m1uu4pmcP_bqEDv_tiLXWUjZQl6ENFzzOrNPNEI8yOv2dHX8uiRHMPPnktflg0yJUU7d4VC_IRnSOw/9yl_vzCLgLdQEshXlrtBUzu-ZHsiOU_D/20) Hi friend, I’ve always believed that we have an opportunity not just to participate in the transition to clean energy across the country, but to lead it. That’s why I’ve made it **a priority to pass clean energy legislation** that invests in making our communities safer, healthier, and more modern in the face of climate change. Recently, I authored the Secure Grid Act, which would allow states to receive funds to evaluate weaknesses in their energy infrastructure before natural disasters. I’m focused on energy efficiency, which led me to introduce the Healthier and Greener Schools Act to provide funding for electric school buses nationwide. I believe each and every one of us should be able to invest in a cleaner future, so I worked to expand tax credits for low and middle-income families who install rooftop solar panels. [](http://links.matsuiforcongress.com/s/c/3dsmoseKjiT3l0uPIss6cjBzYzeW2w6Dt6Ebkfn9d67A3XsaXhq_XOq9xNEt94G_PbPKOhNZpbcy2FPrViQ3hZn7_hwRWfI7CMhSiEE-U7dYn3HYSd62lwp1ZVPm5aPfeW3ESgW1EWQbLDbOmm3PofU0Hl3q1DFcI0uhs9VEU9jqwv5ZPvIbd_uny5JeGWmUf7c8nE7jKeVh8P_thjyBxmUOIs8s77ImAiXLgRyRwa6vymi5gSQ0Cw3TNTizL_wY_2K1lKP3RI7ru64qbtcT7iIJn_QhKLMyqDlrGXPOVB2mcM7aFsRy1-c7lnJeQDdfWY9XeR-PCl6U61AEpWdtGWVWnnkN0UPMQJXth_hNVh8ROuAH12TwMZksCWUjxDetVzYKdApVxixIiWDCyL39w3KUhyl7Vg56N2j2zUu1NcvNZ7mgjLBXvcvwe6T3NmISfCg-K9VfopX_qptKjBVWjTSE8wJ0k6CZl_kkQPni-iPpi9HRGuHGeI8Axt7Bi497xqut5DM7QihsGzXaXTcXDlGE7MGmym6rlNhYGjQfZ-d3RIomxnyQddTB_KXRj64xc7SDd2m-iAyVy46QTWplzQ2DhJwD4gxy22ubAhimRiOWcToH8sXstCafBRDxqI0rNHkS6if8byHvXphDsfGmOuxZZKoL2BlMAKiCYljwJjnP8_H5ck3HLBn50y6FBDabDU7hS2ydWii4P287lKzg-Y5EVVdpfx236toeaFncPidRp92OnAV3QAs4twvkyz5rZnolbvk9P5I87H1mEDOfdpVi8GtJySwPbMy4zMBYjeoGufcx9gcxHzibe6lBhTZmDZ-WW1uLsuahIOk0LM18tZJRlTn9I8xUDJRXt6ZikXAmzmrQSXw2bT6HnOR4RojT5XFURGd-S4MQodg_qw/S5gZJ38lU32xN9f1jpRZnOJL3BuWk-AT/20) I’m committed to initiatives that will transition us to 100% clean energy by 2030, but I need your help to keep us on track. clean_body: I’ve always believed that we have an opportunity not just to participate in the transition to clean energy across the country, but to lead it. | | | Hi friend, I’ve always believed that we have an opportunity not just to participate in the transition to clean energy across the country, but to lead it. That’s why I’ve made it a priority to pass clean energy legislation that invests in making our communities safer, healthier, and more modern in the face of climate change. Recently, I authored the Secure Grid Act, which would allow states to receive funds to evaluate weaknesses in their energy infrastructure before natural disasters. I’m focused on energy efficiency, which led me to introduce the Healthier and Greener Schools Act to provide funding for electric school buses nationwide. I believe each and every one of us should be able to invest in a cleaner future, so I worked to expand tax credits for low and middle-income families who install rooftop solar panels. I’m committed to initiatives that will transition us to 100% clean energy by 2030, but I need your help to keep us on track. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Together, we can protect the planet we share. – Doris As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region. Paid for by Matsui for Congress

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Guess who’s back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9756%2E5257348%2ED6EYsr ]Adam Schiff for Senate

He’s back,
Derek.

Donald Trump spent his night reposting crazy conspiracy theories ... about
me. Take this post about the “Hammer of Justice” from Elon Musk and Trump:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6442?t=1004&akid=9756%2E5257348%2ED6EYsr ]Trump reposting a video from Elon Musk featuring Adam Schiff

Trump also wants me in prison:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6442?t=1005&akid=9756%2E5257348%2ED6EYsr ]A wacky conspiracy theory post about Adam

You would think that with a war on and our service members in harm's way,
he would have more important things to focus on, but apparently not. And
these weren’t the only attacks that Trump made on me.

But make no mistake,
Derek — this isn't just about me,
though he certainly enjoys smearing me online.

This is about a president trying to distract from his failures and his
unpopular war, and to intimidate anyone who holds him accountable.

I've been calling him out for his illegal war in Iran, the economic chaos
he’s creating, and the growing corruption he is profiting from, even as
ordinary families struggle to make ends meet.

So he’s lashing out again.

When Trump hurls lies, misinformation spreads faster than facts. That
benefits him, empowers his allies in Congress, and makes it harder for
voters to see what’s at stake.

I’m speaking out, not just to defend my record on impeachment or national
security. But to defend our democracy and the rule of law from dangerous
charlatans like Trump.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6442?t=1006&akid=9756%2E5257348%2ED6EYsr ]Can you donate to help me respond to these lies and keep up the work
that holds Trump accountable? If he’s posting about me, it means I’m doing
something right.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q22026_abs_em.WPzzDc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260425_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9756%2E5257348%2ED6EYsr ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

body:
| I launched my campaign for Congress to stop Donald Trump's far-right agenda
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2132%2E259176%2EP7nYKv) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2132%2E259176%2EP7nYKv)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11099?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.25_Troye-On-The-Line_B4_F1_S4_C4_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2132%2E259176%2EP7nYKv) I've put everything on the line to speak out against Donald Trump and his far-right, enabling cronies. **I'm Olivia Troye. I'm the daughter of an immigrant and a truck driver who worked my way up to be one of the only women working in counterterrorism after being moved by the devastation of 9/11.** During my time at the Pentagon, I had a front row seat to _the chaos, the corruption, the calculated cruelty_ from the Trump administration. I pushed back when others wouldn’t. And when the dangers grew too great – I resigned. But I didn't go quietly. I've blown the whistle on MAGA for the illegal and unethical way they've "led" our country. And in return, I've received threats against my life and been dragged to court by Trump's attorneys. But here's the thing: **if I stay silent, that means their intimidation tactics worked. It means that their lawsuits and their death threats worked.** _So I've never backed down. And I won't start now._ [**I launched my campaign for U.S. House because Virginia – and the rest of our country – deserves every fighter they can get in Congress. I've set a goal to raise $500,000 – and to be honest with you, I started from scratch, so I need every person still reading this to step up... Tom Tiffany, Conservative Champion for Wisconsin ** ** Like me, Tom knows that true leadership starts with the people, not the elites. Tom grew up on a dairy farm and spent two decades running a small business in Wisconsin. He isn't a career politician. He's a husband, a father of three daughters, and a businessman who has spent his life signing the front of paychecks. ** ** In Congress, Tom has been a fearless defender of the 2nd Amendment and a fiscal hawk who knows how to balance a budget. Now, he's running for Governor of Wisconsin to take that same grit to the statehouse. ** ** Whether it's protecting our borders or standing up for our farmers, Tom Tiffany never backs down. ** ** The Mission: Taking Back the Midwest! ** ** Tom and I both have tough battles ahead of us. The Radical Left is terrified of unapologetic Conservatives who actually deliver results. They have the Liberal billionaires and the dark money machines, but we have something they'll never have: YOU. ** ** We aren't running for the lobbyists or the bureaucrats. clean_body: Thanks for giving me the time of day. | Patriot, thanks for giving me the time of day. A lot of folks don't open these emails, but I'm glad you're here. I wanted to introduce myself and ask you for a small favor. I'm John James, and I have lived a life defined by service. From graduating from West Point to leading Apache helicopter platoons in Iraq, I've always gone where the fight is. After returning home, I helped grow my family's business, and in 2022, I took that fighter's spirit to Congress. John James, US Army Captain But now, Michigan, the state I've been blessed to call home, is at a major turning point. We've been dominated by radical policies for too long, and I refuse to watch the state I love slip away. That's why I'm running for Governor to finally flip Michigan RED and bring common sense back to Lansing. To win this battle, I'm standing shoulder-to-shoulder with another conservative warrior: Tom Tiffany. Meet Tom Tiffany: A Champion for Wisconsin Tom Tiffany, Conservative Champion for Wisconsin Like me, Tom knows that true leadership starts with the people, not the elites. Tom grew up on a dairy farm and spent two decades running a small business in Wisconsin. He isn't a career politician. He's a husband, a father of three daughters, and a businessman who has spent his life signing the front of paychecks. In Congress, Tom has been a fearless defender of the 2nd Amendment and a fiscal hawk who knows how to balance a budget. Now, he's running for Governor of Wisconsin to take that same grit to the statehouse. Whether it's protecting our borders or standing up for our farmers, Tom Tiffany never backs down. The Mission: Taking Back the Midwest! Tom and I both have tough battles ahead of us. The Radical Left is terrified of unapologetic Conservatives who actually deliver results. They have the Liberal billionaires and the dark money machines, but we have something they'll never have: YOU. We aren't running for the lobbyists or the bureaucrats. We're running to protect your family, your paycheck, and your freedom. If we're going to pull out these wins and flip Michigan and Wisconsin RED, we need every Patriot in our corner. | | | | | | Please don't sit on the sidelines while the Left tries to buy these elections. Join Tom and me in this mission today. | I can't thank you enough for your support. Respectfully, John James U.S. Army Captain Use of John James ' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | Paid for by Tiffany for Wisconsin PO Box 620217 Middleton, WI 53562 To unsubscribe from Tom Tiffany,

# The TTV Weekly Wrap Up
---
| Your time is valuable, and I want to be a good steward of it. So we're starting something new — a **weekly wrap-up** built to keep you informed without flooding your inbox. Each edition will give you a clear picture of what's unfolding, why it matters, and how you can take action if you feel led. This week brought a mix of tension, accountability, and reflection. A newly declassified DNI memo exposed pre-2020 intelligence warnings about foreign interference in our election systems. Virginia's redistricting battle is moving to the courts. Arizona is in the middle of a voter roll showdown. And across the country, there's a quiet but unmistakable call back to faith and humility. Each of these reminds us why we have to stay informed, engaged, and grounded in truth.
### In Case You Missed It...

## VA's Redistricting Whiplash in VA
Razor-thin vote. Sudden injunction. High-stakes power shift. Virginia voters narrowly approved new Democrat-drawn maps — only for a Tazewell County judge to rule the referendum unconstitutional one day later. Now headed to the state Supreme Court, with four congressional seats on the line. | [Read the Article](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.)

## AZ Voter Roll Showdown
Verifying voter rolls is the basic job of a county recorder. Yet when Maricopa County Recorder Justin Heap used the federal SAVE database to flag noncitizens the response from Arizona's Democrat Secretary of State and others wasn't gratitude. It was attack. With the 2026 midterms ahead, the fight in one of America's most-watched counties is just getting started. | [Read the Article](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/lmu2rmld6efmhn7xw2wh6h8w327qxigh4dogv/8ghqhohonologqak/aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvYXJpem9uYS1lbGVjdGlvbnMtbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LXZvdGluZy1ub25jaXRpemVuLWI1MmNiZGI0ODEyNjA0ZmFjN2M0MTJmODQyYjI4M2Mx)

## **Cut Through the Noise**
* Election policy is being made in real time — and the side that shows up wins.
* Rules. Deadlines. Process. The details aren't details — they're everything.
* Narratives shift by the news cycle. Truth doesn't.
* And above it all — God remains sovereign.

## **Grounded in Truth**
A weekly word from the TTV team. Want one every day? Join us in TTV Now. _Father, we take comfort in knowing that Your eyes are open and Your ears are attentive to every prayer lifted for our nation. You are not distant or unaware, but fully present, listening, and ready to respond. We humble ourselves before You and ask that You would forgive, restore, and bring spiritual renewal across our nation. Make us into a nation that once again relies on the One Who created it. Lead our people back to truth, unity, and reverence for You as our foundation. And as for the plans of the enemy who seeks to destroy, steal, and kill, we declare that no weapon formed against “We the People” shall prosper. We take authority over every weapon of darkness that threatens our nation. We boldly stand against evil and ask that You send Your Holy Spirit, moving like wildfire through this nation, to heal our land. In Jesus’ Name, Amen_ ~ Jenna Riggs For more prayers and encouragement from Jenna, join our [Devotionals Space](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/lmu2rmld6efmhn7xw2wh6h8w327qxigh4dogv/8ghqhohonololqtk/aHR0cHM6Ly9jb21tdW5pdHkudHR2bm93Lm9yZy9jL2Rldm90aW9uYWxzLw==) in the TTVN Community! |
---|---|---
|
## **Until Next Week**
Thank you for standing with us. Election integrity isn't a moment — it's a commitment. And it doesn't happen in Washington. It happens because citizens like you stay informed, stay engaged, and refuse to look away. That's how transparency takes root. That's how accountability is built — one step, one state, one community at a time. True the Vote will keep showing up, keep digging, and keep telling the truth. We hope you'll keep showing up with us. | [Stand With Us](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/lmu2rmld6efmhn7xw2wh6h8w327qxigh4dogv/l2hehmhl7l3l3ws6/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==)

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130170935/616851418/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTEyNTQyNC1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=At6ACIetEZwDrVIko3dBZDlvaq-IW7NNhSs1FyVud-E=) Colorado’s Senate seat has a history of flip-flopping back and forth. In 2014, Cory Gardner flipped this seat red. In 2020, we flipped it back to blue. In 2026, MAGA Republican Mark Baisley is looking to flip this seat red again. He’s got the full support of Lauren Boebert and has promised to partner with the Trump administration. He’s pushed extreme views like creating a national abortion ban, overturning commonsense gun control, and attacking his LGBTQ colleagues as having a “brokenness in their spirits and in their minds.” **We can’t let a guy like this represent our values in the U.S. Senate.** **_[I know we’ve said it before, but the only way we can defend this seat and keep our far-right opponent out of power is with the support of folks like you. Our win in 2020 wasn’t a fluke. It was the result of a dedicated, people-powered team.
That’s what pushed us over the finish line and helped us secure a huge victory for Democrats and working people. Thanks to that win, we’ve been able to deliver real results for Colorado: investing billions to confront the climate crisis, lowering prescription drug costs, and taking action to make housing more affordable.
With control of the Senate at stake — _and with Baisley and Trump DESPERATE to flip this seat red_ — we’re counting on this team to help us win again and keep moving Colorado forward.
**_[We can’t let this seat keep flip-flopping back and forth. Help us keep it blue AND take back the Senate on November 3rd by chipping in now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130170943/616851428/-584038332?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=email_042526_flipflopping&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTEyNTQyNC1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=At6ACIetEZwDrVIko3dBZDlvaq-IW7NNhSs1FyVud-E=)_**

John

subject: Latest News from Team Mendoza 🌵 April 25, 2026

body:
We're so excited to share the latest news with you!

| | | | | [|

| |
# THE MENDOZA BRIEF
# The Latest News from Team Mendoza
# April 25, 2026
---
| | The Mendoza Brief is a way for our campaign to share the latest news, opportunities, and updates from the campaign trail. 🏜️
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [ORDER YOUR MENDOZA YARD SIGN TODAY!](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=58055acbbc&e=fea3203902)
---
|
---
| |
# $2.4 Million First Quarter
# $3.5 Million in the Bank
---
| | We’re proud to announce that Jo had a blockbuster first quarter of 2026, raising **over $2.4 million** in the first three months of the year - **among the top-raising House candidates in the nation**. She raised **more than double** the amount of Juan Ciscomani, and ended the quarter with **over $3.5 million cash on hand**.
With over 80,000 individual supporters and an average contribution of $32 from across Arizona and the country, Jo is [poised to flip AZ-06](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=90a7345f4e&e=fea3203902) in November and deliver the servant leadership our district deserves.
---
[|
---](https://joannamendoza.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a848c5089d2c16d92422d70c8&id=279a9b4e90&e=fea3203902)
|
---
| |
# Jo Joins MS NOW to Hold Juan Ciscomani Accountable
---
| | In case you missed it, Jo joined MS NOW’s “The Last Word” and “Politics Nation” to discuss the campaign’s groundbreaking first quarter and to hold Juan Ciscomani accountable for voting directly against our district’s interests and siding with his DC party bosses.
---

# Mendoza HQ is Open for Business!

Signs are currently available in 3 colors and come with an H stake.

clean_body: We're so excited to share the latest news with you! | | | | | | | | | | | | THE MENDOZA BRIEF The Latest News from Team Mendoza April 25, 2026 | | The Mendoza Brief is a way for our campaign to share the latest news, opportunities, and updates from the campaign trail. 🏜️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | $2.4 Million First Quarter $3.5 Million in the Bank | | We’re proud to announce that Jo had a blockbuster first quarter of 2026, raising over $2.4 million in the first three months of the year - among the top-raising House candidates in the nation. She raised more than double the amount of Juan Ciscomani, and ended the quarter with over $3.5 million cash on hand. With over 80,000 individual supporters and an average contribution of $32 from across Arizona and the country, Jo is in November and deliver the servant leadership our district deserves. | | | Jo Joins MS NOW to Hold Juan Ciscomani Accountable | | In case you missed it, Jo joined MS NOW’s “The Last Word” and “Politics Nation” to discuss the campaign’s groundbreaking first quarter and to hold Juan Ciscomani accountable for voting directly against our district’s interests and siding with his DC party bosses. | | | Mendoza HQ is Open for Business! | | This week, we officially opened our first campaign office! Team Mendoza was joined by supporters and members of the community to celebrate the campaign’s first office opening of the cycle. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Yard Signs Are Here! 🪧 | | In case you missed it, yard signs are here! Order your very own Mendoza for Congress yard sign today to show your support for Jo while investing in our field program! Signs are currently available in 3 colors and come with an H stake. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us! Sign up to Volunteer! | | Are you ready to get involved and do your part to help flip AZ-06? We’re always looking for volunteers who want to canvass, phone bank, host events, and more! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Apply for a Summer Internship! | | Team Mendoza is looking for motivated interns who are ready to be a part of flipping AZ-06! If you’re a student looking to learn more about campaigns, reach out today! We’re extending the deadline for applications, so reach out now! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Jo is on the Go! | | The 2026 general election is 192 days away \- and Jo is already out in the district, listening to and meeting with everyday people, and laying the groundwork to fight for southern Arizonans in DC. Stay tuned for when Jo will be in a community near you! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Jo in the News | | | | | Thank you! | | Jo and the rest of Team Mendoza remain grateful for your support! This campaign is about people, and we will always work to meet the needs of AZ-06. If you have any questions, do not hesitate to reach out to us. body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130171131/616851999/-1080350292?refcode=WUEFEP79_20260425_Remember26_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUyZTBjMy1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgWnUcm4n_NHteBUH1B-Vo73Um8pqSwqKO8IxuAls4s=) Peter, we want you to remember these five names:
1. **Kaela Berg**
2. **JoAnna Mendoza**
3. **Lauren Babb Tomlinson **
4. **Cherlynn Stevenson **
5. **Shannon Taylor **

These five women are running in some of the most critical U.S. House races in the country. They're all Mission Majority candidates, meaning the path to taking back our House majority runs through these women. **[Before we explain more, will you donate now to our $150,000 End-of-Month goal to support Democratic pro-choice women across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130171132/616852000/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP79_20260425_Remember26_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUyZTBjMy1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgWnUcm4n_NHteBUH1B-Vo73Um8pqSwqKO8IxuAls4s=)** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130171133/616852001/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP79_20260425_Remember26_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUyZTBjMy1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgWnUcm4n_NHteBUH1B-Vo73Um8pqSwqKO8IxuAls4s=)

**Kaela Berg (MN-02)** is a flight attendant, union leader, and mother who has lived the struggles of Minnesota's working families — juggling multiple jobs, fighting for her son's school resources, and standing shoulder-to-shoulder with workers for nearly two decades.

**JoAnna Mendoza (AZ-06)** , a daughter of farmworkers, served for 20 years in the U.S. Marine Corps and has spent her career fighting for veterans and working families.

**Lauren Babb Tomlinson (CA-06)** is a working mom and Planned Parenthood public affairs leader who has spent her career fighting for reproductive freedom, affordable health care, and economic opportunity for families.

**Cherlynn Stevenson (KY-06)** is the daughter of a teacher and a coal miner who flipped a red state House district and beat Republican gerrymanders — twice. She served three terms in the state legislature, where she fought for jobs, public schools, and to protect women’s reproductive freedom.

**Shannon Taylor (VA-05)** is a Virginian who made history as Henrico County's first female commonwealth's attorney, spending 12 years prosecuting violent criminals, fighting human trafficking, and defending abortion rights.
********[Will you donate toward our End-of-Month goal now to support these women — and many more — who are fighting hard to flip the House this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130171134/616852002/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEP79_20260425_Remember26_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1058507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUyZTBjMy1mMjQwLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgWnUcm4n_NHteBUH1B-Vo73Um8pqSwqKO8IxuAls4s=)********

clean_body: We need you to remember these names. | = Peter, we want you to remember these five names: 1. Kaela Berg 2. JoAnna Mendoza 3. Lauren Babb Tomlinson 4. Cherlynn Stevenson 5. Shannon Taylor These five women are running in some of the most critical U.S. House races in the country. They're all Mission Majority candidates, meaning the path to taking back our House majority runs through these women. = | = Kaela Berg (MN-02) is a flight attendant, union leader, and mother who has lived the struggles of Minnesota's working families — juggling multiple jobs, fighting for her son's school resources, and standing shoulder-to-shoulder with workers for nearly two decades. JoAnna Mendoza (AZ-06) , a daughter of farmworkers, served for 20 years in the U.S. Marine Corps and has spent her career fighting for veterans and working families. Lauren Babb Tomlinson (CA-06) is a working mom and Planned Parenthood public affairs leader who has spent her career fighting for reproductive freedom, affordable health care, and economic opportunity for families. Cherlynn Stevenson (KY-06) is the daughter of a teacher and a coal miner who flipped a red state House district and beat Republican gerrymanders — twice. She served three terms in the state legislature, where she fought for jobs, public schools, and to protect women’s reproductive freedom. Shannon Taylor (VA-05) is a Virginian who made history as Henrico County's first female commonwealth's attorney, spending 12 years prosecuting violent criminals, fighting human trafficking, and defending abortion rights. ******=****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Do you believe in my vision for New Mexico? Add your name!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to share with you my vision for New Mexico — **_[but first, can I ask you to take 30 seconds to personally endorse my campaign for Governor?](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_endorse_vision?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk602-su-nd&refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=2&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)_**
| | [Add My Name](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_endorse_vision?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk602-su-nd&refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=3&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
---
This message is a bit on the longer side, but because you're invested in the future of New Mexico, I hope you'll take the time to read my plan. **As New Mexico’s next Governor, I will:**
**Build Education That Works for New Mexico by:**
* Ensuring students can read before third grade by identifying literacy challenges early and providing targeted support when children fall behind

* Strengthening early literacy screening, expanding bilingual and reading instruction, and investing in summer reading and after-school programs that reinforce learning beyond the school day

* Bolstering access to universal childcare, because learning begins long before a child enters a classroom

* Directing unspent dollars from the Public School Capital Outlay Fund to modernize and improve school facilities so kids can focus on learning

* Expanding outdoor and place-based learning through my Every Child Outdoor Initiative, giving schools the tools and resources to connect classroom instruction to real-world learning that improves engagement and outcomes

**Support New Mexico Families by:**
* Raising the minimum wage and eliminating predatory junk fees

* Passing Paid Family and Medical Leave so people don’t have to choose between caring for their family and making ends meet

* Increasing the child tax credit to put money back into your pockets

* Creating a statewide tenant bill of rights to make renting more affordable and more transparent

* Creating a Critical Sector Housing Fund for workers in critical sectors — like healthcare, behavioral health, social work, education, and more — to recruit more professionals to New Mexico to address endemic shortages that hold our people back

* Aggressively building more housing, eliminating unnecessary red tape, driving state investment into housing, and shortening the time it takes to build a home — and ensuring those homes are built with New Mexican labor

**Back Small Businesses by:**
* Establishing a permanent Office of Small Business to coordinate development programs, fill gaps left by federal cuts, and provide clear access to grants, capital, and state resources

* Cracking down on predatory lending by requiring full transparency in small-business loan disclosures

* Establishing a New Mexico Economic Growth Trust Fund to stabilize our economy in the face of federal uncertainty

**Fix Our Broken Healthcare System by:**
* Protecting and expanding access to healthcare in every part of New Mexico

* Banning medical debt from being included on credit reports

* Expanding New Mexico’s Health Care Affordability Fund to protect access for those who rely on the state marketplace

* Using budget surpluses to fill Medicaid gaps and hire more guides to help people enroll in and keep their benefits

* Ensuring sustainable funding for rural hospitals and clinics, expanding mobile health clinics, and significantly increasing access to outpatient behavioral and mental health care, including a full-scale effort to deliver mental health and homelessness assistance statewide

**Strengthen Public Safety by:**
* Ensuring that law enforcement has the tools, staffing, and technology they need to do their jobs effectively

* Investing in mental and behavioral healthcare, substance use treatment, rehabilitation, and housing stability

* Expanding violence intervention and prevention programs in schools and communities, building accountability systems that emphasize fairness and trust, and investing in community policing models that supplement traditional police work

* Creating a statewide Department of Community Safety staffed with social workers and counselors so law enforcement can focus on violent crime while people get the help they need

* Requiring ICE agents to clearly identify themselves and prohibiting masks that shield misconduct from accountability

New Mexico deserves steady leadership that’s ready on day one, leadership rooted in firsthand knowledge and experience. But the only way we'll be able to make this vision a reality is with strong grassroots support from people like you.
**I'm aiming to get 10,000 endorsements for my campaign before my midnight deadline to show the grassroots strength behind my vision for New Mexico, and I want you to be one of them._[Will you please take a quick moment to sign on now?](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_endorse_vision?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk602-su-nd&refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=4&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)_**
| | [Add My Name](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_endorse_vision?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk602-su-nd&refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=5&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
---
Thank you for your support,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1101?refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=6&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5298?refcode=jtk602-su-nd&t=7&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=8&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=9&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=10&akid=9195%2E400544%2EM_a-9O)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

_**It’s Adam Schwarze; former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota.**_

If elected, I'd be the **eighth Navy SEAL to serve in Congress,** and the second in the United States Senate.

This year feels as though it’s shaping up to be one for the record books, but what records I’m not sure yet. Minnesota has all of the hallmarks of a state that is ready for new, fresh leadership. But whether or not we’re going to be able to get the job done remains to be seen.

I’ve won 11 straw polls across the state to date, and while our primary is not until August, we have already built a winning coalition of delegates that will propel this me to become the Republican Party of Minnesota endorsed candidate next month.We have a few things working for us, and a few things going against us, namely the amount of money anyone running for Congress with a “D” next to their name is raising at present.
**_
As for what’s working for us? The straw poll victories don’t hurt, and as a former Navy SEAL, you know I’m one determined SOB. _**

_**I’m neither a household name in Minnesota or the Republican with the most cash on hand. But no one else in this race has as much raw determination to finally set up Democrats for electoral defeat than I do.**_
**

clean_body: You might not know me, but your support in this race matters more than you’ll ever know. | Fellow Conservative, It’s Adam Schwarze; former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. If elected, I'd be the eighth Navy SEAL to serve in Congress, and the second in the United States Senate. This year feels as though it’s shaping up to be one for the record books, but what records I’m not sure yet. Minnesota has all of the hallmarks of a state that is ready for new, fresh leadership. But whether or not we’re going to be able to get the job done remains to be seen. I’ve won 11 straw polls across the state to date, and while our primary is not until August, we have already built a winning coalition of delegates that will propel this me to become the Republican Party of Minnesota endorsed candidate next month.We have a few things working for us, and a few things going against us, namely the amount of money anyone running for Congress with a “D” next to their name is raising at present. As for what’s working for us? The straw poll victories don’t hurt, and as a former Navy SEAL, you know I’m one determined SOB. I’m neither a household name in Minnesota or the Republican with the most cash on hand. But no one else in this race has as much raw determination to finally set up Democrats for electoral defeat than I do. Help me capitalize on the straw poll victories; the more money we have to fill our gas tanks to travel to even more campaign events, or run ads online to get the attention of hard-to-reach voters, the better chance we’ll have at an upset victory in this race. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Greg Abbott has given Elon Musk the keys to the castle
body:
Abbott has rolled out the carpet for Elon Musk
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Greg Abbott recently admitted to something every Texan knows — that if you’re a billionaire, Abbott will roll out the red carpet for you, waive the rules, and hand you a sweetheart deal on the taxpayers’ dime.
**Which is _exactly_ what he did for Elon Musk.**
Abbott admitted to directing his appointees to fast-track permits and waive requirements, so Musk could build his Tesla Factory in Texas.
He did this, not because it helped working families or because it helped give people new job opportunities, but because Abbott’s _real_ priority is keeping his billionaire pipeline flowing.
**Abbott has built a _$106 million war chest_ off massive corporate tax breaks and backroom deals. Meanwhile, Texas families are stuck with higher property taxes, higher healthcare costs, and underfunded public schools.**
That’s what I call the Greg Abbott Corruption Tax, Peter. Billionaires get the favors, and the rest of us pay the bill.
I know that Texans are fed up. And I also know that they’re ready to vote him out of office.
We can beat Abbott and his billionaire backers with people power, but only if we have the resources to organize everywhere, reach voters in every corner of the state, and fight back when Abbott’s allies try to drown us out.
**[So if you’re ready to help end Abbott’s reign of corruption, will you chip in $5 or any amount today to power this grassroots campaign?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260425_2_elon.x8XmgJ&refcode=em20260425-994&amount=5&t=1&akid=994%2E299639%2EjVN_ZM)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260425_2_elon.x8XmgJ&amount=5&refcode=em20260425-994&t=20&akid=994%2E299639%2EjVN_ZM)
Thank you,
Gina

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

| | | | America's rapidly surging debt is no secret.

But for years, Wall Street and Washington have treated our $38 trillion national debt like a problem for tomorrow.

A crisis they can just keep kicking down the road.

**However, the conflict in the Middle East over the last two weeks just violently accelerated the timeline.**

With the Strait of Hormuz locked down, oil is surging. And analysts are predicting $150 a barrel if this drags on.

When oil spikes like that, inflation roars back into the economy.

In the past, the government would try to print, cut, or borrow its way out of an inflation shock.

**But you cannot do that when you're sitting on a $38 trillion mountain of debt and paying $1 trillion a year as interest on it.**

In short, this match has just hit a powder keg.

And it's going to trigger a radical, violent shift in the U.S. stock market.

Popular household stocks that looked untouchable a month ago could get gutted. And another set of overlooked stocks could go for massive, historic runs.

That's why I rushed to get this special broadcast live this morning.

Inside, I pull back the curtain on a 100-year-old market signal.

clean_body: America's rapidly surging debt is no secret. But for years, Wall Street and Washington have treated our $38 trillion national debt like a problem for tomorrow. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | America's rapidly surging debt is no secret. But for years, Wall Street and Washington have treated our $38 trillion national debt like a problem for tomorrow. A crisis they can just keep kicking down the road. These people aren’t just wrong — they’re dangerous. Dear Peter, My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution. I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress. Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines, especially in this moment when our democracy continues to be threatened. We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress. Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines, especially in this moment when our democracy continues to be threatened. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I cannot emphasize the importance of this enough. —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi ‐‐ it's Adam Schiff, DSCC Vice Chair.

**In a moment, I'm going to talk to you about something deeply important, both to me personally and to the future of our nation. But first, I have to ask:[_Will you chip in $7 right now to help flip the Senate blue and take power away from the MAGA majority as they work to enact Trump's dangerous agenda?_](https://go.dscc.org/go/23065?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260425-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260425-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=23568%2E9716520%2E3r212s)**

I'm going to put it plain and simple ‐‐ **Democrats have a huge opportunity to pick up Senate seats ‐‐ including in a pair of special elections on the calendar.** We've got a chance to capture seats that wouldn't have been up for years ‐‐ and in this moment, after all that we've seen from Donald Trump and his lawless administration, we have to fight for every opportunity to defeat them.

As someone who has won a special election to the Senate, I cannot emphasize enough the importance of this. Democrats only need a few seats to flip the Senate majority, and with the GOP defending more seats than they were expecting, we have a real chance to catch them flat-footed.

But we can't just sit around and cross our fingers ‐‐ **we must do what we can right now to secure the resources we need to win seats like Ohio and Florida, defend blue battleground seats across the country, pick up key seats, and defeat Trump's handpicked enablers.**

**[These special elections are among a tiny handful of races that could decide the majority, so I have to ask: Will you chip in $7 to help Democrats win key elections like these and flip the Senate majority? In critical races, every dollar counts.](https://go.dscc.org/go/23065?amount=7&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260425-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260425-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=23568%2E9716520%2E3r212s)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Here’s what’s next for us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Peter ,
A few days ago, Virginia voters delivered a real win, and it was because supporters like you helped us do two things: build the Democratic majority that put this amendment on the ballot, and fund the voter contact work that turned people out to pass it.
Thank you.
Thank you for seeing the importance of this fight before most people did and for helping us pay for the kind of work that actually moves turnout in elections like this – direct voter contact, focused on the people most likely to decide the outcome.
But we need to be honest about what comes next.
Republicans still have a cash advantage, and they are already adjusting their midterm strategy to protect their House majority. They have more money, more outside groups, and no shortage of donors willing to write giant checks.
We are not going to beat them by matching every dollar they spend; that has never been our plan.
We beat them by spending smarter and finding the voters other groups miss, reaching them early, then staying on them with the calls and the follow-ups it takes to turn them out.
Virginia was proof that this works, and it was a big win, but it was not the last fight on the map.
There are more seats to flip before Democrats can take back the House and put a real check on Trump. Right now, we need to shore up our resources so we’re ready for the next one. Will you chip in $10 today to help power our next win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04252026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em04252026] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em04252026]

– GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Senator Elizabeth Warren has a message for our team.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4556%2E898137%2EmTlZul)
Just this week, Senator Elizabeth Warren shouted our campaign out on Stephen Colbert’s show!
She was talking about the leaders we need in the U.S. Senate to hold Donald Trump accountable and fight for working families. Then she said it:
**_"Mallory McMorrow in Michigan is ready to go... We’ve got people who are ready to come into the United States Senate and ready to fight."_**
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-warrencolbert.Q5K-sx&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20260425_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4556%2E898137%2EmTlZul)

---
When I first ran for the State Senate in 2018, people told me I didn’t have a chance. But we proved them wrong because we built a movement that was too loud to ignore.
Now, national leaders like Senator Warren are seeing exactly what we’re building here in Michigan. They see that we’re outraising our opponents without taking a dime of corporate PAC money. They see that we’re locked in a dead heat because our message is resonating.
The GOP is already planning to spend $45 million to buy this seat and protect their majority. They want to drown out our voices.
[**Senator Warren is counting on us to be ready. Can you donate $10 or whatever you can today to show her — and the GOP — that we are ready to go?**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/128?c0=mam-em-warrencolbert.5VPM9h&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20260425_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4556%2E898137%2EmTlZul)

---
Let’s go win this.
\- Mallory

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: Thank you, from me and 3,000-year-old Sequoias
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM2NjE4NTIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQ0MDM2NDg1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter, LCV members showed up this Earth Day. Members like you took action to keep
public lands in public hands. From all of us at LCV, thank you. In the spirit of celebrating our Earth and public lands, I want to share a
little about my own connection to these special places. I have always
appreciated the public lands, parks, and waters throughout America, but these
places have moved up in importance in my own life after seeing the damage being
done to our planet by the Trump administration. Last year, I made it a point to visit Yosemite and Sequoia National Parks.
Seeing and walking among huge granite cliffs and 3,000-year-old Sequoias — trees
that have been alive since before the founding of Rome — was one of the most
awe-inspiring experiences of my life. It reminded me why I do this work and why
it’s essential for LCV to continue building grassroots power to keep our public
lands and waters protected. Because if this administration has its way, more
irreplaceable public lands like these could be destroyed for corporate profit. I’m committed to keeping public lands in public hands, and was heartened to see
that so many of you are too. Public lands benefit people and the environment —
they are a source of respite and wonder, and deepen our connection with nature;
they are culturally significant to Indigenous communities and Tribal nations;
and they sustain delicate ecosystems and diverse, interconnected species of
animal and plant life. Public lands benefit all of us, and it’s up to all of us to help protect them.
Support from LCV members like you helps do just that, powering our work to
defend public lands and build a more just, equitable, and sustainable future for
all. Thank you again for standing with LCV this Earth Day to build power for people
and our planet. We can’t do it with you. Sincerely, Chris Brooks

Vice President, Membership
League of Conservation Voters P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to support our Earth Day campaign, it’s not too
late! You can still make an impact for public lands by joining LCV as an annual member today. https://links.messages.lcv. SUPPORT LCV https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13661852&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDM2NDg1MAS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDM2NDg1MAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13661852&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDM2NDg1MAS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDM2NDg1MAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
