name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Reject the infection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| This year, America turns 250 years old — and our body politic has never been sicker. We're suffering from a seemingly incurable illness called Citizens United.

Its symptoms are everywhere: paralysis in Congress, collapsing public trust, and an economy that feels totally rigged.

**It may be terminal — but we're not dead yet.**

I'm Jack Schlossberg, and I wrote an OpEd about it for Rolling Stone earlier this month. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108037?t=6&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud) You see, my campaign for Congress is running a clinical trial in New York City, testing whether grassroots medicine can inoculate our infected political machine.

[If you believe in grassroots power, we need your support to show that we can win without ANY corporate PAC money, AIPAC investments, or Big Tech. Are you in? Split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project today!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108037?t=7&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud) | [Reject the Infection →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108037?t=8&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
---
The Supreme Court's 2010 decision in Citizens United v. FEC unleashed a pathogen into the bloodstream of American democracy: unlimited, undisclosed corporate and billionaire spending.

**It set a new equilibrium and put a price tag on elections, and it's been a disaster for our Democracy.**

Since the Court's decision, total election spending has tripled. The top one percent of households now owns a third of the nation's wealth. Taxes on corporations are the lowest in history. The richest Americans sitting behind Trump at his inauguration often pay zero in taxes, while ordinary Americans are struggling to afford the basics.

The disease is systemic: money buys access, access buys influence, and influence rewrites the rules.

**That's why I'm testing a cure in my home district for Citizens United: Citizens, united.**

To heal, we need to get back to our roots, which means running campaigns that speak to and hear from the very people we seek to represent. That's what I'm trying to do, because the health of our democracy won't be restored by those who benefit from spreading this illness. It will be restored by those willing to fight it.

[America doesn't need a eulogy. It needs a treatment plan. Will you stand with me and the Voter Protection Project to reject the infection? Let's prove that our country can still heal.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108037?t=9&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jack Schlossberg and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108038?t=10&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108039?t=11&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108040?t=12&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108041?t=13&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108037?t=14&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud)
Thank you,
Jack Schlossberg
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23895%2E878179%2Es8Z_Ud).**

name: Sherrod Brown (via StateDemocrats.com)
subject: We need to get our own ads up and running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
My opponent just launched his first attack against me.
#
Hi Peter, it's Sherrod Brown reaching out urgently.
My opponent just started airing his first attack ad against me. His super PAC is spending _over a million dollars_ to plaster the airwaves here in Ohio and mislead swing voters.
**We need to respond right away.**
**[So my team is launching an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $200,000 so we can get our own ads on the air ASAP and fight back. Please split a donation between me and State Democrats Committee:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103189?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103189?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG)**
**The GOP has made it clear that defeating our campaign is their top priority.**
Poll after poll proves we have a serious shot at winning in Ohio and _The Cook Political Report_ has moved this race in my favor _twice._ On top of that, Senate Republicans' biggest super PAC announced their largest cash infusion of the year will be in Ohio. Now, my opponent is launching ads of his own – _much earlier than we expected._
The harsh reality is if we don’t respond today, persuadable voters will _only_ be seeing these misleading ads against us. **That will put our chances of flipping this seat in serious jeopardy.**
We can’t let this become a one-sided fight. The only way we can stay competitive in this race is by getting on even financial footing. So I need you to chip in – even $5.
Peter - $5 might not sound like the kind of money that can fend off $80 million in GOP spending. But together, it all adds up. And by the time you’re reading this, someone else has already chipped in.
**[Will you step up by splitting $5 (or whatever you can give right now) to help us reach our $200K emergency goal and get our own ads up and running?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103189?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103190?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103189?refcode=em20260425-10355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10355%2E614464%2EFY4tEG)

Sherrod

Hey folks,
Adam and I went live and got into something that honestly feels bigger than any single headline right now. This one connects the dots between media consolidation, political power, and what it all means for your ability to get the truth. If you care about where this is heading, this is a must-watch.
Here are a few moments you don't want to miss:
* [00:01:07] We break down the massive Warner Bros.-Paramount Skydance merger and why it could reshape how Americans consume information--and who controls it
* [00:02:33] The White House Correspondents' Dinner tension: Trump attends for the first time ever, and what that means for press freedom in real time
* [00:06:55] How a handful of ultra-wealthy elites are consolidating power across media, tech, and politics--and why that should alarm everyone
* [00:11:39] The full scope of what this merger actually controls (CNN, HBO, CBS, TikTok, and more) and the cultural influence that comes with it
* [00:18:01] Why independent media is the "variable they didn't consider"--and how creators like us are building something they can't easily control

With urgency,
--Mike

name: Alex for CO-03
subject: We need to keep pace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Dear friend,
Right now, the people in Washington are moving full speed ahead—pushing policies that raise costs, threaten healthcare, and ignore what communities like ours are actually dealing with.
They’re not slowing down to listen. They’re not showing up here. And they’re not asking who this impacts.
That’s exactly what’s wrong.
I’ve been out in every corner of this district—at kitchen tables, community events, and small businesses—having real conversations about what people are facing every day. That’s the kind of leadership this district deserves.
But if we’re going to take this fight to Jeff Hurd and flip this seat, we can’t afford to slow down now.
Our end-of-month deadline is coming up, and it’s a big one. It determines whether we have the resources to stay on the road, reach more voters, and keep building this campaign the right way.
Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can before April 30 to help us keep this momentum going? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
This campaign is powered by people who live here—and we’re just getting started. Together we can.
— Alex Kelloff

name: Lorenza Ramirez (via Democrats.org)
subject: What the DNC is doing for voter registration:
body:
---
Hi Derek, it’s Lorenza Ramirez, the DNC’s National Organizing Director. I wanted to pop in and give you a brief update about _When We Count_ , our largest voter registration program in DNC history. You’ve probably heard this from us before, but Democrats have lost a lot of ground in the last few years when it comes to voter registration. Meanwhile, Republicans have registered 2.4 _million_ voters. This year, we’re making it a priority to flip the script. **_When We Count_ is how we’re doing it.** I’m on the ground in Phoenix, AZ right now, onboarding our first cohort of fellows. We’re working to register over 250,000 new Democratic voters in key battleground states ahead of the midterm elections in November, and train the next generation of Democratic organizers to fight and win in their own communities. Already this year, we’re seeing Democratic voters show up in a big way — in the last few months, states like Texas and Illinois have seen record-breaking voter turnout at the ballot box. **At the DNC, we’re seeing that as proof that when we reach voters, they show up.** [**So Derek, when you chip in to the DNC, this is what you’re funding. If work like this is important to you, we’re asking you to pitch in $7 to help us continue reaching voters in key battleground states and all across the country, and to ensure that we have the grassroots power to elect Democrats at all levels of government this year and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260425_6864_fr&refcode2=6864_22930333_Wkds_l&akid=6864%2E22930333%2EWkds_l) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260425_6864_fr&refcode2=6864_22930333_Wkds_l&akid=6864%2E22930333%2EWkds_l)**

clean_body: Hi Derek, it’s Lorenza Ramirez, the DNC’s National Organizing Director. I wanted to pop in and give you a brief update about When We Count , our largest voter registration program in DNC history. You’ve probably heard this from us before, but Democrats have lost a lot of ground in the last few years when it comes to voter registration. Meanwhile, Republicans have registered 2.4 million voters. This year, we’re making it a priority to flip the script. When We Count is how we’re doing it. I’m on the ground in Phoenix, AZ right now, onboarding our first cohort of fellows. We’re working to register over 250,000 new Democratic voters in key battleground states ahead of the midterm elections in November, and train the next generation of Democratic organizers to fight and win in their own communities. Already this year, we’re seeing Democratic voters show up in a big way — in the last few months, states like Texas and Illinois have seen record-breaking voter turnout at the ballot box. At the DNC, we’re seeing that as proof that when we reach voters, they show up. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much, Lorenza If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

subject: Extreme partisan hack vs. dedicated public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
A recent poll shows this race statistically tied.

# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1181%2E124072%2E_Ic8wE)
| | | |
---
Peter,

While Roy has spent his life serving the people of North Carolina, his opponent in this race, Republican Michael Whatley, is a DC insider, former Big Oil lobbyist and MAGA loyalist whose only mission is to serve Donald Trump.
* **Whatley is a 2020 election denier.** He spread baseless conspiracy theories about mass voter fraud and completely undermined our democracy.

* **Whatley is an extreme partisan hack.** He was personally tapped by Trump to lead the Republican National Committee in 2024, where he pushed his dangerous, out-of-touch agenda.

* **Whatley is for billionaires, not working families.** He celebrated gutting Medicaid to fund the largest tax cut for billionaires in history, calling it a “huge win.”

Michael Whatley would be a disaster in the U.S. Senate, but with Trump and the GOP spending millions to try to buy this seat for him, a recent poll shows this race statistically tied.
**We need your help to stay the course and win.[_If you want to see Roy Cooper, a dedicated public servant, in the U.S. Senate, and win the seat that’s key to Democrats’ chances of retaking the majority, will you chip in $5 to our campaign today?_](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvf-email-26?refcode=email_fr_pros_jtk388-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&t=14&refcode2=1181_124072__Ic8wE&akid=1181%2E124072%2E_Ic8wE)**

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Pete Hegseth thinks he can get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130172249/616855648/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWM4ODg4Zi0wMTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Fj8Ti-198WnWHx9e7SElcV8xbosc8asTSwakaMbuHQ=)
New reports suggest that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth may have tried to profit off the very war he helped oversee — **with attempts to invest in defense companies just *weeks* before military action in Iran began.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130172250/616855649/789508428?refcode=260425_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWM4ODg4Zi0wMTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Fj8Ti-198WnWHx9e7SElcV8xbosc8asTSwakaMbuHQ=)
Let that sink in: While American troops were being put in harm’s way and families braced for the consequences of another war, someone at the highest levels of government may have been trying to cash in.
If true, this isn’t just corruption — it’s a national security threat. Because decisions about war and peace should NEVER be influenced by personal financial gain.
That’s why I’m taking action.
Today, we’re launching a formal investigation into these reports. We will follow the facts, demand answers, and hold anyone accountable who thought they could profit off this moment.
But let me be clear: this won’t be easy. The same people who got us into this mess will try to shut down this investigation. They’ll deflect, deny, and hope the public moves on.
**[We can’t let that happen. If we’re going to uncover the truth and hold the powerful accountable, I need your support right now. So please, can you chip in today to help us demand accountability?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130172251/616855650/-309737922?refcode=260425_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWM4ODg4Zi0wMTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Fj8Ti-198WnWHx9e7SElcV8xbosc8asTSwakaMbuHQ=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130172252/616855651/-309737922?refcode=260425_RG_re-hegseth-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWM4ODg4Zi0wMTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Fj8Ti-198WnWHx9e7SElcV8xbosc8asTSwakaMbuHQ=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
